content:
:: Articles in need of updating
 :: Articles with multiple issues
 :: Incomplete lists
 :: Timelines
Timeline of galactic history :: This article or section is in need of referencing per Wookieepedia's sourcing guidelines.
Timeline of galactic history :: This article has an excess of redlinks in it. ({{ Redlink }})
Timeline of galactic history :: Parts of this article have been identified as no longer being up to date. ({{ Update }}) The article needs to be updated with Star Wars: The High Republic , Star Wars Outlaws .
Timeline of galactic history > Before the Republic (eons–25,025 BBY) :: Sentient species prehistory
Timeline of galactic history > Before the Republic (eons–25,025 BBY) > Sentient species prehistory :: The universe begins forming.
Timeline of galactic history > Before the Republic (eons–25,025 BBY) > Sentient species prehistory :: The galaxy is formed around a super-massive black hole .
Timeline of galactic history > Before the Republic (eons–25,025 BBY) > Sentient species prehistory :: Midi-chlorians are birthed from the Wellspring of Life . They are microscopic symbiotic organisms in all living things that connect the Living Force —the energy of all life—to the Cosmic Force , allowing the will of the all-encompassing energy field known as the Force to communicate with lifeforms.
Timeline of galactic history > Before the Republic (eons–25,025 BBY) > Sentient species prehistory :: The Father , the Son , and the Daughter exist as powerful Force wielders who come to live in the ethereal realm of Mortis .
Timeline of galactic history > Before the Republic (eons–25,025 BBY) > Sentient species prehistory :: Billions of years before the Imperial Era , mineral matter that would infuse rock walls on the planet Ilum with valuable constituents, including rare crystals such as the Force-attuned kyber , begin to accumulate.
Timeline of galactic history > Before the Republic (eons–25,025 BBY) > Sentient species prehistory :: The long lived Exogorth species comes into existance. Over one billion years before the Imperial Era, the Exogorth Sy-O is born to Sy-O's father-and-mother . However, at even one billion, Sy-O would be considered young by Exogorth standards.
Timeline of galactic history > Before the Republic (eons–25,025 BBY) > Sentient species prehistory :: Billions to millions of years before the Imperial Era, lava flows on Dagobah and forms Mount Dagger before disappearing to allow for the flourishing of non-sentient life.
Timeline of galactic history > Before the Republic (eons–25,025 BBY) > Sentient species prehistory :: A non-sentient species lives on the world of Bravais , eventually evolving into the sentient Bravaisian .
Timeline of galactic history > Before the Republic (eons–25,025 BBY) > Sentient species prehistory :: A non-sentient species lives on the planet Crul millions of years before they evolve into the sentient Crolute .

Timeline of galactic history > Before the Republic (eons–25,025 BBY) > Sentient species prehistory :: A primitive species lives on the planet Abednedo , eventually evolving into the sentient Abednedo .
Timeline of galactic history > Before the Republic (eons–25,025 BBY) :: Sentient species history (exact chronology undefined)
Timeline of galactic history > Before the Republic (eons–25,025 BBY) > Sentient species history (exact chronology undefined) :: In ancient times, beings from a distant galaxy built a reflex point on the planet Seatos which pointed the way to the extragalactic planet Peridea . The people become known as the Dathomiri .
Timeline of galactic history > Before the Republic (eons–25,025 BBY) > Sentient species history (exact chronology undefined) :: A star map pointing the way to Peridea's galaxy was also stored inside a Nightsisters' Temple on Arcana .
Timeline of galactic history > Before the Republic (eons–25,025 BBY) > Sentient species history (exact chronology undefined) :: 100,000 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > Before the Republic (eons–25,025 BBY) > Sentient species history (exact chronology undefined) > 100,000 BBY :: Beginning of the construction of the first city levels of Coruscant in the Core Worlds .
Timeline of galactic history > Before the Republic (eons–25,025 BBY) > Sentient species history (exact chronology undefined) :: 57,000 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > Before the Republic (eons–25,025 BBY) > Sentient species history (exact chronology undefined) > 57,000 BBY :: Utapau is settled by colonists who eventually evolve into the Pau'an and Utai species.
Timeline of galactic history > Before the Republic (eons–25,025 BBY) > Sentient species history (exact chronology undefined) :: Pre- hyperspace travel
Timeline of galactic history > Before the Republic (eons–25,025 BBY) > Sentient species history (exact chronology undefined) > Pre- hyperspace travel :: Batuu , a planet on the edge of the Outer Rim Territories , is colonized millennia after a great cataclysm resulted in the planet's giant trees being destroyed and eventually petrified.
Timeline of galactic history > Before the Republic (eons–25,025 BBY) > Sentient species history (exact chronology undefined) > Pre- hyperspace travel :: A sentient ancestral species invents the hyperdrive after studying the hyperspace -traveling purrgil , opening up the galaxy for exploration.
Timeline of galactic history > Before the Republic (eons–25,025 BBY) > Sentient species history (exact chronology undefined) :: Post- hyperspace travel
Timeline of galactic history > Before the Republic (eons–25,025 BBY) > Sentient species history (exact chronology undefined) > Post- hyperspace travel :: c. 30,000 BBY

Timeline of galactic history > Before the Republic (eons–25,025 BBY) > Sentient species history (exact chronology undefined) > Post- hyperspace travel > c. 30,000 BBY :: Devaronians , naturally adept as scouts, become active as galactic explorers from their native planet Devaron , independently developing the hyperdrive.
Timeline of galactic history > Before the Republic (eons–25,025 BBY) > Sentient species history (exact chronology undefined) > Post- hyperspace travel > c. 30,000 BBY :: The Outer Rim planet Benetage is abandoned.
Timeline of galactic history > Before the Republic (eons–25,025 BBY) > Sentient species history (exact chronology undefined) > Post- hyperspace travel :: c. 27,000 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > Before the Republic (eons–25,025 BBY) > Sentient species history (exact chronology undefined) > Post- hyperspace travel > c. 27,000 BBY :: Felucia is colonized by Gossam Courivers
Timeline of galactic history > Before the Republic (eons–25,025 BBY) > Sentient species history (exact chronology undefined) > Post- hyperspace travel > c. 27,000 BBY :: By this point, human civilization had developed on Empress Teta in the Deep Core .
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Dawn of the Jedi (c. 25,025 BBY) :: c. 25,025 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Dawn of the Jedi (c. 25,025 BBY) > c. 25,025 BBY :: The Dai Bendu , the religious group that would be attributed with the first holocrons , exists as the precursor to the Jedi Order .
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Dawn of the Jedi (c. 25,025 BBY) > c. 25,025 BBY :: In pursuit of the preservation of peace and justice, an individual who came to be known as the Prime Jedi founds the Jedi Order on Ahch-To .
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Dawn of the Jedi (c. 25,025 BBY) > c. 25,025 BBY :: The First Jedi Temple is built on Ahch-To, and the Jedi village is constructed on the Temple Island soon afterward.
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Dawn of the Jedi (c. 25,025 BBY) > c. 25,025 BBY :: Shortly after the founding of the Jedi Order, the world Ilum is discovered by a Jedi scout through Force-assisted hyperspace navigation.
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Dawn of the Jedi (c. 25,025 BBY) :: c. 25,020 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Dawn of the Jedi (c. 25,025 BBY) > c. 25,020 BBY :: Professor Huyang powers up.
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Dawn of the Jedi (c. 25,025 BBY) :: c. 25,000 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Dawn of the Jedi (c. 25,025 BBY) > c. 25,000 BBY :: The Galactic Republic is formed by the Core Founders , twenty-two Core Worlds which include such planets as Alderaan .

Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Expansionist Period (25,000 BBY) :: 25,000 BBY (continued)
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Expansionist Period (25,000 BBY) > 25,000 BBY (continued) :: Expansionist Period
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Expansionist Period (25,000 BBY) > 25,000 BBY (continued) > Expansionist Period :: The foundation of the Corellian Run helps the formation of the Corellia system . The Corellian Trade Spine and the Perlemian Trade Route are also founded.
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Expansionist Period (25,000 BBY) > 25,000 BBY (continued) > Expansionist Period :: Duros explorers discover and colonize the planet Neimoidia .
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Expansionist Period (25,000 BBY) > 25,000 BBY (continued) > Expansionist Period :: The planet Cato Neimoidia joins the Republic.
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Millennia before the Imperial Era :: Eons before the Imperial Era (exact chronology undefined)
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Millennia before the Imperial Era > Eons before the Imperial Era (exact chronology undefined) :: The comet Kinro is predicted to carve its way through the Core Worlds. Before it can enter the Mid Rim, members of the Jedi Order come together and will it apart, although several Jedi lose their lives or minds in the process.
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Millennia before the Imperial Era > Eons before the Imperial Era (exact chronology undefined) :: By this point, the ice moon Mesula had been shattered .
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Millennia before the Imperial Era > Eons before the Imperial Era (exact chronology undefined) :: The first Grand Zigoth of Utapau, Krynbalt Kyr , dies .
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Millennia before the Imperial Era :: Thousands of years before the Clone Wars or the Imperial Era (exact chronology undefined)
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Millennia before the Imperial Era > Thousands of years before the Clone Wars or the Imperial Era (exact chronology undefined) :: The Predori empire opposed the Galactic Republic.
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Millennia before the Imperial Era > Thousands of years before the Clone Wars or the Imperial Era (exact chronology undefined) :: A Sibettan constructs a wormhole gate that leads between the seams of time and space, facilitating their exodus from the wider galaxy.

Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Millennia before the Imperial Era > Thousands of years before the Clone Wars or the Imperial Era (exact chronology undefined) :: The Temple of the Kyber is constructed on the cold, desert moon of Jedha .
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Millennia before the Imperial Era > Thousands of years before the Clone Wars or the Imperial Era (exact chronology undefined) :: Hylemane Lightbringer is born and later bludgeoned to death by a chair, disproving the myth that "he could not be killed by mortal weapons ."
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Millennia before the Imperial Era > Thousands of years before the Clone Wars or the Imperial Era (exact chronology undefined) :: The Zygerrian Slave Empire is defeated by Jedi Knights after their slave operations are outlawed in Republic space.
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Millennia before the Imperial Era > Thousands of years before the Clone Wars or the Imperial Era (exact chronology undefined) :: A rogue Jedi leads a group of Force users to seek greater power through embracing the dark side of the Force . They split from the Jedi Order during the schism known as the Hundred-Year Darkness , becoming the rivaling Sith . Defeated, they are exiled by the Jedi Order, which serves the light side of the Force , and flee from known space to Korriban , a world of red sands that was later known as Moraband.
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Millennia before the Imperial Era > Thousands of years before the Clone Wars or the Imperial Era (exact chronology undefined) :: Unbeknownst to others, the Sith on Korriban rebuild and prepare their revenge, erecting massive Sith temples and tombs in the Valley of the Dark Lords .
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Millennia before the Imperial Era > Thousands of years before the Clone Wars or the Imperial Era (exact chronology undefined) :: Over time , the Sith Empire , with the use of enslaved beings, vies for control of the galaxy. They build gargantuan superweapons powered by kyber crystals to battle the Jedi.
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Millennia before the Imperial Era > Thousands of years before the Clone Wars or the Imperial Era (exact chronology undefined) :: The carbonite mines of the Empress Teta system are conquered by the Krath .
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > 22,000–5000 BBY :: 22,000 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > 22,000–5000 BBY > 22,000 BBY :: The planet Neimoidia joins the Galactic Republic as an independent world in itself.
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > 22,000–5000 BBY :: c. 21,032 BBY

Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > 22,000–5000 BBY > c. 21,032 BBY :: The Blood Monarchy is established on Thisspias , the site of many battles during the Great Manifest Period .
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > 22,000–5000 BBY :: c. 20,000 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > 22,000–5000 BBY > c. 20,000 BBY :: An attack on Garn , later known as the Doom of the Ordu Aspectu, occurs—the Fortress of Garn was possessed by the Ordu Aspectu , a splinter group of the Jedi Order. Led by Rur and related to the Massassi , their experiments on immortality led to conflicts with Jedi orthodoxy, beginning the Entruvia Conflict . A dating system based on the signing of the Domancion Accord was used around this time, and the conflict ended with a Jedi—Ordu Aspectu peace treaty : Jedi inspectors arrived at Rur's citadel, and, believing they intended to deactivate him, an artificial intelligence made of Rur's knowledge seized control of the citadel's droids and slaughtered its inhabitants. Rur sacrificed himself to deactivate the machine, hyperspace-jumping the citadel across the galaxy.
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > 22,000–5000 BBY :: 15,000 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > 22,000–5000 BBY > 15,000 BBY :: Rodia officially joins the Galactic Republic.
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > 22,000–5000 BBY > 15,000 BBY :: The physical distinctions between the Neimoidian and Duros species becomes clear on Neimoidia.
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > 22,000–5000 BBY :: 12,000 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > 22,000–5000 BBY > 12,000 BBY :: Settlers from Corellia colonize a planet that becomes an Ordance/Regional Depot known as Ord Mantell .
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > 22,000–5000 BBY > 12,000 BBY :: As credited by the Jedi, the planet Ossus comes to be their cultural center, and is made a near-mandatory pilgrimage site.
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > 22,000–5000 BBY :: 7977 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > 22,000–5000 BBY > 7977 BBY :: The Coruscant reckoning calendar is introduced.
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > 22,000–5000 BBY :: c. 6000 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > 22,000–5000 BBY > c. 6000 BBY :: Civilization on Bardotta begins, with the Frangawl Cult reigning over a militant society.
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > 22,000–5000 BBY :: 5500 BBY

Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > 22,000–5000 BBY > 5500 BBY :: The Rimma Trade Route is established.
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > 22,000–5000 BBY :: c. 5100 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > 22,000–5000 BBY > c. 5100 BBY :: The Stybla family of the Chiss unite the Chiss Great Families as the First Ruling Family . With the unification the Chiss Ascendancy is formed, an aristocratic oligarchical nation located inside the Unknown Regions, and an interconnection of individual sovereignties which favores a more libertarian approach and embraces a philosophy of non-intervention and peaceful diplomacy with outsiders, prohibiting first strikes.
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > 22,000–5000 BBY :: 5019 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > 22,000–5000 BBY > 5019 BBY :: The Chiss start exploring the Unknown Regions outside of the Ascendancy, known as the "Chaos" to the Chiss people, begining an era of exploration.
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Wars of the Old Republic (c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY) > Battles with the Jedi (c. 5000 BBY) :: c. 5000 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Wars of the Old Republic (c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY) > Battles with the Jedi (c. 5000 BBY) > c. 5000 BBY :: Soon after Empress Teta 's Unification Wars , the Great Hyperspace War is waged by the Sith Lord Naga Sadow according to the Qel-Droma Epics .
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Wars of the Old Republic (c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY) > Battles with the Jedi (c. 5000 BBY) > c. 5000 BBY :: The Sith wage a war against the Jedi and the Galactic Republic, which sees the fall of the Republic capital and cityworld Coruscant. This allows the Sith to build a shrine on the planet which exudes the force of the dark side. However, the Jedi eventually repel the Sith and reclaim Coruscant.
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Wars of the Old Republic (c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY) > Battles with the Jedi (c. 5000 BBY) > c. 5000 BBY :: According to the Qel-Droma Epics, the Great Jedi Library on Ossus is established as the physical embodiment of Jedi knowledge. The library's construction was said to be overseen by the Odan-Urr , a Jedi Master who annotated on a " Phases of Mortis " solution to the Unsolved Theorem of Master Thorpe , which was inscribed on a book dating to millennia BBY.
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Wars of the Old Republic (c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY) > Battles with the Jedi (c. 5000 BBY) > c. 5000 BBY :: The original Rammahgon was thought to have been destroyed at around this point.

Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Wars of the Old Republic (c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY) > Battles with the Jedi (c. 5000 BBY) > c. 5000 BBY :: The Great Temple is built by the Massassi on Yavin 4 .
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Wars of the Old Republic (c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY) > Battles with the Jedi (c. 5000 BBY) > c. 5000 BBY :: The Chiss Stybla family obtains the Starflash , a superweapon created by an unknown alien species that can fire an enormous blast of tachyonic and lightspeed energy at a star, causing a far more powerful return burst. Due to its destructive nature, it is hidden away in the Bastion , the predecessor of the Universal Analysis Group , with the intent of never using it.
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Wars of the Old Republic (c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY) > c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY :: c. 4300 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Wars of the Old Republic (c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY) > c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY > c. 4300 BBY :: An enemy nation of the Chiss conquers almost all of the Ascendancy, driving the Chiss species back to their homeworld of Csilla and nearly driving the Chiss extinct. However, the Ascendancy achieves a pyrrhic victory at the Final Assault on Csilla , a last stand by the remnants of the Chiss Defense Force in the war. The enemy amasses their entire fleet in an attempt to conquer the Chiss homeworld, but Patriarch Mitth'omo'ross "Thomoro" of the Mitth family volunteers the Mitth to sacrifice twenty Chiss warriors , including her four sons, to annihilate the enemy fleet by the Starflash . In the aftermath of the activation of Starflash, all four of Thomoro's sons die, and she is granted the title "The Tragic." Furthermore, the Stybla family , at time the sole Ruling Family of the Ascendancy, so admired Patriarch Thomoro's sacrifice that they bestow a great honor on her, granting her the suffix " odo " meaning "guardian" in the ancestral Stybla language Tybroic . Furthermore, the Stybla agree to step down as Ruling Family, granting Ruling status to the Mitth family and two other Chiss families and stepping back to become a still-important but less powerful Great Family . However, the Starflash weapon also affected Csilla's sun , causing it to cool and make the surface of the planet uninhabitable.
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Wars of the Old Republic (c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY) > c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY :: c. 4260 BBY

Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Wars of the Old Republic (c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY) > c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY > c. 4260 BBY :: The Chiss begin an exodus from Csilla to colony worlds such as Avidich , Rentor and Sarvchi . This exodus to other worlds is kept a secret from most in the Ascendancy. Instead, historical accounts of the event teach that Csilla's population had moved underground, leaving out the fact that the number of Chiss below the surface is far below the population of four billion before Csilla's climate change. Nevertheless, the headquarters of both the Chiss Expansionary Defense Fleet and Chiss Syndicure , along with many merchant and cargo installations, are kept on Csilla. Additionally, most of the Chiss Ruling Families refuse to abandon their capital world entirely, though some move their homesteads to other planets.
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Wars of the Old Republic (c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY) > c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY :: Almost a century before c. 4000 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Wars of the Old Republic (c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY) > c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY > Almost a century before c. 4000 BBY :: Human explorers from Grizmallt in the Core discover a Mid Rim world they name Nabu , later known as Naboo. The native Gungans retreat into their swamps and lakes.
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Wars of the Old Republic (c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY) > c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY :: c. 4000 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Wars of the Old Republic (c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY) > c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY > c. 4000 BBY :: Fleeing civil war on Grizmallt, human refugees make Nabu their new home, discovering the presence of Gungans while settling in. The humans and the Gungans make war against each other in the next few decades before agreeing to live separately. Gungan society had flourished on the world in the preceding millennia after the sudden departure of the Elders , a reptilian sentient civilization that colonized Nabu and waged war against the indigenes. Before the Elders' arrival, the Gungans had lived on Nabu in large nomadic tribes for millennia.
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Wars of the Old Republic (c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY) > c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY > c. 4000 BBY :: Later, the Gungan tribes are united under Boss Gallo and commence the building of Otoh Gunga as their capital city. Meanwhile, the humans, calling themselves "the Naboo," split into warring factions; the Time of Suffering is begun.

Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Wars of the Old Republic (c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY) > c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY > c. 4000 BBY :: According to the Qel-Droma Epics, the Crusade of Krath occurs in which thousands of Jedi are felled by a new Sith Empire until the redemption of Ulic Qel-Droma .
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Wars of the Old Republic (c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY) > c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY > c. 4000 BBY :: According to the Qel-Droma Epics, Ossus is devastated by the Cron Supernovae , which were triggered by Naga Sadow.
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Wars of the Old Republic (c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY) > c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY :: c. 3966 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Wars of the Old Republic (c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY) > c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY > c. 3966 BBY :: By this point, galactic travelers navigate hyperspace using hyperspace sextants .
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Wars of the Old Republic (c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY) > c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY > c. 3966 BBY :: Sith accounts describing the kyber weaponry built by Darth Tanis within the Sith temple on Malachor are made.
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Wars of the Old Republic (c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY) > c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY > c. 3966 BBY > Sith accounts describing the kyber weaponry built by Darth Tanis within the Sith temple on Malachor are made. :: Eventually, a cataclysmic event at the Battle of Malachor, later known in legends as the " Great Scourge of Malachor ," occurs during the era of great conflict that began around 5000 BBY; Jedi Knights of the Old Republic era uncover the battle station and confront the Sith. All participants are petrified by the superweapon, including a witch who led the Sith forces, although an entity known as the Presence remained in a Sith holocron within the Malachor temple. Afterwards, Jedi are forbidden from traveling to Malachor, and data on the location is removed from the Jedi Archives .
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Wars of the Old Republic (c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY) > c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY > c. 3966 BBY > Sith accounts describing the kyber weaponry built by Darth Tanis within the Sith temple on Malachor are made. :: By the time of the Great Scourge, the crossguard lightsaber design has become common among Makashi practitioners.
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Wars of the Old Republic (c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY) > c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY :: 3705 BBY

Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Wars of the Old Republic (c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY) > c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY > 3705 BBY :: Freia Kallea establishes the hyperspace route known as the Hydian Way , combining multiple smaller routes to create a super-hyperroute , thereby providing traders and privateers with a path across the entire galaxy.
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Wars of the Old Republic (c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY) > c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY :: c. 3700 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Wars of the Old Republic (c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY) > c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY > c. 3700 BBY :: Ord Mantell becomes a trading post for spacers .

Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Wars of the Old Republic (c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY) > c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY > c. 3650 BBY :: The Chiss Ascendancy venture into the wider galaxy and get involved in the Sith Wars between the Galactic Republic and the Sith Empire. Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Wars of the Old Republic (c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY) > c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY > The fall of the Old Republic > By the time of the Sith's defeat (exact chronology undefined) :: Before the time of the Galactic Republic, the lushly forested planet Mustafar was inhabited by off-worlder Lady Corvax , who lived in harmony with the native Mustafarians along with her husband . The latter died as a result of an attack on Mustafar, leading to Corvax's theft of the most sacred Mustafarian relic, the Bright Star , in an attempt to use it in a ritual to resurrect her love. The ritual failed; instead, the Bright Star's energies pushed Mustafar into a new orbit , reducing the world to an unbalanced, chaotic state. A volcanic wasteland is created as tiny Mustafar is torn between gas giants Lefrani and Jestefad . Thus, Sith seeking the secrets of eternal life were attracted to the world.
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Wars of the Old Republic (c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY) > c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY > The fall of the Old Republic > By the time of the Sith's defeat (exact chronology undefined) :: Radaki had left the Jedi Order, believing that Jedi should retain their family ties and wealth. Thus he was seduced by the dark side of the force, becoming the Sith Lord Darth Krall.

Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Wars of the Old Republic (c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY) > Defeat of the Sith (1032 BBY) > 1032 BBY > The Jedi-Sith War ends with the Jedi Order and Republic forces victorious. :: By this point, Coruscant and the Jedi Temple are liberated by Jedi and Republic forces.

The Sith, who once numbered thousands, are driven into hiding and are eventually thought extinct.
Timeline of galactic history > The Old Republic (c. 25,025 – c. 1000 BBY) > Wars of the Old Republic (c. 5000 – c. 1000 BBY) > Defeat of the Sith (1032 BBY) > 1032 BBY :: The sole Sith survivor, Darth Bane, creates the Grand Plan —a plot to destroy the Jedi and the Republic from within for the coming of Sith rule over the galaxy —and establishes the Rule of Two , a lineage of Sith who would operate in the shadows, preserving the Sith's vendetta against the Jedi whilst preparing for their own return. Centuries before the Clone Wars, the Rule of Two is revealed to the Jedi Order, though still they presume the Sith's eradication and believe that Bane's plan is ruined with his defeat allegedly at the hands of his apprentice, Darth Zannah , in a duel on the Inner Rim planet Ambria . This pattern is repeated by nearly all Sith thereafter.

The Sith Wars saw the participation of the Jedi Order on the side of the Republic as well as the participation of the Chiss Ascendancy, which encountered multiple alien species before retreating to their borders. The Jedi Cervil the Uncanny had left behind testimonies about lightwhips being effective against the Sith's Forbidden Forms , and Ithorian population of Auratera continues restoring the world to its natural state following the Sith Wars.

He and his partner, noted crystallist Var-Whill , develop the Farkiller , and use it to kill a number of "emergent" despots. Within the decade , the Jedi Council pronounces them apostate and eventually purges them, with Oo'ob's expulsion taking place around 1000 BBY.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 1000 – c. 500 BBY > c. 520 BBY :: The Citadel Station is utilized to imprison the last known rogue Jedi of the Jedi Order.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 1000 – c. 500 BBY :: 519 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 1000 – c. 500 BBY > 519 BBY :: With the Kallidahin believing themselves to be descendants of the extinct Eellayin people, the Archaeological Research Council of Kallidah establishes a Research Base on one of the largest fragments of ancient Polis Massa , which was once home to the Eellayin and had suffered a planetary cataclysm long ago. Archaeologists begin to survey and excavate the entirety of the Polis Massa asteroid belt, seeking to discover more of their ancestors as well as other alien species with cloning skills learned from the Kaminoans .

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 1000 – c. 500 BBY > c. 509 BBY :: Yaddle is born.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) :: c. 482 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > c. 482 BBY :: Jedi Master Barnabas Vim and his Padawan Vix Fonnick undertake a mission to the world of Angcord , in search of the Force artifact known as the Echo Stone that has been a object of legend, capable of amplifying connections to the Force. They find the object in the possession of the native citizens, and after a small investigation, Master Vim detects that the Stone has been corrupted and amplified a dark side power within the Lady of Angcord . He is forced to order his apprentice to destroy the Stone, breaking the dark side hold over the planet. With the Echo Stone shattered into 3 pieces, Vim and Vix set out separately to hide the pieces of the powerful object.

Vildar barely survives the attack, and is taken as a Padawan by Larti.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > c. 397 BBY :: Sky Graf is born into the powerful Graf family .

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > c. 397 BBY :: During a storm and flood on Eiram, Phan-tu Zenn and his family are swept out to sea, with Phan-tu being the only survivor. Following this, the boy is found and adopted into the Eiram royal family by Queen Adrialla , who has been unable to have children with her wife, Queen Consort Odelia . As a result, Phan-tu becomes the heir to Eiram's throne.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) :: c. 396 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > c. 396 BBY :: Students of Reena University Axel Greylark , Leyli Romero , and Kozmo Sundrel IV sneak into a party for the Queen's Bloom Festival in Reena 's Gorag Tower , only to discover that it is being robbed by Elecia Zeveron's crew of thieves. As Romero is secretly in on it, the thieves are successful.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) :: c. 395 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > c. 395 BBY :: Senator Lexxir Greylark , his son Axel Greylark , and a Jedi Knight travel to the astronomical object Melida/Daan to release the leader of the Daan , who has been captured by the opposing Melida . When it comes time to extract the leader, the Melida set off an explosion, injuring Axel and trapping Lexxir beneath rubble. Although Axel tries to rescue his father, the Jedi Knight forces Axel to leave Lexxir behind to die in order to save the others from the Melida. As as result, Axel blames the Jedi for his father's death and comes to resent them.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) :: c. 394 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > c. 394 BBY :: Dass Leffbruk is born into hyperspace prospectors Spence Leffbruk and his mother , who dies shortly after in a shuttle accident.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > c. 393 BBY :: Jerid is born.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > c. 389 BBY :: Rooper Nitani becomes the Padawan of the Jedi Silandra Sho.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > 387 BBY :: The Forever War between Eiram and E'ronoh is reincited after the death of E'roni Prince Niko A'lbaran during a diplomatic mission to Eiram . As a result, the first battle of the Eiram and E'ronoh War is fought.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > 387 BBY :: Tey Sirrek , a Sephi member of the Guardians of the Whills stationed as a guard at the Temple of the Kyber , kills Anst Wozo , an Inleshat criminal wanted by the Namoi criminal syndicate, who exploited children of the streets of Jedha eventually causing their deaths. Sirrek leaves the Guardians for their inaction in dealing with Wozo and protecting the people of the Holy City.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) :: 385 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > 385 BBY :: Elecia Zeveron becomes the mother of the Path of the Open Hand .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) :: c. 384 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > c. 384 BBY :: Kevmo Zink becomes the Padawan of Jedi Master Zallah Macri .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) :: c. 383 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > c. 383 BBY :: The Great Hyperspace Rush occurs, making hyperspace travel safer.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) :: 382 BBY

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > 382 BBY :: By this point, it has been established on Jedha the Convocation of the Force , an advisory body and council designed to promote understanding between the various Force religions based on the desert moon. Religions with representatives on the Convocation include the Disciples of the Whills , the Fallanassi , the Lonto , the Matukai , the Jedi Order, the Church of the Force , and the Sorcerers of Tund.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > 382 BBY :: The Force artifact known as the Rod of Seasons is stolen from the Hynestian Royal Treasury on the planet Hynestia Prime by the Children of the Open Hand , a team within the Path of the Open Hand led by Yana Ro tasked with "liberating" such objects by Elecia Zeveron.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > 382 BBY :: In the aftermath of the robbery, the queen of Hynestia appeals to the Jedi Order for the retrieval of the artifact, and Jedi Master Zallah Macri and her Padawan, Kevmo Zink , are assigned to investigate the theft.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > 382 BBY :: The smuggler Radicaz Dobbs travels to the planet Sophros with prospectors Spence Leffbruk and Dass Leffbruk, where he retrieves the egg of a Shrikarai . While flying through the atmosphere of the planet, Spence and Dass' ship is damaged, and Dobbs agrees to help them off the planet for half the reward of discovering the planet. Instead, Sunshine strands them on the planet Gloam . He is later approached by Elecia Zeveron, and the egg ends in possession of the Path of the Open Hand.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > 382 BBY :: The Children of the Open Hand are ambushed by the Graf family 's forces on the planet Thelj while they attempt to steal an artifact called Jedi Tears from the Graf family compound on the planet. Yana Ro is the only member of the Children who survives.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > 382 BBY :: The Great Leveler hatches on Dalna instigated by Elecia Zeveron as Jedi Zallah Macri and Kevmo Zink burglarize the Path compound in search of the Rod of Seasons, and the Leveler petrifies both Jedi to death. The Leveler is hailed as a gift from the Force by the members of the cult, and Yana Ro learns to control it through the Rod of Seasons.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > 382 BBY :: Left vulnerable on Dalna, The Path of the Open Hand leaves the planet in the Gaze Electric , a starship the cult had been building for years. Alerted by Sunshine Dobbs, they travel to Jedha in search for the Rod of Daybreak , an artifact that can help them better control the Leveler, hidden in a vault in the Holy City controlled by the Jedi.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > 382 BBY :: Jedi Knight Azlin Rell begins investigating the deaths of Zallah Macri and Kevmo Zink, leading him to research Jedi Master Barnabas Vim and the Echo stones.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > 382 BBY :: Republic Pathfinder team Outer Rim Expedition Two-Five-Two , led by Jedi Master Rok Buran and including his Padawan Maliq , is sent to the planet Aubadas in response to a request for assistance from the Katikoot species, who face an energy crisis and need help setting up a new, sustainable power source after halting mining operations on Aubadas' twin planet , Gloam . Hearing legends of monsters in the mines of Gloam, the team decides to visit the planet to investigate. Their guide, Rillik , who is sick with the Miner's curse and seeks to secretly sell out the planet's resources to gain wealth for himself with what time he had left, betrays them and sets them up to be ambushed by the monsters, and only Master Buran survives. He sends away their communications droid EX-8C to seek help.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > 382 BBY :: Jedi Master Silandra Sho 's Pathfinder team travel to Gloam and rescue Buran. They also rescue Spence and Dass Leffbruk , who were stranded on Gloam by Sunshine Dobbs.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > 382 BBY :: A skirmish is fought in the Eiram system between forces of the warring planets Eiram and E'ronoh , sparked by a sabotage attempt carried out by members of the Path of the Open Hand against a starfighter they believed would be flown by E'roni princess Xiri A'lbaran during a mission to escort an ice hauler due to make a delivery to E'ronoh. However, A'lbaran had reassigned the Corellian devilfighter to Bly Tevin , a new recruit in E'ronoh's fleet , leading to his death after an attempt to stop the sabotaged ship from attacking the Eirami. Jedi Masters Char-Ryl-Roy and Creighton Sun alongside Jedi Knight Gella Nattai and Padawan Enya Keen arrive aboard the Alif -class Longbeam on a mission to deliver food and medical supplies in a Republic relief shipment to Eiram, and are caught up in the fight. Gella Nattai intervenes in the skirmish aboard her Alpha -class starfighter , hailing both Princess Xiri, Captain of E’ronoh’s Thylefire Squadron , and the Eirami General Nhivan Lao .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > 382 BBY :: The Chancellors of the Republic negotiate a peace between Eiram and E'ronoh during a summit aboard the Republic Longbeam Paxion , stationed between the two planets. The Jedi on the relief mission attend the summit, as does Chancellor Orlen Mollo himself. Chancellor Kyong Greylark sends her son Axel Greylark to represent her. During the summit, Prince Phan-tu Zenn of Eiram and Princess Xiri A'lbaran of E'ronoh agree to marry.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > 382 BBY :: After the summit, Jerrod Segaru , an E'ronoh military leader, is assassinated aboard the Paxion by Rev Ferrol , son of Viceroy Ferrol and member of the Children of E'ronoh , an extremist group that believe their planet should not make peace with Eiram.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > 382 BBY :: A funeral for Jerrod Segaru is held at The Rook , the capital city of the planet E'ronoh. The E'ronoh royal family , the members of the Jedi Order in the system, Chancellor Orlen Mollo, Axel Greylark, and the Eiram royal family are present, and the latter is attacked by members of the Children of E'ronoh during the procession, only surviving thanks to the action of the Jedi.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > 382 BBY :: Xiri Al'baran and Phan-tu Zenn begin a customary aid mission on E'ronoh, joined by Nattai and Greylark.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > 382 BBY :: The Children of E'ronoh attack E'ronoh's mining village of U'ronoh in an attempt to frame the Eirami, and kill two of its inhabitants before being stopped by Gella Nattai and Axel Greylark.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > 382 BBY :: As a secret operative of the Path of the Open Hand, Axel Greylark kills Abda , a Path agent who was captured by the Jedi and E'roni, and attempts to frame E'roni Viceroy Ferrol for it. He takes over Abda's mission of retrieving an Eirami poison for the Path, successfully doing so with the help of Phan-tu Zenn. After Viceroy Ferrol confronts Axel about his actions, Axel kills him, but he is caught in the act and flees.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > 382 BBY :: The Wedding of Phan-tu Zenn and Xiri A'lbaran , the heirs of Eiram and E'ronoh respectively, is held in a two-part ceremony; first at The Rook on the planet E'ronoh, and then in Erasmus Capital City of the planet Eiram.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > 382 BBY > The Wedding of Phan-tu Zenn and Xiri A'lbaran , the heirs of Eiram and E'ronoh respectively, is held in a two-part ceremony; first at The Rook on the planet E'ronoh, and then in Erasmus Capital City of the planet Eiram. :: Several bounty hunters and mercenaries attack the wedding hoping to claim a bounty on Axel Greylark, and Creighton Sun leads a force of multiple Jedi in a defense. They are able to repel the bounty hunters, but Jedi Knight Laan is killed in the fight.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > 382 BBY > The Wedding of Phan-tu Zenn and Xiri A'lbaran , the heirs of Eiram and E'ronoh respectively, is held in a two-part ceremony; first at The Rook on the planet E'ronoh, and then in Erasmus Capital City of the planet Eiram. :: Concurrently, the Children of E'ronoh attack those gathered for the wedding in the hopes of taking over E'ronoh, but they are thwarted and their leader, Rev Ferrol crashes his ship into the sea.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > 382 BBY > The Wedding of Phan-tu Zenn and Xiri A'lbaran , the heirs of Eiram and E'ronoh respectively, is held in a two-part ceremony; first at The Rook on the planet E'ronoh, and then in Erasmus Capital City of the planet Eiram. :: After deciding that the poison is too awful to deliver to the Mother, Axel Greylark begins a plot to destroy Eiram's capital city but is talked down by Gella Nattai and taken into custody.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > 382 BBY :: Jedi Masters Porter Engle and Barash Silvain undertake a mission to the planet Gansevor to intervene in a conflict between the city-states of Bethune and Firevale . Bethune army , led by Field Marshal Tozen , and supported by the mercenary army of General Abediah Viess , sieges Firevale hoping to claim for Bethune the only deposits of Baudraxite , a mineral crucial to the energy infrastrucure of the planet. Eventually, General Viess decides to betray Tozen, killing him and several other of his staff to be able to destroy and plunder the whole city by themselves. Through the united effort of the Jedi Masters, Sicatra , the heir to the bethunian throne , and Bethune's army, the mercenaries are repelled and forced off-world. Silvain blames herself for the losses at the battle, and vows to distance herself from the rest of the Jedi Order, including her brother, Engle.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > 382 BBY :: Engle later breaks the siege of Bardotta , earning the nickname "Blade of Bardotta."

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > 382 BBY :: A summit is held at the Second Spire in the Holy City on Jedha for a peace treaty to be signed to officially end the war between Eiram and E'ronoh, with Ambassador Lian Cerox as the Eiram representive, Ambassador Tintak as the E'ronoh representive, and Morton San Tekka and Tilson Graf as mediators. The summit is bombed resulting in the deaths of Ambassador Tintak and Morton San Tekka, and dozens wounded. The treaty between Eiram and E'ronoh is postponed indefinitely, which leads to the resumption of hostilies between the two planets.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > 382 BBY > The Battle of Jedha occurs. :: The riot reaches the location of the Eiram-E'ronoh peace summit, which along with attacks from members of the Brotherhood of the Ninth Door at the behest of the Path of the Open Hand, turns both planets against each other, both beginning to attack the other and unleashing an all-out battle.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > 382 BBY > The Battle of Jedha occurs. :: Rioters bring down the massive Final Protector Jedi statue.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > 382 BBY > The Battle of Jedha occurs. :: The Herald and the Children of the Open Hand use the battle as a distraction to attempt to steal the Rod of Daybreak from a vault hidden beneath the Final Protector, but they are foiled by Vildar Mac and Tey Sirrek.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > 382 BBY > The Battle of Jedha occurs. :: After Jedi reinforcements arrive Jedi Master Creighton Sun talks the E'roni and the Eirami down.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > 382 BBY :: The Path of the Open Hand retreats to Dalna. Some of its members, led by Radicaz Dobbs, undertake a mission to Planet X to retrieve eggs of the Nameless species. One of their three starships is destroyed by the planet 's Veil , while one crash lands. One member of the team, a Force-sensitive Setaran tracker called Calar , foresees their actions will have grave consequences for the galaxy and the Force itself and tries to sacrifice their ship, but is shot by Dobbs before he can reach the controls. After retrieving many of the eggs, Path member Bokana Koss experiences a Force vision matching Calar's, claiming that massive beings called the Under-Dwellers want the Path to escape Planet X so as to begin a blight upon the galaxy. The group is attacked by an Under-Dweller, knocking Koss out of the vision, but is subdued by the protector , another massive creature. However, the protector then attacks the group, and Koss sacrifices to take down the protector and allow the Path members to escape on the Silverstreak , a ship that had previously crash-landed on the planet.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > 382 BBY :: The Klytobacter incident occurs, orchestrated by the Path of the Open Hand, helping spur tensions between Eiram and E'ronoh.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > 382 BBY :: The turf war with the Dank Graks ends with the Dank Grak's defeat following the Rescue of Maz Kanata on Takodana.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > 382 BBY :: The Hyperspace Chase , a contest to route Hyperspace lanes sponsored by the San Tekka and Graf prospecting families, occurs. Sky Graf attempts to use it as an excuse to find Planet X with the help of Jedi Padawan Rooper Nitani and Dass Leffbruk, but eventually gives up their quest.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > 382 BBY :: In the aftermath of the Battle of Jedha, several different missions of Jedi traveling to Dalna to investigate the Path of the Open Hand and their involvement occur, including a diplomatic mission and one undertaken by Creighton Sun and Jedi Aida Forte . The Path, under the leadership of Marda Ro , found the Path of the Closed Fist and use the Jedi's arrival as an excuse to attack the investigators.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > 382 BBY :: The Republic Pathfinder ship Witherbloom , housing Jedi Masters Rok Buran and Sula Badani and Badani's Padawan Coron Solstus , crashes into an Path of the Open Hand ship containing Nameless eggs. The Jedi and Republic members face members of the Path of the Closed Fist and the Nameless in the crash site. Budani is killed, and Buran takes Solstus as his Padawan.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > 382 BBY :: The battle known as the Night of Sorrow occurs when the Path attack the Jedi on Dalna.

Having resigned as Chancellor to prevent the Path from using her and her son against the Republic, Kyong Greylark arrives on Dalna with reinforcements and fights alongside her son. Greylark and Nattai take down a path leader named Binnot Ullo .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > 382 BBY > The battle known as the Night of Sorrow occurs when the Path attack the Jedi on Dalna. :: Phan-tu Zenn and Xiri A'lbaran rally the forces of Eiram and E'ronoh to work together to help the Jedi on Dalna.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Age of Exploration (c. 500 – 330 BBY) > 382 BBY :: After encountering the Nameless several times and being driven mad during the Night of Sorrow, Jedi Azlin Rell is placed and asylum as his former Master Arkoff tries to help him. Rell is sought after and attacked by Path member Vol Garat , who wants Rell's notes on the Nameless, but Arkoff and Rell stop Garat. After Rell goes missing, Arkoff hides his journal on the planet Banchii . Rell then falls to the dark side after devoting his life to studying the Nameless.

The natives' labor serves to pay their rent, and the planet becomes known for its mining activities.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > c. 330 BBY – 233 BBY > c. 318 BBY :: The modern Chiss Syndicure is formed, the supreme ruling body of the Chiss Ascendancy , composed of the Nine Ruling Families. The Syndicure has both executive and legislative authority over the Ascendancy and serves as collective head of state of the Chiss. The political body called the Aristocra is a part of the Syndicure, which includes representation from the Forty Great Families. Its fundation marks the ending of an era where armed conflicts between rival Chiss families was common.

Her father, Yudiah Dee , rules the planet as Keeper .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > c. 330 BBY – 233 BBY :: Between 272 BBY and 255 BBY

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > c. 330 BBY – 233 BBY > Between 272 BBY and 255 BBY :: Aaloth has been in a state of famine for several seasons, causing the hungry populace to lead demonstrations and riots against the ruling family. Yudiah Dee opposes developing Aaloth's economy around spice mining, but Lourna Dee believes it necessary to feed and control the populace. Lourna's boyfriend, Bala Waleen , a spicerunner in league with the Zygerrian Alliance , induces Lourna to support a coup d'état to depose her father, promising he would install Lourna in her father's place. Lourna unlocks the doors of the First family's palace to rioters in league with the Palace Guard , who storm the place led by Waleen. He then orders the guards to execute Lourna's family and takes the title of Keeper. Waleen drugs Lourna with glitterstim and sells her as a slave to the Zygerrian enslaver Lady Vardem Kroleyic .

Fillithar Jedi Master Simmix is killed in a ship crash, leaving his Padawan, Cohmac Vitus , conflicted over the Jedi ways of non-attachment. Vitus nevertheless resolved the crisis alongside Master Laret Soveral and her Padawan, the Umbaran Orla Jareni .

She takes advantage of the Jedi attack to incite a rebellion among her fellow enslaved individuals. Master Rancisis later recognized and commended Dee for leading the revolt, and by his suggestion she joins the Carida military academy .
