Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: By this point, the droid revolutionary Ajax Sigma has led a droid uprising on Kligson's Moon , where the entire population of the moon was wiped out, including thousands at the hands of Sigma himself. Eventually the Jedi stopped Ajax Sigma's army , with the Jedi Master Loden Greatstorm strucking down the droid leader.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: The Coruscant-based Republic Chancellor Lina Soh envisions a galaxy of Great Works that ranged from infrastructure to culture in an effort to expand the Republic's reaches, better connect the peoples of the galaxy, and bring inspiration and peace for all citizens. Efforts are made to negotiate a new peace treaty between the Quarren and the Mon Calamari , as well as to mass-produce bacta —a "miracle" substance primarily made from a barley originally cultivated on Thyferra that was intended to replace juvan —in the hopes of revolutionizing medicine.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: As part of Chancellor Soh's pledge to maintain the Republic's hold on the hard-to-navigate Outer Rim, outreach programs are established in the Rim.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: In the Galactic Frontier , the Jedi maintain order and justice at independently operated outposts, working closely with the Republic without direct assistance from the Coruscant Jedi Temple.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY > In the Galactic Frontier , the Jedi maintain order and justice at independently operated outposts, working closely with the Republic without direct assistance from the Coruscant Jedi Temple. :: The Starlight Beacon space station is constructed as part of the series of outreach programs, featuring a Jedi temple designed by Palo Hidalla and located in the center of the Rim's dark zones to guide travelers and boost the region's transmission times, intended to be the first Beacon of a new galactic communications relay network.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY > In the Galactic Frontier , the Jedi maintain order and justice at independently operated outposts, working closely with the Republic without direct assistance from the Coruscant Jedi Temple. :: A conclave between the Jedi Order and the Republic involving Jedi Master Avar Kriss and Admiral Pevel Kronara of the Republic Defense Coalition is held at Starlight Beacon.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: The strain from the Jedi mission to Zeitooine leads Dez Rydan to request a transfer to the Starlight Beacon.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: Marchion Ro instigates the Great Hyperspace Disaster as leader of the Nihil raiders, based in his No-Space territory. He allows the Nihil to use special hyperspace Paths , which he controls by keeping the hyperspace navigator Mari San Tekka captive.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY > Marchion Ro instigates the Great Hyperspace Disaster as leader of the Nihil raiders, based in his No-Space territory. He allows the Nihil to use special hyperspace Paths , which he controls by keeping the hyperspace navigator Mari San Tekka captive. :: In hyperspace, the Legacy Run , a Kaniff Yards Class A modular freight transport of the Byne Guild , encounters a Nihil ship and is destroyed. The Byne Guild's Kezarat Convoy disappears on the same day. Starships across the galaxy are abruptly knocked out of hyperspace by missiles of debris from the Legacy Run , which also threaten to destroy space stations, moons, as well as planets. The Republic turns to the Jedi for help in saving lives and ending the crisis, and Jedi activity sees a significant increase.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY > Marchion Ro instigates the Great Hyperspace Disaster as leader of the Nihil raiders, based in his No-Space territory. He allows the Nihil to use special hyperspace Paths , which he controls by keeping the hyperspace navigator Mari San Tekka captive. :: Due to being delayed at the Starlight Beacon, Master Avar Kriss and Admiral Pevel Kronara become the first to respond to the disaster in the nearby Hetzal system , coordinating efforts to save citizens from aboard the Third Horizon .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: Vernestra Rwoh, having been the Padawan of Stellan Gios , is made a Jedi Knight at the age of sixteen, becoming one of the youngest Knights of the Jedi Order in a generation.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: The Jedi Wayseeker Orla Jareni, Jedi Knight Dez Rydan , Jedi Padawan Reath Silas, and Jedi Master Cohmac Vitus, as well as the cargo ship Vessel ' s Captain Leox Gyasi , co-pilot Affie Hollow , and the navigator Geode are ripped out of hyperspace as a result of the Great Disaster. They take refuge in a seemingly abandoned Amaxine Station .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: Aboard the Amaxine Station, The Jedi passengers of the Vessel are disturbed by dark visions . Believing that a set of four binding statues contained the dark side influence, the Jedi take away the Force artifact for purification in the Sith shrine located beneath the Coruscant Jedi Temple. However, they are proven wrong, and realize that the statues had contained something else.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: Even though the combined efforts of the Republic and the Jedi Order managed to prevent a majority of the damage at Hetzal, further fragments of the wreckage of the Legacy Run continue to emerge from hyperspace in a series of Emergences , that threaten star systems across the galaxy.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: In the First Emergence , seven pieces of the Legacy Run emerge in the Ab Dalis system . While six of them pass through the system harmlessly, the seventh strickes a glancing blow to Ab Dalis , destroying a city on the planet and killing approximately twenty million people. The devastation leads Larence Garello of Garello Technologies to evacuate his employees and research from the planet. However, the evacuation convoy is attack by the Nihil before they can make it out of the system.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: One of the Emergences strickes the planet Trymant IV . The threat is reported by Republic Security Zone Monitoring Satellite 777B-Alpha , in the orbit of the planet. The only Jedi Order or Republic starship within range is the Padawan Academic Cruiser Star Hopper , which immediately diverts to assist. At the same time, the Nihil take advantage of the situation to evacuate select individuals from Bralanak City , including members of the Elders of the Path , before launching an attack . Force-sensitive resident of the planet Zeen Mrala joins Lula Talisola 's group of Jedi Padawans in defending Bralanak City. The group of Padawans confront the pirates and use their Spider Cruiser to evacuate civilians, and Marchion Ro orders the Nihil to execute the Padawans. They are saved by Jedi Masters Yoda and Torban Buck , and while Buck and the Padawans battle in the city streets, Yoda board the Spider Cruiser in an attempt to rescue Mrala's friend Krix Kamerat , who had been hustled onboard. However, Kamerat, upset over the revelation that Mrala had lied to him about her Force-sensitivity, refuse to leave. A Galactic Republic rescue fleet arrives to assist and set up a blockade, but the Nihil ship is able to escape to hyperspace after Ro has a medical frigate fired upon as a distraction.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: The San Tekka clan , having risen from a family of hyperspace prospectors in the outer reaches of the galaxy to a dynasty privy to leading technology that allows Chancellor Soh's Republic to continue expanding safely to new areas about a century ago, operates alongside the galactic government as it responds to the Great Disaster.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: After the 40th Emergence shoots out from hyperspace the portion of the Legacy Run bridge containing its black box, the Jedi and Republic, hoping to retrieve the flight recorder, clash with the Nihil Lourna Dee and her tempest , who are attempting to destroy it. Eventually, the Republic retrieves the Legacy Run flight recorder, but Jedi Knight Te'Ami is killed aboard her Vector, and Republic pilots Marcus Augur and Beth Petters are also lost.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: The tragic poet Omar Berenko is reputed for residing at the Varykino artists' retreat on Naboo. Centuries before the year 22 BBY, the controversial Berenko was kidnapped from a scenic balcony overlooking the lakes after penning the disturbing and visionary epic poem titled Defense of Naboo in the Room of Morning Mists .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: The Jedi High Council convenes to discuss the threat of the Nihil, and after a contested debate between Grandmaster Xo Lahru and Jedi Masters such as Yarael Poof , Rana Kant , Oppo Rancisis , Keaton Murag , Ada-Li Carro , and the stand-in of Grandmaster Yoda—who was on sabbatical from Council affairs— Ephru Shinn , approves a joint effort between the Jedi and the Republic in a mission against the Nihil as proposed by Chancellor Soh.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: The Nihil conduct a raid on Elphrona , capturing Jedi Master Loden Greatstorm and farmer Ottoh Blythe . Marchion Ro executes the farmer but keeps Geatstorm for future plans. Porter Engle returns to active Jedi service.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: Attack on Tanalorr .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: The Battle of Kur occurs. Marchion Ro sends Kassav's Tempest to death in the Kur Nebula , intending to trick the Jedi and the Republic that they had destroyed the Nihil. The Trandoshan Jedi Master Sskeer loses his left arm and blames himself for the death of Master Jora Malli .

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: While restoring the statues aboard the Amaxine Station, the Jedi are attacked by the Nihil. To defend themselves against overwhelming forces, the Jedi are forced to destroy the statues to unleash what it contained. A group of Drengir , who were put into stasis by the Sith through the binding statues long ago, are thus awakened from their slumber. While the Vessel ' s crew escape amidst the chaos, several Drengir are released into open space in the process.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: Vernestra Rwoh is stranded on the jungle moon Wevo with several other individuals, including Avon Starros of the Starros Clan and Padawan Imri Cantaros , when their transport ship, the Steady Wing , is sabotaged by the Nihil.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: Rwoh and the others fight Nihil that follow them to Wevo. Rwoh prevents Cantaros from falling to the dark side and takes him as her Padawan.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: The medical substance kolto is in common use at this point.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: Jedi Grandmasters Pra-Tre Veter and Yoda join other Jedi and Republic personnel, amongst them Chancellor Lina Soh, the newly minted Jedi Knight Keeve Trennis , and the newly appointed marshal of the Starlight Beacon, Avar Kriss, aboard the latter station in its dedication ceremony for light and life.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: Sskeer hides a devastating secret that was tearing him apart, drawing a private emotional outburst from him soon after Starlight's dedication.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: Surik , which formed a part of a phrase used by the Jedi Sskeer, existed by this point.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: Jedi Padawan Wes Vinik joins the other Jedi at the Jedi temple on Tenoo. Soon after, he and the Jedi younglings from the planet help stop the Ganguls pirate gang from stealing starships on Deppani .

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: Kai Brightstar helps retrieve a runaway fellow Jedi youngling named Bren from the clutches of pirates at Yarrum Tower .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: Jedi younglings Kai Brightstar, Lys Solay, and Nubs help settle a conflict between Mayor Brooks and rustlers on a desert world .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: Jedi younglings Kai Brightstar, Lys Solay, and Nubs stop pirate Taborr Val-Dorn from kidnapping a gangul creature on Tenoo.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: A grand opening event is held for a library on Hazun .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: Nubs discovers the lightsaber of the ancient Pooba Jedi Master Barabo , in an old Jedi temple in a hidden room behind a wall sculpture depicting Barabo saving the town from a chirodactyl . Yoda and Nubs take the lightsaber to the Jedi Temple on Coruscant.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: Padawan Wes Vinik is kidnapped by the Ganguls pirate gang but is rescued by Jedi younglings.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: Jedi younglings Kai Brightstar, Lys Solay, and Nubs join Nash Durango to search for Kaliah Kublop's staff . They ultimately find on the abandonded ship Terror of Tenoo in the possession of the long-lost droid pirate Blackbolt , who they inadvertently reactivate and release into the galaxy.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: Cyrus Vuundir balances and switches between his identity as Prince of Vuundalla and the pirate Taborr Val Dorn to help his Jedi youngling friends stop the Comet Runners pirate group from stealing fathiers on Vuundalla.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: The band Feb Rozo and the Sap Tap Trio are kidnapped on Tenoo by the Ganguls for the crime lord Bulcha the Hutt. Padawan Wes Vinik, alongside his Jedi friends and Tenoo local Hap successfully rescue them from Bulcha on Yarrum .

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: A party is held on Ootoo Prime . Prince Cyrus Vuundir nearly accidentally ruins it, but Jedi younglings stop armored amberflys from attacking.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: The Andraven Ancestors Circuit is held on the planet Andraven , where kids of the Andraven species complete challenges to honor their ancestors who settled the world.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: Dunkutu Day is once again held on Omaka, and resident Fiorna and Jedi youngling Nubs search for gomgourds .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: Life Day celebrations are held on the planet Kashyyyk, and Jedi younglings stop the Gangul pirates from ruining them.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: Jedi younglings Kai Brightstar and Djovi Resmia locate Tanglevine Base on Tenoo, and stop droid pirate Blackbolt from raiding it.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: A skirmish occurs at Docking Bay 7 on the planet Batuu after Jedi youngling Lys Solay's lightsaber is stolen.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: The Ganguls pirate group successfully take over Yarrum Tower on Yarrum, but the Tenno Jedi younglings rescue Chigg from it with the reluctant help of pirate Taborr Val-Dorn.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: The Ganguls and Comet Runners team up to perform a raid on the planet Vuundalla for the Vuundir family jewels. They are successful, and Vuundallan prince Cyrus Vuundir's identity as the pirate Taborr Val-Dorn is exposed to his Jedi youngling friends trying to help.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: Jedi younglings stop the Comet Runners pirate group from stealing coaxium from Zephyr .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: Raxlo , anlongside Jedi younglings, stop the Ganguls pirate group from stealing his harvester on Andraven .

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: Padawan Wes Vinik and youngling Kai Brightstar help the Besalisk Braygh search for B3-C4 , a water scout droid she built to find underground water on Kundu Minor .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: The Tenoo Grand Tour , a monopod race , is held on the planet Tenoo. The first introduction of the sport on Tenoo, the race is organized by the Monopod Circuit , and consists of five monopod teams, four of which are a sentient being paired with an engineering droid . The fifth team consists of the Pantoran Wiston Freng and the human Nash Durango , who fills in for Freng's missing engineering droid JK-46 . Freng and Durango win the race.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: Bulcha the Hutt attempts to invade the Jedi temple on Tenoo to take it for himself while the older Jedi are away, but the young Jedi thwart him anyway.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: Jedi youngling Lys Solay and her friends stop K-2PL , a droid serving the Moldwarp thief and collector Draiven Bosh , from stealing a firehawk on Tenoo.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: Jedi younglings Nubs and Lys Solay help the Pooba Zeepohz and the droid NP-87 deliver a cargo pod to Kuplop Springs on Tenoo.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: Jedi younglings Kai Brightstar, Lys Solay, and Nubs locate a Tazi sloth at the Tenoo Jedi temple.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: Jedi younglings led by Kai Brightstar, alerted by a Twi'lek and a human workers of a starship factory on the planet Deppani , stop the pirate Taborr Val-Dorn from stealing from the factory a thrust accelerator to complete the upgrades to his ship, the Iron Talon .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: The scrapper Eren Kitt and their droid M1-M1 team up with Jedi younglings Kai Brightstar, Lys Solay, and Nubs on Bracca to rescue pikpik in the Bracca Badlands from Nihil Jaay and Fleever , who plan to use them to find a navicomputer.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: Jedi younglings Lys Solay and Zotti search for missing dunnels on Tenoo.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: Jedi younglings Kai Brightstar and Nubs are assigned a mission to search for Seba's journal at the same time Lys Solay and Nash Durango are assigned to help the individual Roon retrieve missing banthas, however, their destination coordinates get mixed up and they end up completing each other's missions.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: The Nihil set a diversionary trap in the Bright Jewel system leading to a battle between them and the Jedi that the Jedi easily win.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: The Battle on Quantxi is fought on the junk moon Quantxi between members of the Jedi Order and their allies, and the Nihil. Zeen Mrala had come to the moon in search of her former friend Krix Kamerat , taken by the pirates during their attack on Trymant IV . When Padawans Lula Talisola , Farzala Tarabal and Qort follow Mrala to Quantxi, they find the Nihil attempting to massacre the local Junk Mavens , and Tarabal and Qort stop to help while Talisola follows Mrala. Jedi Masters Yoda, Torban Buck and Kantam Sy , who had just fought a space battle against more Nihil forces, follow the Padawans to the moon and assist in the fight. With the pirates antagonizing the Junk Mavens defeated by the Mavens, the Padawans, and a Mantellian Savrip allied with them, Talisola, Mrala, Sy and Buck attempt to prevent Kamerat from escaping with Marchion Ro , but the Spider Cruiser Squall Spider is able to assist in the pirates' escape.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: Yoda and Tromak of the Elders of the Path embark on a mission to Vrant Tarnum to retrieve the artifact hidden there before the Nihil can, but they are shot down and Marchion Ro retrieves the artifact anyway.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: Jedi Initiates Kai Brightstar, Lys Solay, and Nubs, alongside pilot Nash Durango, rescue Yoda from Vrant Tarnum. However, he disappears afterward.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: Explorer droid OG-LC performs an excavation of a raka fossil on Tenoo and thwarts businessman Ozon Nimbee 's attempt to take over the land.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: Kai Brightstar, Lys Solay, and Nubs help droid MB-4 find his owner Freet Chaddio and return to him.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: The Battle of Tenoo is fought between the Jedi Order and an alliance of pirates led by the Ganguls . Seeking to drive the Jedi out from the Bri'ahl sector , the Ganguls' leader Sellaccc Orryak leads an attack on the Tenoo Jedi Temple . Despite capturing the temple, she meets resistance from the Jedi trainees led by Padawan Wes Vinik and youngling Kai Brightstar. With the help of several allies including Ace Kallisto , Raxlo , the Durangos and Taborr's gang , the Jedi are able to defeat the Ganguls and defend the Tenoo Jedi temple.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: By this point, the Hutt Clan is sanctioned from trading openly in Republic space.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY :: Drengir crisis
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY > Drengir crisis :: The Drengir abduct children on Sedri Minor.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY > Drengir crisis :: Mission to Sedri Minor
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY > Drengir crisis > Mission to Sedri Minor :: The Nihil attack a Hutt Clan ship in the recently–Republic-aligned Kazlin system , prompting the Jedi Sskeer, Keeve Trennis, and the Kotabi bond-twins Terec and Ceret to investigate the resulting wreckage. Tracing the Hutt craft's origin to the Sedri system , Sskeer and Ceret take a T-1 shuttle to Sedri Minor. Avar Kriss and Vernestra Rwoh take the Ataraxia to join Trennis aboard the Hutt craft.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY > Drengir crisis > Mission to Sedri Minor :: On Sedri Minor, Ceret is captured by the Drengir, and Kriss, Terec, Trennis—traveling aboard the Ataraxia —join Sskeer on the moon. Ceret yields to the powerful shadow cast by the Drengir and joins their collective mind. Sharing the same mind with Ceret, Terec also succumbs to the Drengir's influence and becomes crazed. While Kriss and Trennis confront the Drengir at their underground dwelling, Sskeer dispairs that he could not help Terec, who was uncontrollable and inconsolable.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY > Drengir crisis > Mission to Sedri Minor :: While Avar Kriss and Keeve Trennis free Ceret as well as a local boy from the Drengir, they are surrounded by more Drengir, who are accompanied by Sskeer. Sskeer had had his mind joined with the Drengir's collective consciousness, and had grown a botanical, plant-like left arm. Sskeer captures Kriss' crew, and the secret history of the Drengir is revealed.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY > Drengir crisis > Mission to Sedri Minor :: The Hutt Cartel , led by Myarga Anjiliac Atirue , arrive on Sedri Minor attempting to claim it. After a misunderstanding initially pits the Hutts and Jedi against each other, the Hutts agree to ally with the Jedi against the Drengir.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY > Drengir crisis > Mission to Sedri Minor :: Keeve Trennis uses a Mind trick on a Drengir-connected Sskeer to get the Drengir to retreat.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY > Drengir crisis :: Starlight Beacon is attacked by the Drengir, as a result of the Jedi Order bringing aboard the corpse of a Hutt trader whose starship had been attacked by the Nihil after departing the planet Sedri Minor with a cargo of Vratixian barley . The Hutt's system had been infected by the Drengir, who burst from the corpse while the Jedi were performing an autopsy. Jedi Master Estala Maru and Jedi Knight Vernestra Rwoh proceed to fend off the Drengir as Maru attempts to contact Marshal Avar Kriss for assistance; Kriss, however, is occupied with events on Sedri Minorr. The Drengir retreat after Trennis's mind trick.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 232 BBY > Drengir crisis :: The Hutt world of Nal Hutta , including its capital Bilbousa , is attacked by the Drengir, transforming its metropolises into jungles and swamps.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) :: 231 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 231 BBY :: Drengir crisis continues
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 231 BBY > Drengir crisis continues :: The Drengir spread throughout the Outer Rim, partially due to being seeded by the Nihil. The Hutts and the Jedi work together to combat them.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 231 BBY > Drengir crisis continues :: As a consequence of Menir 's bitterness and unwillingness to accept any change, the Drengir plague the village Skirl on the planet Batuu.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 231 BBY > Drengir crisis continues :: The Drengir slaughter many on Daivak , but the Jedi and Hutts fight against them.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 231 BBY > Drengir crisis continues :: Keeve Trennis utilizes Sskeer's connection to the Drengir to learn that their homeworld and hiding place of their Great Progenitor is Mulita .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 231 BBY > Drengir crisis continues :: The Drengir attack Nal Hutta's capital of Bilbousa . Jabba the Hutt attempts to use the event and the concurrent arrival of the Jedi for negotiations to thwart the alliance between the Hutts and the Jedi, but is thwarted.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 231 BBY > Drengir crisis continues :: Mercenary Ty Yorrick is hired by farmers of the planet Safrifa to defeat a member of the Drengir that had destroyed their crops and killed many of their children. She slices the beast to pieces with her lightsaber , before lighting the remaining strips of Drengir on fire so that it can't regrow and return.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 231 BBY :: The Nihil Tempest Runner Zeetar attempts to raid the Halcyon cruiser, in order to gain information from the passengers onboard. Jedi Knight Nib Assek and her Padawan Burryaga Agaburry are able to repeal the attack with the help of the late arrival of Jedi Master Stellan Gios and several Jedi Vectors.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 231 BBY :: While avoiding joining the fight against the Drengir on Mulita, Keeve Trennis joins Orla Jareni to fight the Nihil on Chortose .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 231 BBY :: Marchion Ro acquires the Great Leveler , a powerful Nameless creature that specifically targeted Jedi.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 231 BBY :: The Nihil raid the Cyclor Shipyards above the planet Cyclor . Sarn Starbreaker , a Cloud of Pan Eyta 's Tempest , wanted to make a strike against the Republic by destroying the Innovator , an Elite -class vessel being built at the shipyards to be a showpiece of the upcoming Valo Republic Fair. The Cyclorrian workers, alongside Jedi Knight Indeera Stokes and her Padawan Bell Zettifar , fight back against the attackers. After the Cyclorrians manage to get a signal for help past the Nihil's scrambler droids , a drift of Jedi Vectors led by Jedi Master Porter Engle arrive from Derra IV to reinforce them. Ultimately, Zettifar is able to destroy Sarn Starbreaker's Cloudship despite having been shot in the gut with a harpoon, killing the Cloud amidst the defeat of all his forces.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 231 BBY :: The Valo Republic Fair is held on Valo by Supreme Chancellor Soh to show how the galaxy had recovered from the Great Hyperspace Disaster. However, the Valo Atrocity occurs, in which the Nihil attack, and having distracted the Jedi with the Drengir, devastate the planet and kill hundreds of thousands.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 231 BBY :: Drengir crisis, continued

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 231 BBY > Drengir crisis, continued :: As part of the Nihil's attack on Valo, the Drengir are sent to attack Crashpoint Tower.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 231 BBY > Drengir crisis, continued :: The Drengir attack a farming settlement on the planet Banchii , after sprouting from a container of seeds transported to the planet by the farmer Kooba . They are able to kill several farmers, incuding Kooba himself, before being stopped by members of the Jedi Order under the command of Jedi Master Arkoff and Jedi Knight Lily Tora-Asi .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 231 BBY > Drengir crisis, continued :: At the Battle on Mulita , the Jedi Order and the Hutt Clan, led by Jedi Master Avar Kriss, assault the planet Mulita , homeworld of the Drengir. The location of the Great Progenitor , the first of the Drengir, had previously been learned by Keeve Trennis through a link to the Drengir in the Force. Kriss subsequently summoned as many Jedi as possible, helped by Master Estala Maru on Starlight Beacon. The Jedi defeat the Drengir and capture the Great Progenitor, ending the Drengir crisis.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 231 BBY :: After the Valo Atrocity, where the Tempest Runner Pan Eyta left his fellow Tempest Runner Lourna Dee for dead when Republic reinforcements arrived, she returns to the Nihil base on Grizal , where she witness Eyta be poisoned by Marchion Ro for challenging his authority and for his previous failures. Dee saves Eyta with an injection of cypanid , a substance from Ryloth that does not cure him but instead prolonges his agony, and she convinces him to launch a second attack on the Republic. Eavesdropping on a communication from Senator Tia Toon to the Cyclor Shipyards , Eyta learns the Jedi Order is withdrawing its forces to Hetzal Prime and Starlight Beacon , and so chooses to attack the shipyards, only for him to find an entire battle fleet waiting for his cruiser, the Elegencia , when it arrives, leading to the Second Battle of Cyclor . The Republic had recently discovered that the Nihil were tapping into their communications and laid a false trail to ambush the Nihil forces, and Dee had also gone behind Eyta's back and convinced the majority of his Tempest to abandon him as he had done to them on Valo. Upon realizing that he was betrayed, the severely-ill Eyta flees the Elegencia in a secret escape pod and leaves the rest of his forces to be wiped out by the Republic.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 231 BBY :: The Battle of Grizal is fought in the aftermath of the attack on Valo when the Jedi attack the Nihil base on the planet Grizal . The Jedi were able to locate the base after allowing the pirate Quin Amarant to escape Valo in a shuttle aboard which Jedi Knight Indeera Stokes and her Padawan Bell Zettifar were hiding, allowing the two to activate a homing beacon upon their arrival on the planet. Once the signal is received, Jedi Master Stellan Gios and his Red Group depart the ongoing skirmish at Cyclor, arriving at Grizal and assaulting the base. During the attack, Zettifar is briefly reunited with his thought-dead Master, Loden Greatstorm , who had been a prisoner of the Nihil. However, Marchion Ro unleashes the Great Leveler against the Jedi, killing Greatstorm and traumatizing Zettifar. In the aftermath, the Jedi assume that the Tempest Runner Lourna Dee , who escapes the battle, is the true leader of the Nihil.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 231 BBY :: In the aftermath of the Battle of Grizal, Stellan Gios sends Jedi Master Emerick Caphtor to investigate the mysterious death of Loden Greatstorm. Caphtor travels to the moon of Vrant Tarnum and attacks a Nihil base there with a unit of Galactic Republic troopers . Most of the pirates stationed at the base flee upon the Republic group's approach, with Caphtor and his soldiers fighting those Nihil who had not managed to escape, taking as many as they can alive as prisoners. Upon inspecting the Kharvashark ruins where the Nihil were stationed with his droid, Q-2 , Caphtor discovers a cave with the lyrics of an old nursery rhyme he had found to be in some way connected to his investigation carved around it.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 231 BBY :: Chancellor Soh then assigns investigator Sian Holt and Caphtor to work together in uncovering an attempt to sell the creature by criminal Arathab Fal and Nihil doctor Kisma Uttersond .

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 231 BBY :: Krix Kamerat , the leader of a Nihil specialized cell , is ordered by Marchion Ro to find a way to prove himself after the debacle at Vrant Tarnum, which had caused him to lose much of his unit's strength. Kamerat chooses to attack the planet Takodana , that has a Jedi Temple , in the hopes of destroying it and demonstrating to the pirate Maz Kanata that the Nihil are the only true marauders in the area. The lone Jedi at the Takodana temple, Sav Malagán , is able to drive off the first wave of the attack, but calls for reinforcements from Starlight Beacon as she knows the Nihil will return. Kamerat retreats to Dol'har Hyde to gather more of his forces, vowing to destroy Malagán's temple.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 231 BBY :: Ram Jomoram's friends throw a party on Starlight Beacon for him after noticing his homesickness.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 231 BBY :: Sylvestri Yarrow and Jordanna Sparkburn fall in love on Tiikae , but they are forced to separate as Sylvestri leaves the planet with her mother, Chancey Yarrow .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 231 BBY :: Chancey is believed by her daughter to have been killed during a Nihil raid on their ship, the Switchback . Chancey had been presented an opportunity to pursue her personal gravity well projector project by the Nihil Lourna Dee with the help of Mari San Tekka.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 231 BBY :: Jedi Cohmac Vitus, Vernestra Rwoh, Reath Silas, and Imri Cantaros assist in repelling the Nihil attack on Tiikae.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 231 BBY :: Genetian civil war
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 231 BBY :: A Twi'lek assassin member of the Nihil assassinates the Gungan Professor Thaddeus Wolk on Coruscant for correctly theorizing that they have created a Gravity well projector superweapon in the Berenge sector. Shortly before the assassination, Wolk's building on Coruscant is bombed, leading to Jedi Vernestra Rwoh and Imri Cantaros attempting to rescue Wolk from the building. However, Wolk is shot and killed by the assassin before they can escape.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 231 BBY :: The Nihil ambush the Jedi on the Graf family space station Everbloom , after they went there to investigate Wolk's assassination and the Graf's dealings with the Nihil. Reath Silas, Imri Cantaros, and Sylvestri Yarrow are captured by the Nihil.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 231 BBY :: A battle is fought at the Nihil space station Gravity's Heart , located in the barren Berenge sector , and contained the gravity well projector developed by Chancey Yarrow, where the Republic and the Jedi Order destroy the station and rescue Reath Silas, Imri Cantaros and Sylvestri Yarrow , who had been unaware of her mother's plotting with the Nihil. During the battle, Jedi Knight Vernestra Rwoh encounters the dying hyperspace prospector Mari San Tekka , who gives her one final route to a location on the edge of the galaxy.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 231 BBY :: Resulting from the Nihil's devastating raid on the Valo Republic Fair and the Jedi's defeat of the Drengir, the Republic Defense Coalition and Jedi Order launch Operation: Counterstrike , a counter-piracy military operation headed by Jedi Masters Stellan Gios and Avar Kriss against the Nihil.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 231 BBY > Resulting from the Nihil's devastating raid on the Valo Republic Fair and the Jedi's defeat of the Drengir, the Republic Defense Coalition and Jedi Order launch Operation: Counterstrike , a counter-piracy military operation headed by Jedi Masters Stellan Gios and Avar Kriss against the Nihil. :: A battle is fought between the Nihil and the Republic Defense Coalition on the planet Carlac , ending with a Republic victory and the capture of several pirates as prisoners, who are taken to Starlight Beacon.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 231 BBY > Resulting from the Nihil's devastating raid on the Valo Republic Fair and the Jedi's defeat of the Drengir, the Republic Defense Coalition and Jedi Order launch Operation: Counterstrike , a counter-piracy military operation headed by Jedi Masters Stellan Gios and Avar Kriss against the Nihil. :: Forces of the Republic Defense Coalition and Jedi Order led by Marshal Avar Kriss engage the Nihil on Magaveene . As the battle is ongoing, the Frozian Jedi Knight Nooranbakarakana is sent to assist Kriss with a drift of Jedi Vectors from Starlight Beacon, resulting in a victory for the Jedi and Republic forces.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 231 BBY > Resulting from the Nihil's devastating raid on the Valo Republic Fair and the Jedi's defeat of the Drengir, the Republic Defense Coalition and Jedi Order launch Operation: Counterstrike , a counter-piracy military operation headed by Jedi Masters Stellan Gios and Avar Kriss against the Nihil. :: The Republic engage the Nihil in the Dreighton Nebula , resulting in a victory for the Republic Defense Coalition.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 231 BBY > Resulting from the Nihil's devastating raid on the Valo Republic Fair and the Jedi's defeat of the Drengir, the Republic Defense Coalition and Jedi Order launch Operation: Counterstrike , a counter-piracy military operation headed by Jedi Masters Stellan Gios and Avar Kriss against the Nihil. :: The Unified Republic Task Force and members of the Jedi Order battle the Nihil on the planet Aris , ending with a major victory for the Jedi and Republic.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 231 BBY > Resulting from the Nihil's devastating raid on the Valo Republic Fair and the Jedi's defeat of the Drengir, the Republic Defense Coalition and Jedi Order launch Operation: Counterstrike , a counter-piracy military operation headed by Jedi Masters Stellan Gios and Avar Kriss against the Nihil. :: The Jedi and the Republic Defense Coalition defeat the Nihil on the planet Golrath .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 231 BBY > Resulting from the Nihil's devastating raid on the Valo Republic Fair and the Jedi's defeat of the Drengir, the Republic Defense Coalition and Jedi Order launch Operation: Counterstrike , a counter-piracy military operation headed by Jedi Masters Stellan Gios and Avar Kriss against the Nihil. :: The Unified Republic Task Force achieves a mayor victory against the Nihil on Port Haven.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 231 BBY :: Combined forces of the Republic and the Jedi Order fight Nihil raiders lead by Lourna Dee , who are attempting to capture Relay Post Epsilon One at the direction of Marchion Ro. When it becomes clear that the Nihil will not be able to capture the station, Dee fires on the station with a turbolaser, setting off a chain reaction leading to its destruction. After the battle ends with a Galactic Republic and Jedi Order victory, the Republic captures most of the Nihil forces, including the entire crew of the cruiser Lourna Dee and Lourna Dee herself. But the Republic is unaware Dee is in custody, believing her to have died in the battle.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 231 BBY :: Lourna Dee and other prisoners of the Restitution defend it against Pan Eyta and his Tempest . Dee claims the Restitution for herself, reforms her Tempest, and rejoins the Nihil.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 231 BBY :: The Infiltration of the Nihil Tempest occurs.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 231 BBY > The Infiltration of the Nihil Tempest occurs. :: The Jedi stage a skirmish in the Soola system so that Jedi Knights Keeve Trennis and Terec are brought into Zeetar's Tempest on Xais by the Nihil.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 231 BBY > The Infiltration of the Nihil Tempest occurs. :: After having their identities revealed by a captive Myarga the Hutt, Trennis and Terec fight the Nihil and attempt to escape, but are stopped by Lourna Dee using the Great Leveler. Jedi arrive to rescue Trennis and Terec, but Dee escapes.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) :: Between 231 BBY and 230 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > Between 231 BBY and 230 BBY :: The Nihil attempt to assassinate Chancellor Soh on Corellia as part of preparation for their increased efforts on Corellia.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > Between 231 BBY and 230 BBY :: The Nihil perform a raid on a vault on Quilken , however, it is secretly a trap set by Porter Engle, who duels Lourna Dee and captures the Storm Slombo .

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) :: 230 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 230 BBY :: Nihil pirates from Kara Xoo's Tempest destroy, raid, and loot the spaceport on the planet Haileap . They also break into a lab and kidnap the inventor Avon Starros who was working there with scientist Glenna Kip . Jedi Master Jorinda Boffrey leads Jedi and civilians in fighting against the attackers, with Jedi Knight Kohta Jarik flying a Jedi Vector in the fight, and the Nihil quickly depart after causing massive damage to Port Haileap .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 230 BBY :: The Nihil attack the Maawat Mountains on Dalna.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 230 BBY :: The Kara Xoo's Tempest , including Deva Lompop , attack the people of Hon-Tallos , using flamethrowers and a Spider Cruiser to destroy the city.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 230 BBY :: Vernestra Rwoh and Imri Cantaros take a mission to the planet Dalna to rescue Avon Starros from the Nihil.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 230 BBY > Vernestra Rwoh and Imri Cantaros take a mission to the planet Dalna to rescue Avon Starros from the Nihil. :: The Nihil attack the Dalnan capital city of Saludad .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 230 BBY > Vernestra Rwoh and Imri Cantaros take a mission to the planet Dalna to rescue Avon Starros from the Nihil. :: The Nihil and their scientist Zadina Mkampa carry out the Destruction of Dalna , a volcanic cataclysmic event triggered by Mkampa using a crystal matrix built into the planet's crust that produces groundquakes.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 230 BBY > Vernestra Rwoh and Imri Cantaros take a mission to the planet Dalna to rescue Avon Starros from the Nihil. :: Imri Cantaros organizes efforts on Starlight Beacon to evacuate the Dalnans off their planet. The station is towed through hyperspace to the Dalnan system by several starships, including the luxury liner Halcyon , allowing the population to be evacuated.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 230 BBY :: A cyclone disaster as large as a continent devastates Eiram. In response, the Republic send Starlight beacon there to assist the world, as the Dalnan evacuation had proved the space station could be effective at disaster relief upon arriving over the site of a crisis.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 230 BBY :: The Eiram celebration occurs as Starlight Beacon provides aid to Eiram.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 230 BBY :: Marchion Ro and a group of Nihil devoted to him called the She'ar undertake a mission to Planet X to retrieve many members of the Nameless species. Driven by knowledge passed down through the generations of his family , Ro begins the mission by sacrificing many Nihil strikeships and their Nihil scout pilots to the planet's tempestuous outer layer he called the veil. By preoccupying the veil with the strikeships, Ro and the She'ar manage to sneak through it in the Cloudship Ikoru . After activating the Rod of Seasons in order to call the Nameless to him, Ro and the She'ar are attacked by many creatures and fauna of the planet, but they secure several Nameless aboard the Ikoru and escape the planet while many members of the She'ar are killed.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 230 BBY :: The Jedi win a battle in the Nefitifi system against the Nihil. Multiple Jedi onboard a Longbeam cruiser are able to board and capture a Nihil starship, and the pirates swiftly surrender.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 230 BBY :: The Jedi conduct many raids against the Nihil in the Ocktai system , capturing Nan and Chancey Yarrow, who are imprisoned on Starlight Beacon.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 230 BBY :: The Great Jedi Rumble Race is hosted by Jedi Masters Torban Buck and Kantam Sy for the Padawans and other denizens of Starlight Beacon to serve as a relieve for the stress caused by the ongoing Nihil conflict.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 230 BBY :: Despite the protests of her friend Master Gios, Avar Kriss leaves Starlight to lead the Battle for No-Space and gives into her rage, nearly executing Lourna Dee.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 230 BBY :: A Jedi-Republic task force, led by Jedi Master Torban Buck and Padawan Lula Talisola, begins a hunt to bring Krix Kamerat to justice.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 230 BBY > A Jedi-Republic task force, led by Jedi Master Torban Buck and Padawan Lula Talisola, begins a hunt to bring Krix Kamerat to justice. :: After the Jedi are informed of Kamerat's location, a Nihil Encampment on the planet Dol'har Hyde , by the Padawan Bibs who had been sent to investigate the source of a distress call, the Republic sends the task force to assault the Nihil Encampment and capture Kamerat. A battle is fought between the task force and Krix Kamerat's cell , and after an engagement in the planet's atmosphere, Padawans Talisola, Qort , and Farzala Tarabal , as well as Zeen Mrala, make their way to Kamerat's saferoom where they are able to capture him.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 230 BBY :: The Nihil, on the orders of Marchion Ro, begin an infiltration of the planet Corellia. Aided by the Father of Finances Nomar Tralmat , the Nihil are able to hide hundreds of themselves amongst the Coronet municipal police , with Tralmat hiring the undercover marauders on the claim they will help with security for new starships being built in the Santhe Shipyards of Coronet City .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 230 BBY > The Nihil, on the orders of Marchion Ro, begin an infiltration of the planet Corellia. Aided by the Father of Finances Nomar Tralmat , the Nihil are able to hide hundreds of themselves amongst the Coronet municipal police , with Tralmat hiring the undercover marauders on the claim they will help with security for new starships being built in the Santhe Shipyards of Coronet City . :: A Nihil attack in Coronet City tips the Jedi off to the Nihil's infiltration. Zeen Mrala leaves her friends to help investigate. Farzala Tarabal and Qort are knighted.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 230 BBY > The Nihil, on the orders of Marchion Ro, begin an infiltration of the planet Corellia. Aided by the Father of Finances Nomar Tralmat , the Nihil are able to hide hundreds of themselves amongst the Coronet municipal police , with Tralmat hiring the undercover marauders on the claim they will help with security for new starships being built in the Santhe Shipyards of Coronet City . :: A union dispute on Gus Talon is manipulated by the Nihil.

Aided by the Father of Finances Nomar Tralmat , the Nihil are able to hide hundreds of themselves amongst the Coronet municipal police , with Tralmat hiring the undercover marauders on the claim they will help with security for new starships being built in the Santhe Shipyards of Coronet City . > A union dispute on Gus Talon is manipulated by the Nihil. :: The Nihil secretly carry out a bombing at Gus Talon University to draw the Jedi to the union dispute and distract them from their operations on Corellia.

Aided by the Father of Finances Nomar Tralmat , the Nihil are able to hide hundreds of themselves amongst the Coronet municipal police , with Tralmat hiring the undercover marauders on the claim they will help with security for new starships being built in the Santhe Shipyards of Coronet City . :: The Battle of the Corellian Shipyards is fought on the planet Corellia. Alys "Crash" Ongwa and members of her company fight alongside Jedi Masters Kantam Sy, Cohmac Vitus, and Yoda who returns from his absence, Padawans Reath Silas and Ram Jomaram, and Zeen Mrala against Nihil forces led by Sabata Krill , who attempt to steal ships from Coronet City 's shipyards. The Nihil forces are prevented from stealing the Republic ships and their plot to ambush Starlight Beacon foiled. After the battle is over, Reath Silas is knighted and Cohmac Vitus leaves the Jedi Order, after expressing doubts towards the Jedi Order's way of dealing with the Nihil threat.

The Nameless kill many Jedi who attempt to investigate.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 230 BBY > Destruction of Starlight Beacon :: Nihil saboteurs blow up the station, sending it in a collision course with Eiram and cutting off all of its communications.

They board in an attempt to help, but are attacked by the Nameless. Sskeer stays behind to fight them off and Trennis rescues Terec and Ceret from the station.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 230 BBY > Destruction of Starlight Beacon :: Emerick Caphtor and Sian Holt board the crashing station and help Torban Buck and Qort save a large group of Jedi younglings. Caphtor faces a Nameless and retrieves one of its limbs and a sample of its blood, but Dr. Uttersond escapes.

He kills her, dooming the station.

After it crashes into the ocean, many other Jedi remain missing.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 230 BBY :: During the Nihil celebration , Marchion Ro makes a grand declaration to the galaxy in which he reveals himself as the leader of the Nihil and gloats of his victory to the Republic and the Jedi.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 230 BBY :: The Nihil attack the Jedi Temple on Banchii in an attempt to retrieve Azlin Rell's journal , but are forced to retreat after killing many.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 230 BBY :: Wookiee Jedi Master Kelnacca takes Yarzion Vell as his Padawan after the latter's master Lulad died on Starlight Beacon.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 230 BBY :: The Nihil, led by Baron Boolan, attack the planet Valo. During the attack, the Jedi youngling Gavi Takitaken witness his Jedi Master, Aebal , being killed by a Nameless, though he manages to escape and live in the ruins of the Lonisa City Zoo for months along with fellow younglings Kildo and Tep Tep . As a result of the attack, Valo is consumed by the Nihil and placed behind its Stormwall in the Occlusion Zone . Along with Aebal, Master Eicho and all Jedi Masters of the Valo Temple are killed.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 230 BBY :: The Nihil expand their territory using the Stormwall , engulfing ten sectors of space within their Occlusion Zone . Avar Kriss and Porter Engle are among the Jedi trapped behind the Stormwall. When the Nihil deploy the Stormseeds that create the Stormwall, the Republic Defense Coalition Outreach Fleet is destroyed.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 230 BBY :: The Hutts take advantage of the chaos caused by the Nihil to annex many systems and locations, including most of the Kastolar sector .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 230 BBY :: The Jedi Council recalls all of the order's members across the galaxy to the Jedi Temple on Coruscant in response to the threat posed by the Nameless. Most Jedi comply, but some, like Bell Zettifar, who begins his search for Burryaga Agaburry on Eiram, refuse.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) :: 229 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 229 BBY :: A week after the fall of Starlight Beacon, the Jedi Council invokes the Guardian Protocols , accelerating Jedi learners' elevation and preparing the Jedi for more active strikes against the Nihil.

Garat finds the droid ZZ-10 , who along with Jedi Master Arkoff, stop the Nihil's efforts and kill Garat.

Instead, once control of their weapons is given to her, she kills the planet's leader and decimates the resistance. Knowing Marchion Ro was watching, she contacts him and requests to join the Nihil as one of his leaders. Viess becomes a General and the leader of a Nihil Ministry of Protection .

Zettifar and Agaburry evacuate the citizens and bring them to safety, but Veter is captured by the Nihil.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 229 BBY > The Nihil Occupation of Valo continues :: On Valo, the Nihil host a Dark Fair , a week-long celebration leading up to the anniversary of the destruction of Starlight Beacon intended as a cruel parody of the Republic Fair. Ram Jomaram, now operating on the alias "Scarlet Skull," attacks it. He meets younglings Gavi, Kildo, and Tep Tep .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 229 BBY > The Nihil Occupation of Valo continues :: Master Kunpar Vasivola is captured by the Nihil from the Valo Jedi temple . Ram Jomaram and his youngling friends infiltrate Lonisa City's city hall to learn where they are holding him. Gavi retrieves the datapad of the Nihil Commander Vark Tarpalin from his office, obtaining Master Vasivola's location.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 229 BBY > The Nihil Occupation of Valo continues :: Ram and his crew, which begin calling themselves the Scarlet Skulls and are joined by kid pirate Zyle Keem , rescue Kunpar Vasivola from an underground prison . The group manages to escape the facility with the weakened Jedi Master by using micronite explosives to bypass the normal escape route.

Gavi remains on Valo while Kildo and Tep Tep go to help the Jedi elsewhere in the galaxy.

There, she discovers that Vil is actually her long lost lover Lula Talisola, who experienced amnesia after Starlight's fall.
