Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: The Republic Occlusion Zone attack fleet launches an assault on the Stormwall , destroying several of the Stormseeds creating it. However, when they then try to enter the Occlusion Zone, they discover that the Stormwall has already healed itself and the fleet is destroyed.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: In response to the assault on the Stormwall, Marchion Ro expands it, bringing more worlds into the Occlusion Zone.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: Joss and Pikka Adren are sent by Admiral Kronara on a mission to recover an abandoned Nihil ship at the edge of the Stormwall. The expansion of the Stormwall occurs while they are there, trapping them within the Occlusion Zone.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: After being trapped in the Occlusion Zone, Joss and Pika Adren's ship the Aurora III is attacked by Nihil scav droids.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: When Avar Kriss and reporter Rhil Dairo meet with a Nihil defector named Quith Meglar on Hetzal Prime who promises them a way out of the Occlusion Zone, they are ambushed by General Viess and her forces, who kill Meglar, but retreat once Jedi Master Porter Engle arrives.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: Above Seswenna , Avar Kriss and Porter Engle assault the Nihil starship Cacophony in the hopes of capturing it and using its Path drive to escape. After Kriss captured the ship, the Path drive was destroyed, and Engle was lost, Kriss used the hyperspace data from an EX communications droid to successfully escape the Occlusion Zone in the ship, with Melis Shryke in custody.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: The Battle of Seswenna occurs between the Nihil and Republic on Seswenna, which results in a Nihil victory.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: On Ibbe , Vernestra Rwoh is approached by Avon Starros, who reveals that Rwoh's Padawan Imri Cantaros is alive and in the Occlusion Zone. She agrees to join Starros and others on a trip behind the Stormwall using a ship provided by Starros's friend, the Nihil Deva Lompop .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: After discovering Cantaros on Aricho , Rwoh joins him and others in an attack on a Nihil processing facility to free children and civilians being forced to work there. They are successful, and also capture a Nihil leader named Kara Xoo. Afterward, Rwoh knights Cantaros, and leaves him on Aricho so he can continue helping the people there.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: Jordanna Sparkburn joins Starros's trip into the Occlusion Zone, taking a mission to find her lost family members. After being joined by her cousin Cair San Tekka on Seswenna, the pair track their family to Arli's moon . Once there, they discover that the moon has been overrun by a blight that causes an effect similar to the Nameless's calcification of Force-sensitives. They successfully rescue their family, but Cair's hand is infected by the blight and is amputated and contained in a stasis field by Jordanna.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: Avon Starros and Xylan Graf travel from Seswenna to Lightning Crash station, where the Nihil are controlling the Stormwall. The Nihil scientist running it reveals that the station is rigged to cause disaster across hyperspace in the event of her death, thwarting their mission to destroy it.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: After Starros, Graf, San Tekka, Sparkburn, and Rwoh regroup on Seswenna, they flee scav droids in Deva Lompop's ship. After discovering the Path drive is unusable, Starros provides her Sunvale device , which allows them to travel through the Stormwall but only with the help of Rwoh manually performing precise hyperspace jumps with the Force. Rwoh returns to the Jedi Temple on Coruscant, Starros remains on Coruscant under the alias Avon Sunvale, and Cair San Tekka's hand is delivered to the Jedi for study.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: Jedi and their allies prevent the Korvix Vorn ' s Warden from landing on Eriadu in the Star Hopper , which is now controlled by the Nihil.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: The Jedi Padawan Ruu , under orders of Alys Ongwa , kidnappes the Togruta Nihil pirate Haakon Pav and interrogates him for coordinates to traverse across the Stormwall. After obtaining the coordinates, Ruu kills him.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: Ruu and the Nihil Driggit Parse , travel to the hidden depot operated by the Lasat Frander , in order to obtain the schematics for constructing a Spiral -class Viz-Core Eviscerator . Ultimately the schematics are retrieved by the Nihil.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: The Massacre at the Greens occurs on Corellia, ending the civil war with the Nihil presence on the planet being wiped out.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: Crash Ongwa and her crew take a mission to Rekelos in search of the former Nihil Krogger Sheem , hoping to get info out of him. He provides them with the name of the person who led the infiltration of Corellia: Krix Kamerat.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: Crash Ongwa and her crew, primarily her bodyguard Ruu, take a mission to Ersham Prison with the intention of killing Krix Kamerat. However, once there, Ongwa realizes Kamerat may be able to help them kill Marchion Ro, so she frees him instead.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: With the Stormwall at the edge of Eriadu, the Jedi begin to evacuate children and non-essential personnel from the planet. While doing so, Jedi come under fire from Nihil fighters over the Eriaduan city Bri-Phrang. The Jedi ship explodes, but all of the Jedi escape. Afterward, Zeen Mrala proposes marriage to Lula Talisola.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: The Nihil invade the planet Eriadu.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY > The Nihil invade the planet Eriadu. :: As part of the invasion, the Nihil blockade Bri-Phrang City, trapping inside many Jedi and Republic operatives.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: Jedi Knights Burryaga Agaburry and Bell Zettifar undertake a mission to the moon Felne 6 to investigate reports of Drengir, where they find a dying member of the species.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: Burryaga Agaburry and Bell Zettifar travel to the planet Oanne to convince the local Elia-An to evacuate before the Stormwall expands and leaves the world inside the Occlusion Zone.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: Bell Zettifar and Burryaga Agaburry go on a mission to the planet Ronaphaven in order to investigate the Drengir, but they find the blight on the planet instead.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: The Jedi Order and Galactic Republic carry out missions across the Stormwall in order to rescue individuals who are trapped in the Nihil's Occlusion Zone region of space and return them to Republic space.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY > The Jedi Order and Galactic Republic carry out missions across the Stormwall in order to rescue individuals who are trapped in the Nihil's Occlusion Zone region of space and return them to Republic space. :: Vernestra Rwoh undertakes a six-day mission during which she rescues a resistance cell from the Occlusion Zone.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: The Republic Defense Coalition and Jedi Order attack the Lightning Crash , a Nihil space station which houses a crystal array that powers the Stormwall barrier, in order to take out the Stormwall's power. Once the attack is a success and the station destroyed, the Republic Defense Coalition and Jedi begin operations to round up any surviving Nihil as prisoners. After Marchion Ro learns that the Lightning Crash had been destroyed, he orders for his flagship, the Gaze Electric , to become the Stormwall's new power source.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: Naboo is occupied by the Nihil.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY > Naboo is occupied by the Nihil. :: The planet Naboo is conquered by forces led by General Abediah Viess . The regional and planetary governments ultimately surrender to Viess, and the reigning Naboo queen manages to escape with the help of her guard and goes into hiding.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY > Naboo is occupied by the Nihil. :: Forces from the Jedi Order and the Republic Defense Coalition led by Jedi Master Avar Kriss liberate Naboo from the Nihil occupation, but General Abediah Viess escapes.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: Hunt for Viess .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY > Hunt for Viess . :: Mission to Viess' manor .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY > Hunt for Viess . :: Nihil Minister of Protection Abediah Viess and Jedi Master Porter Engle duel on the planet Isolt. Eventually Viess escapes.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: The Jedi Order undertakes a search in an attempt to hunting down and stopping the Eye of the Nihil Marchion Ro. After they are provided a series of locations Ro had visited by Nihil Minister of Information Ghirra Starros, the Jedi determine he is investigating the plague known as the blight, which they also believe can be linked with a reappearance of the Drengir.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY > The Jedi Order undertakes a search in an attempt to hunting down and stopping the Eye of the Nihil Marchion Ro. After they are provided a series of locations Ro had visited by Nihil Minister of Information Ghirra Starros, the Jedi determine he is investigating the plague known as the blight, which they also believe can be linked with a reappearance of the Drengir. :: A skirmish is fought when the Jedi Order undertakes a mission to the planet Vixoseph I as part of its search for Marchion Ro, who was on Vixoseph trying to find out whether he could replant the blight and use a Drengir to spread it through the carnivorous plant's hive mind . When Ro notices that the Jedi arrive, he sends one of his Nameless creatures to kill them. Through the efforts of Burryaga Agaburry, and Avar Kriss and Elzar Mann, however, the Jedi are able to kill the Nameless. The Eye is confronted by the arrival of Jedi Knight Vernestra Rwoh. After she attempts to kill a Drengir that had began to calcify as a result of the Nameless' effects, Ro interrupts and stopps Rwoh, telling her to not interfere. While the Drengir died, because of its hive mind, it spread the husking to another Drengir, successfully completing what the Eye had wanted. Ro is picked up by his secretary Thaya Ferr in his flagship, the Gaze Electric , and departs the planet.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY > The Jedi Order undertakes a search in an attempt to hunting down and stopping the Eye of the Nihil Marchion Ro. After they are provided a series of locations Ro had visited by Nihil Minister of Information Ghirra Starros, the Jedi determine he is investigating the plague known as the blight, which they also believe can be linked with a reappearance of the Drengir. :: Thraisai mission .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: A battle is fought at the planet Ballum , at the edge of the Occlusion Zone, between Jedi and Republic forces led by Commander Velko Jahen and Jedi Master Keeve Trennis, against the Nihil pirates, led by Envoy Affanar, and their allies of the Hutt Clan represented by Skarabda the Wise . During the fight, the Jedi Santar is killed, but the Nihil forces are defeated with the loss of Envoy Affanar, the Child of the Storm Lycos , and one of their Nameless.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: The Star Cruiser Ataraxia is captured from Lourna Dee by Keeve Trennis with support from Republic Defense Coalition and Hutt Clan forces. Following the battle on Ballum, in which Skarabda learned that Dee killed her sister Myarga , Skarabda orders Dee eliminated and enters an alliance with the Republic and Jedi. In the space above Ballum, Dee attempts to flee with the Ataraxia , which she named the Lourna Dee , as the combined forces pursue. Trennis manages to breach the Ataraxia ' s hull, where she fights various droids send by Dee. Meanwhile, RDC Commander Velko Jahen uses the Longbeam cruiser Gios ' s tractor beam to hold the Ataraxia in place. Dee counters by straining the ship's engines and dumping crates filled with civilians into the path of the tractor beam, forcing Jahen to turn it off. Jedi Ai-Dan Yelooc uses the Force to direct the loose crates of people into the Gios for medical care. Following a confrontation in the Ataraxia ' s bridge, Trennis stuns Dee, captures her, and secures control of the Ataraxia .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: Mission to Kindosorn .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: Funeral of Goonral Monshi .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: Members of the Jedi Order, including Keeve Trennis and Sskeer, along with the marauder Lourna Dee , and the Sephi Tey Sirrek carry out a mission to rescue a Yacombe girl from Shingcu Station , a space station within the atmosphere of the gas giant Chenley Prime that serves as a base of operations for Baron Boolan, the Minister of Advancement of the Nihil.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: Rescue of Sskeer .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: Mission to Cethis .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: Jedi Master Eve Byre and her Padawan Zaph Mora undertake a mission to deliver supplies to the Oisinians of the planet Oisin , transported there by Affie Hollow and her crew aboard the Vessel . During the mission, Mora is killed by the Nihil Child of the Storm Sicarus , who had been sent by Baron Boolan to eliminate the Jedi, while Sicarus decides to capture Byre and take her to Boolan.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: Former Jedi Master Cohmac Vitus travels to the planet Thall to investigate the Tolemite , a lost civilization which resided on Thall. Concurrently to Vitus' mission, the Child of the Storm Sicarus arrives to Thall to hunt the former Jedi. Cohmac Vitus learns the location of the Tolemite homeworld , and manages to escape Sicarus.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: A team consisting of 13 Republic Defense Coalition personnel, along with Jedi Master Mirro Lox and his Padawan Amadeo Azzazzo go on a mission to a Nihil base on the planet Angoth , where they successfully capture a Nameless specimen, but Mirro Lox dies defending his Padawan from a Nameless.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: Cohmac Vitus and Reath Silas undertake an expedition to the planet Tolis , to investigate the knowledge of the Tolemites, who lived on the world before being destroyed, about the Nameless and blight. While on the world, they defeat the Jedi hunter Sicarus, who is killed along with two of the Nameless.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: Attack on Tortle Cove Outpost .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: Members of the Jedi Order and the Republic Defense Coalition go on a mission to investigate a distress beacon from the supposedly evacuated planet of Palagosal . During their time there, the Jedi rescue Churo , as well as the survivors of the attack on Tortle Cove Outpost , and capture three live Nameless, but Jedi Master Ada-Li Carro dies in the process.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: Mission to Mynos Three .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: The Jedi Reath Silas, Cohmac Vitus and Amadeo Azzazzo go on a mission to the planet Varovia , where they recover the missing Rod of Ages .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: The monster hunter Ty Yorrick rescues several Force-sensitive children in the Osler community on the planet Temerancé who has been abducted by a Nihil Cloud, killing several Nihil in the process, including the Cloud leader .

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: Kitrep Soh , the son of Republic Supreme Chancellor Lina Soh , and his boyfriend Jom Lariin are rescued on the planet Abtin , inside the Occlusion Zone, by Ty Yorrick and Drewen Qweebjillan . During the mission, Ty Yorrick confronts her former Master Cibaba , now part of the Children of the Storm , and convinces her to leave the Nihil.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: Jedi Master Savina Besatrix Malagán , the ZZ-model droid ZZ-10 , and the Banchiian Shosho undertake a mission to the moon Astenban to prevent the Nihil from taking control of a base there. On Astenban, the group encounters the Force-sensitive creature Zimtok , who decides to assist the group. Malagán successfully destroys the base, but while fighting the Nihil afterword, Zimtok is captured by a Nihil and Shosho stowes away on a Nihil starship to attempt to save her.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: Nihil pirates led by the scientist Niv Drendow Apruk go on a mission to the planet Banchii where they face the Jedi Order, the native Banchiians, and the Drengir. The Jedi and their allies are able to seal Apruk's Force-consuming Nameless creatures within bunkers, forcing the Nihil to retreat.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: Grand Master Yoda goes a mission to a Nihil satellite after he feels a disturbance in the Force that had come from the station. After arriving, Yoda discovers he has been lured to the satellite by the Nihil, who intend to kill him with the Great Leveler . While there, Yoda rescues a family of Twi'leks who had been captured by the Nihil to lure Yoda to the station, ultimately escaping despite the Nihil's attempts to kill him. During his encounter with the Leveler, Yoda is emphatic towards the creature's plight, which allows him to escape its affects and communicate with it through the Force. Through the encounter, Yoda learns it is haunted by the deaths it had been forced to carry out from its hunger and simply wishes to return to its homeworld, Sophros .

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: The Battle on Banchii is fought when the Nihil, led by Minister of Advancement Baron Boolan , attack the planet Banchii . Boolan initially travels there in hopes of recruiting the various Jedi there, including Jedi Knights Lily Tora-Asi and Reath Silas , fallen Jedi Azlin Rell , and Jedi Masters Savina Besatrix Malagán and Arkoff for his experiments, with the promise that he will not harm the people of Banchii if they complied. When the Jedi in charge, Tora-Asi, refuses, Boolan sends his horde of Nihil pirates to attack the planet and the Jedi. As Tora-Asi fights the Nihil, the plants of the planet begin to attack them too, as members of the Drengir trigger the plant life to protect Tora-Asi in their stead after the Jedi helped them flee Banchii. As the Baron starts to flee, he releases Nameless at the Jedi. However, the Jedi are assisted by a large group of non-Force-sensitive Banchii natives as well as a group of Banchiians led by Shosho , a Nihil defector named Maktan Plynt , and Malagán's friend Dexter Jettster , who defeat the Nameless. Meanwhile, Boolan makes one final plea to Rell to join him and study the Nameless, but Rell refuses and choses to protect Jedi Initiates Viv'Nia Nia'Viv and Nima Allets instead. With the Nameless defeated, the Jedi drive the Nihil away, winning the battle and successfully protecting the planet.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: A Jedi and Republic team, including Jedi Master Eve Byre , Padawan Cam Lindon , and Jedi younglings Kildo and Tep Tep, carry out a scientific mission to investigate the blight. While on the mission, they receive a distress call from the planet Eiram from Jedi Master Ackmora , requesting assistance in dealing with a situation that had arisen in Barraza City .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: Escape on Eiram .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY > Escape on Eiram . :: An incident takes place on the planet Eiram when the Drengir, previously believed to have been defeated at Mulita , begin kidnapping citizens of the Eirami city Barraza City in an attempt to escape the planet, as the spread of the blight heads to Eiram. The Drengir are ultimately defeated by citizens of the city, as well as several Jedi, Republic Defense Coalition members, and former Nihil that had formed the Hurricanes gang. Resulting from the joint effort, tensions between the citizens of Barraza and the Jedi ease.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY > Escape on Eiram . :: Jedi Master Eve Byre, her Padawan Cam Lindon and the two Jedi Initiates Kildo and Tep Tep undertake an expedition to the wreckage of Starlight Beacon, to investigate if the Great Progenitor is still alive.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY > Escape on Eiram . :: A battle is fought in Arovia park , at the center of Eiram's Barraza City, between two factions of the Drengir; one led by the Great Progenitor and supported by the Jedi Order; and one controlled by Saxl Neth , a human Nihil. One Saxl Neth is defeated, the Drengir and the Jedi make peace, the Drengir escape Eiram in the Innovator , heading for the Wookiee homeworld of Kashyyyk.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: Capture of Boolan and Sskeer .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: Jedi Masters Keeve Trennis and Avar Kriss, alongside bounty hunter and former Nihil Tempest Runner Lourna Dee , spearhead a search for ailing Jedi Master Sskeer and Nihil Minister of Advancement Baron Boolan , after the two are captured by Muglan Tarantyne 's crew and brought into the custody of Marchion Ro on the planet Heiklet . However, Sskeer and Boolan eventually escape Heiklet on their own and travel to Boolan's former home on the planet Dalna . There, they are recovered by the Jedi and brought to the planet Protobranch for medical attention, and so that Boolan can help the Republic researchers there find a solution for the blight spreading across the galaxy. However, Ro and the Nihil pursue Sskeer and Boolan to Protobranch, where Dee duels and defeats Ro, who warns that Boolan has created a virus that will kill all life and is pretending it is a cure for the blight. With Dee's warning, the Jedi and the Republic are able to contain the virus, provide an antidote to those already infected, and arrest Boolan.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: The Republic Defense Coalition and Jedi Order undertake a joint relief mission to the planet Eroudac . Cerean Jedi Knight Sul-Nath-Rune is part of the mission, though becomes separated from his unit and encounters the Hutt Churo who had traveled to Eroudac in search of a way to heal the planet Nal Hutta .

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: On the planet Valo , multiple Valons , aided by Jedi Initiate Gavi Takitaken , Jedi Master Kunpar Vasivola , Jedi Knight Farzala Tarabal , and Padawan Ram Jomaram , along with the pirate crew led by the Zabrak Tanana Keem , revolt against the occupying Nihil forces led by Herwint Tiks , with several Nihil dying in the fight.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: Alys "Crash" Ongwa and Ruu infiltrate the stronghold of the Nihil warlord Herwint Tiks and steal an EX droid from the fortress.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: The Nihil Marlem Glay leads her Cloud on a raid to the planet Baori Minor , though it is ultimately unsuccessful due to the blight.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: The moon Inad Komesh is evacuated by a team of Jedi and Republic Defense Coalition personnel led by Jedi Master Adampo , and including Padawan Amadeo Azzazzo, and Jedi Knights Burryaga, Vernestra Rwoh, Dez Rydan, Reath Silas, Indeera Stokes and Bell Zettifar. Although the citizens of the moon are successfully evacuated, Master Adampo perishes when he is crushed by a collapsing tower.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: Hundreds of Jedi Order gather for a service on the roof of the Jedi Temple on Coruscant to honor the Jedi Master Adampo of the Jedi High Council after he is killed during the evacuation of Inad Komesh. In many respects, it is felt the service essentially is for all of the Council members who had fallen during the Nihil conflict.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: Thraisai mission .

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: The Jedi Order carries out a mission to the planet Kashyyyk to stop the spread of the blight after it is discovered there. The Kashyyyk team is led by Jedi Knight Reath Silas, and includes the Wookiee Jedi Burryaga Agaburry and Kelnacca , Jedi Knight Dez Rydan , Padawan Amadeo Azzazzo , the former Jedi Azlin Rell and Cohmac Vitus , the scientist Avon Starros , and the former Nihil Nan Hague . The team are transported to Kashyyyk by the crew of the Byne Guild starship Vessel , which consists of Affie Hollow , Leox Gyasi , and Geode . They also work to stop the Nihil scientist Doctor Zadina Mkampa from acquiring a Sith artifact known as the Thornseed . Both missions are ultimately successful, the blight threat is thwarted, Zadina Mkampa is taken into custody, and the Drengir threat is ended, but Geode sacrifices himself to complete the mission.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: Jedi Master Kantam Sy is involved in a hostage negotiation on the planet Ferrix , leaving Sy unable to join a delegation of Jedi Masters in traveling across the Stormwall into the Occlusion Zone to attend the wedding of their former Jedi Padawan Lula Talisola to the Mikkian Zeen Mrala on the planet Eriadu .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: A wedding is held in Bri-Phrang City on the planet Eriadu , where the brides Lula Talisola and Zeen Mrala are married, and officiated by Maz Kanata . The celebration is interrupted by the begining of the Battle of Eriadu.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: The Battle of Eriadu is fought between the Republic Stormwall Defense Fleet led by marshal Keeve Trennis , multiple Jedi on the ground led by Knight Farzala Tarabal , and the Eriaduans , mainly organized by the Tarkin family , against the Nihil Occlusion Zone Occupying Force led by Herwint Tiks and the Nihil fleet led by General Abediah Viess , for the control of the planet Eriadu . Outside factions who are opposed to the Nihil also arrive and join the battle, including the Togruta government , the Hutts , and the Mon Calamari . The battle is a violent affair as the Eriaduans, already a combative people, were enraged with the Nihil occupation of their homeworld and finally have a chance to overthrow their occupiers. The battle results in a Nihil surrender and the end of the Nihil conflict , with the deaths of Herwint Tiks, Abediah Viess, the Children of the Storm Sister H'Tar , and many of the Nihil Irregulars .

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: The Tempest Breakers guild of bounty hunters founded by Lourna Dee and Quin Carree , as well as the Sephi Tey Sirrek , carry out a mission to the planet Naboo , under Nihil occupation ,to find surviving members of Nihil Baron Boolan 's Children of the Storm , who have scattered following Boolan's arrest. While on Naboo, the three are found by members of the Nihil, though Jedi Master Kelnacca and his Padawan Yarzion Vell arrive to help them. Afterward, the Jedi agree to help the three in their mission, with the Tempest Breakers and Sirrek agreeing to help liberate the planet in return.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: The Luminous Nine , a team of Jedi consisting of Masters Elzar Mann , Avar Kriss , Torban Buck , Knights Reath Silas , Bell Zettifar , Burryaga Agaburry , Terec , and former Jedi Ty Yorrick and Azlin Rell , undertake a mission to return the Nameless to their homeworld of Sophros to stop the Blight, while Marchion Ro travels to Sophros with the objective of kill all the Nameless and destroy the galaxy. During the mission, Master Buck is killed by one of the Nameless, and Ro produces the death of all Nameless brought to the planet by the Jedi. As a distraction for the Republic, Ro destroys the Gaze Electric and in the process brings down the Stormwall , but is eventually defeated by Bell and Burryaga and captured. Avar Kriss and Elzar Mann remain on Sophros to hold back the Blight's spread and maintain the balance between light and dark.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: Disaster on Estarvera .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: A trial for Marchion Ro is held in the Republic's Senate Building on the planet Coruscant . Following his capture on Sophros, Marchion Ro stands trial for numerous crimes, including the destruction of Starlight Beacon and the attempted murder of every being in existence. The trial concludes with Ro being sentenced to life in solitary confinement, with his prison to be constructed by droids in a randomly chosen location in deep space.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: A memorial service is held at the Jedi Temple on Coruscant for those who died in the Nihil conflict. The service is joyful, and hundreds of Jedi attend to honor the dead and laud their heroes. After the ceremony is over, the Guardian Protocols are rescinded.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Nihil conflict (232 BBY – 228 BBY) > 228 BBY :: After Azlin Rell escapes in a ship during the mission to Sophros, Reath Silas undergoes a search for him, departing in a Jedi Vector and bringing both his shield and his lightsaber .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Late High Republic Era (227 BBY – 100 BBY) :: c. 227 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Late High Republic Era (227 BBY – 100 BBY) > c. 227 BBY :: Yarzion Vell tells Kelnacca about the meaning of his tattoos. Vell is knighted after saving the child Yesula , her father , and their droid Zeekay from a fire.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Late High Republic Era (227 BBY – 100 BBY) :: c. 220 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Late High Republic Era (227 BBY – 100 BBY) > c. 220 BBY :: By this point, the Blue Dragon pirates have begun wrecking significant damage on the city of Fire , remaining the single most destructive force to plague the station for the next twenty years.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Late High Republic Era (227 BBY – 100 BBY) > c. 220 BBY :: Zhang Jincheng begins to ascend the hierarchy of Fire.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Late High Republic Era (227 BBY – 100 BBY) > c. 220 BBY :: Jamie Brasson becomes the President of Begamor and is elected to represent the planet as a senator of the Republic Senate. While Brasson appears to be a benevolent politician, he indulges in corruption and transforms Begamor into a dictatorship. Brasson develops a cult of personality, brainwashing citizens with holographic programs worshipping himself, isolating his world from the Republic HoloNet, and enforcing strict surveillance over Begamor. An appearance of prosperity for the planet's capital city is maintained while poverty, slavery, and organ trading is left to fester in the streets.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Late High Republic Era (227 BBY – 100 BBY) > c. 220 BBY :: Ma , an executive of the Land & Sky Corporation that rules the Aakaash system, dies of suspicious circumstances.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Late High Republic Era (227 BBY – 100 BBY) > c. 220 BBY :: The Jedi Knight Ady Sun'Zee and her padawan Nooa travel to a training exercise on the Sacred Garden of the planet Valron .

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Late High Republic Era (227 BBY – 100 BBY) :: c. 217 BBY

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Late High Republic Era (227 BBY – 100 BBY) > 205 BBY > A Mandalorian is employed as a gatekeeper at Jamie Brasson 's Presidential manor . :: Zhang Jincheng ascends to the position of the Fire station's manager.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Late High Republic Era (227 BBY – 100 BBY) > 203 BBY :: The Devaronian Begamor underworld –serial killer Bellon is offered a shelter by Jamie Brasson, who hires Bellon as one of his chefs.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Late High Republic Era (227 BBY – 100 BBY) :: 201 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Late High Republic Era (227 BBY – 100 BBY) > 201 BBY :: On Fire, the Knights of Silver Dawn , led by Li Yu , clash with the Blue Dragon, led by its leader, the dragon head . Li lets the dragon head escape with his life in the belief that it would be more profitable for the head to be alive than dead.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Late High Republic Era (227 BBY – 100 BBY) > 201 BBY :: Nan Moyou and Nan Holi go on a short vacation at the Nan family villa .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Late High Republic Era (227 BBY – 100 BBY) > 201 BBY :: Mostima and Sean study the Outer Rim's sectors, including Oplovis sector . In particular, the two Jedi study its Aakaash system.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Late High Republic Era (227 BBY – 100 BBY) > 201 BBY :: The industrial output of the distant, loosely Republic-affiliated Aakaash system exceeds that of the famous industrial world Metalorn .

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Late High Republic Era (227 BBY – 100 BBY) > 200 BBY :: At some point during the High Republic Era, Nihil raiders have torched the paradise planet Nelgenam and the Jedi abandon the Jedi outpost on Elphrona.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Late High Republic Era (227 BBY – 100 BBY) > 200 BBY :: Chewbacca is born on Kashyyyk.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Late High Republic Era (227 BBY – 100 BBY) > 200 BBY :: The Jedi Mostima and Sean undertake a mission to Begamor .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Late High Republic Era (227 BBY – 100 BBY) > 200 BBY :: By this point, Sean had constructed his lightsaber with a crystal that he bonded with on Ilum. As Ilum and its crystals grew in prominence for the Jedi, the number of Padawans traveling to Zoph for its Zophis crystal is decreased.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Late High Republic Era (227 BBY – 100 BBY) > 200 BBY :: Mostima and Sean undertake a mission to Aakaash , revealing the corruption of the ruling Land & Sky Corporation .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Late High Republic Era (227 BBY – 100 BBY) > 200 BBY :: By this point, legends of Jedi using the Force to destroy entire planets have spread to Nan Holi's star system.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Late High Republic Era (227 BBY – 100 BBY) > 200 BBY :: By this point, the Judicial Department 's peacekeeping fleet had been established as military arbiters of the Republic.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Late High Republic Era (227 BBY – 100 BBY) > 200 BBY :: The Mining Guild had been founded and operational by this point.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Late High Republic Era (227 BBY – 100 BBY) > 200 BBY :: By this point, bacta had become a common medical substance in the Aakaash system and human replica droids were invented.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Late High Republic Era (227 BBY – 100 BBY) :: 196 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Late High Republic Era (227 BBY – 100 BBY) > 196 BBY :: As Chelli Lona Aphra would later claim, Vaale 's sewers were used for the last time by around this point. The Architects of Vaale had also inscribed Old Republic iconography in their sacred workshop in the city, warning of the dangerous potential of the Rings of Vaale .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Late High Republic Era (227 BBY – 100 BBY) > 196 BBY :: By this point, the cathedral-like ceiling of the landing pads of Basteel 's Eladro City is carved.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Late High Republic Era (227 BBY – 100 BBY) > 196 BBY :: By this point, the Jowloon community had settled on Jaresh because they did not want change. They farm fertilizers on the fertile lands of Jowloon.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Late High Republic Era (227 BBY – 100 BBY) > c. 163 BBY :: Republic Senator Jakob Garn attempts to pass the Jedi Annexation Act , a bill to declare the Jedi Order an official branch of the Republic, in an attempt to claim Galactic Senate oversight of the Order.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Late High Republic Era (227 BBY – 100 BBY) > 161 BBY :: A second wave of settlers arrive on the planet Jelucan and establishes mining operations. The second wave consider the ways of the initial settlers to be backward. The second-wave of settlers use the profits from their mining operations to become wealthy aristocrats, while the first wave settlers remain largely destitute.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Late High Republic Era (227 BBY – 100 BBY) > 161 BBY :: Indara becomes a Jedi Knight. (Approximate date)
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Late High Republic Era (227 BBY – 100 BBY) > 161 BBY :: Five members of the Jedi Order, including Indara, undertake a mission to the planet Seswenna to mediate with miners who are upset with working conditions. While inside the mines of Seswenna , the roof collapses and four of the Jedi are killed instantly by rubble, while Jedi Knight Indara survives and is rescued a week later by a droid crew . Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Late High Republic Era (227 BBY – 100 BBY) > 134 BBY > Jedi Masters Sol and Elishe and their Padawans, Jecki Lon and Yord Fandar , go on a mission to the planet Siline , to solve a diplomatic crisis produced by another Jedi. :: A Crowning Convocation is held, a championship held on the planet Siline between the planet's youth every seven to ten planetary years, when thermal vents in the continental crust of Siline bust and spew red metallic vapor into the atmosphere, meant to test the strengths and abilities of the combatants. Padawans Jecki Lon and Yord Fandar participate representing the Jedi Order including in the great hunt, where the combatants hunt the ericadi , the planet's most dangerous predator.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Late High Republic Era (227 BBY – 100 BBY) > 134 BBY > Jedi Masters Sol and Elishe and their Padawans, Jecki Lon and Yord Fandar , go on a mission to the planet Siline , to solve a diplomatic crisis produced by another Jedi. :: Jecki Lon and the human warrior Lionine Graf are captured by a group of mercenaries during the great hunt. The mercenary leader, Orisent , was hired by the young Graf to sabotage the great hunt by releasing lyleks into the arena and poaching ericadi so that the Silinese traditions lose their air of purity and help usher in a less traditional future. When the operation is discovered by Lon and her allies, sullying Orisent's potential for profiting on ericadi hunting, she pivots to abducting Graf and Lon in hopes of making ransom money. After knocking Lon and Graf unconscious, the mercenaries bring their captives to the Heart of Siline , a sacred place, as they wait for the ransom. As Graf and Lon fight the mercenaries, fellow Padawan Yord Fandar protects the Silinese Sitia Arthyst , who has been severely injured by a trap sprung by the mercenaries. Soon, the Silinese government arrives with Masters Sol and Elishe, and the mercenaries are defeated.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Late High Republic Era (227 BBY – 100 BBY) > 132 BBY :: Mae travels to Khofar to kill Kelnacca, who is hiding there. However, she decides against it after reckoning with Osha being alive and turns against her accomplice, Qimir , who is secretly her Sith master. However, Qimir, as "the Stranger", kills Kelnacca anyway.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Late High Republic Era (227 BBY – 100 BBY) > 132 BBY :: Sol, Osha, Jecki, Yord, and a large contingent of Jedi travel to Khofar to try and reach Kelnacca before the assassins do. They arrive too late, and all of the Jedi except for Sol and Osha are killed. The Stranger kidnaps Osha, and Mae disguises herself as Osha and goes with Sol.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > High Republic Era (c. 500 – 100 BBY) > Late High Republic Era (227 BBY – 100 BBY) > 132 BBY :: After discovering Mae has disguised herself, Sol takes her to Brendok while Osha and the Stranger, who have formed a tentative alliance, also travel to Brendok to prevent Mae from killing Sol. Both the sisters and Sol and the Stranger duel . After Sol admits to killing her mother, Osha kills him. The Stranger erases Mae's memory and Osha agrees to train with Qimir on a planet where Darth Plagueis lurks in the shadows.

The child's Force-sensitivity manifests itself rapidly, scaring his father, who hates and fears those he dismissed as "freaks." Gora contacts the Jedi Order and tells them to take his son. However, instead of waiting for the Jedi seekers to arrive, Gora abandons the infant outside his palace on the edges of the forest without clothes or any form of identification. A seeker rescues Dooku before he freezes to death or is eaten by spine-wolves , and brings the child to the Jedi Grand Temple on Coruscant.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY :: 90 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > 90 BBY :: Along with Jedi younglings including Dooku and Sifo-Dyas, Jedi High Council members Yula Braylon, Tera Sinube , and Yoda visit a festival held in the city of Carannia , capital of Serenno, with the objective of showing what the Outer Rim Territories planets can offer to the Galactic Republic, and presided over by the count of Serenno Gora.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > 90 BBY :: While on the festival, Dooku uses his Force powers and an electroblade to save two kids being harassed by a trio of thugs that are threatening to kidnap them, who turn out to be Jenza and Ramil. When she learns Dooku is from Serenno, Jenza offers to give Dooku a tour of the homeworld he never knew, eventually reaching the Great Assembly House , where she shows him the seals of the seven houses and tells him the legend of how her ancestors liberated the planet from the Sith Empire. Dooku feels drawn to an ancient carving of a Tirra'Taka , an ancient dragon of the planet, and his finger brushes the stone, a groundquake causes the building around them to collapse. It takes the intervention of Master Yoda to free the two from the rubble, and once the other Masters help the Grand Master remove the collapsed structure from the area, Count Gora of Serenno furiously confronts Yoda when he hears Dooku's name being voiced, yelling at the Jedi that he never wishes to see his son again. It is there that the young Jedi learns that Gora is his Father and Jenza his sister.

Arath Tarrex, secretly the son of Jedi Council member Yula Braylon, is not selected after mocking Dooku for wanting to be selected by the Altiri Master Kostana.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY :: 85 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > 85 BBY :: Sifo-Dyas receives a Force vision of a deadly solar storm hitting the planet Protobranch . After informing the Jedi Council, he, Dooku and Kostana's pledge to warn the planet, but is forbidden by Yoda and the Council, who points out that Force visions are not absolute and the future is always in motion. Frustrated with the Council, Dooku, Kostana, and Sifo-Dyas go behind the Council's back to inform Tavetti , the senator of Protobranch, of the vision. Afterwards, Dooku, Kostana, Sifo-Dyas and a reluctant Yoda go to the planet itself. Ultimately, Sifo-Dyas' vision comes to pass; a powerful solar storm hits Protobranch, killing much of the population, with the Jedi themselves barely surviving.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY :: 82 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > 82 BBY :: A funeral is held for Countess Anya of House Serenno on the funeral moon of Serenno . A protest breaks out during Lady Jenza 's speech honoring her mother, with rocks being thrown at Count Gora . Dooku attends the funeral of his mother and his father Gora physically and verbally assaults him.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > 82 BBY :: Master Kostana undertakes a mission to the planet Asusto in order to track down rumors of Sith artifacts on the black market. After infiltrating a smuggler ring on Karazak , Kostana and Sifo-Dyas are led to Asusto, taking Dooku with them. They encounter several Abyssin smuggling nerve disruptors , who Dooku kills in a fit of rage. However, before they can verify the rumors of Sith artifacts, they are captured by the last remaining coven of the Presagers of Hakotei , who enact a dark side ritual using Dooku. He experiences a series of visions of his future, and he uses Force lightning for the first time in order to kill his captors.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > 82 BBY :: Maarva Carassi Andor is born.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > 68 BBY :: Members of Jedi Councilor Tera Sinube's Heliost Clan —amongst them Ima-Gun Di , Gretz Droom, Qui-Gon Jinn, Ky Narec , and Yeeda —are selected to undergo their Initiate Trials . Droom is apprenticed to High Council member Jor Aerith , Narec is apprenticed to Master Mana , and Jinn is apprenticed to Jedi Master Dooku. (Approximate date) Eventually, they expose the corrupt nature of the Jedi Arath Tarrex, who is sent to work in the Jedi Archives as a punishment. Tarrex is also discovered to be the son of Jedi Master Yula Braylon, who loses her seat on the High Council as a result.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > 68 BBY :: The Jedi Rael Averross, Dooku, Elio and Qui-Gon Jinn fight in a battle on the planet Shurrupak .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY :: Between 68 BBY and 58 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > Between 68 BBY and 58 BBY :: Dooku and Qui-Gon are send on a mission to rescue the son of Republic Senator Dagonet , who is being held captive by the residents of the Senator's home planet. After their investigation, they discoverd that the Dagonet is allowing his people to starve for his own personal greed and corruption. The kidnappers abducted Dagonet's son to protest his inhumane policies and discover that Dagonet's son is yet unharmed. Dagonet arrives to rescue his son, resulting in a brief shootout between the Senator's forces and the Jedi-backed kidnappers. During a lull in the firefight, Dagonet threatenes to burn the entire village down and many others to make an example of them. An enraged Dooku begins Force-choking Dagonet with the intent to kill him, but Qui-Gon releases Dagonet's son and manages to defuse the situation without any further violence.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY :: 66 BBY

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > 66 BBY :: A Jedi strike team carries out an operation on the planet Numidian Prime to capture the bounty hunter Shenda Mol . After arresting Mol's followers , Dooku and Qui-Gon track Mol and Jinn pursues her on a speeder bike to her valley stronghold but stalls when she holds him at blaster-point. Mol then threatens to kill him, aiming to complete her goal of eliminating one target of every age up to two hundred years old. However, before she can strike, Dooku arrives and attacks the bounty hunter with Force lightning . Afterward, Mol is imprisoned on the planet Stygeon Prime .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > 66 BBY :: Pirates enslave the family of Shmi Skywalker .

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY :: 65 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > 65 BBY :: After centuries of using energy from small outlying mines, the Theed power generator is built by Outer Rim Construction and Assembly as part of a joint venture between Damask Holdings and Naboo to expand the planet's plasma refining industry. The power generator complex also serves as headquarters of the Royal Naboo Security Forces and its Naboo Royal Space Fighter Corps , and is unveiled with ceremonies presided by Senator Palpatine of Naboo. With its efficient, mechanistic design breaking with Naboo's tradition, the power generator becomes a popular attraction with its tours while mining much more than needed, with surplus plasma sold off-world and directly to the Trade Federation. Theed Spaceport is also expanded by ORCA as part of Damask Holding's business venture with Naboo.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > 49 BBY :: Nim Pianna becomes Rael Averross' Padawan.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > 49 BBY :: Gehren Rand , a Jedi Initiate part of the Kybuck Clan at the Jedi Temple , leaves the temple the night before her and her fellow Jedi Initiate Obi-Wan Kenobi are supposed to leave for Ilum to participate in the Gathering , in order to go help her father , who she has seen in danger in Force visions. She eventually makes a deal with the Black Sun Lieutenant Nodrus Cay to be taken offworld in exchange for Eadun silver . Kenobi catches up with Rand, and Cay, having learned the two are Jedi, decides that she wants to take them into her service and has them cuffed. The two Initiates eventually manage to escape, though Rand does not return to the Temple with Kenobi, and instead leaves to help her father.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > 49 BBY :: Zodu Onglo is born.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY :: 48 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > 48 BBY :: A mutiny takes place aboard the cargo freighter Advent , tasked with delivering food to a famine stricken star system. During the mutiny, the head Jedi in charge of protecting the ship, Rael Averross , decides to confront the mutineers alongside his Padawan Nim Pianna in the cargo bay of the Advent as opposed to following normal procedure and retaking control of the bridge of the ship. The skirmish in the cargo bay between the mutineers and the two Jedi results in Pianna's death when she is hit by a slicer dart which caused her to briefly turn on her Master, forcing him to kill her with his lightsaber. By the end of the mutiny, all mutineers were either defeated or arrested.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > 48 BBY :: Upon return to the Jedi Temple on Coruscant, Averross is put on trial by the Jedi High Council who rules that his actions were necessary to save the lives of the passengers of the Advent . After the trial, Averross is sent on an eight year assignment to the planet Pijal to mentor the planet's Princess Fanry .

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY :: 46 BBY

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > 46 BBY :: A large number of attacks in the Greater Seswenna on ore convoys owned by Eriadu Mining and Shipping are conducted by marauders led by the Pirate Queen Q'anah . The Outland Regions Security Force can not defend all the convoys, defending mainly the valuable shipments, and their warships are constantly being monitored by the pirates so that Q'anah's flotilla can perform raids on certain convoys at the right time. In the Outland's anti-pirate taskforce , Wilhuff Tarkin analyses the raids done by Q'anah and finds a pattern in how the convoys were attacked, but his paternal cousin Ranulph Tarkin refuses to test his theory, and decides to secrete a virus into the hyperdrive motivator of specific containers targeted by Q'anah. The attacks increase in the process putting Eriadu Mining on the brink of financial ruin, but despite the rising tensions, Ranulph's plan works and the virus gets into the main computers of the pirate ships and overrides their navigation computer, sending them to the location of a waiting Outland Security fleet. Q'anah and her crew are boarded, captured and put in a transport programmed to fly into a nearby sun.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > 46 BBY :: Padmé Amidala Naberrie (née Naberrie ) is born on Naboo into Ruwee and Jobal Naberrie .

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > 42 BBY :: By this point, Yoda had brought Gheyr from a battle between Wookiees and Trandoshans on Alaris Prime to the Jedi Temple to train as a Jedi. The friendships between younglings Gheyr, Jak'zin , and Krrsish were threatened by the latter's dark visions, and Gheyr eventually leaves her Jedi training and departs Coruscant with Master Dooku.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > 42 BBY :: Gallius Rax is born on Jakku.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > 42 BBY :: Rael Averross introduces Dooku to Palpatine.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > 42 BBY :: Ramil, the Count of Serenno , orchestrates an invasion of Serenno . With the Republic refusing to aide the supposedly independent world, Dooku is asked by his sister Jenza to provide Jedi assistance. Despite the disapproval of Councilor Gretz Droom and his Mirialan master, Jor Aerith, the Jedi Council chooses to follow the Republic's decision.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > 42 BBY :: Ramil is killed and replaced by Dooku as the Count of Serenno, the Jedi Master becoming the wealthiest man in the galaxy. Dooku leaves the Jedi Order and eventually becomes the Sith Lord Darth Tyranus, apprenticed to Darth Sidious.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > 40 BBY :: Around this time, Jedi Master Yoda rescues the Force-sensitive youngling Lo from the Flesh Mongers , pirates on Botor who were fearful of Lo's powers. Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > 40 BBY :: Yoda finds an embattled world of warring children powerful in stonepower , a Force power attained from connection to the Living Force –imbued blue stone .

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > 40 BBY :: After years of the Chiss Defense Force pleeding to the ruling Chiss Syndicure to expand its capabilities and mandate, the Chiss Expansionary Defense Fleet is formed, with the mission to "watch over Chiss interests in the parts of the Chaos extending beyond the Ascendancy's borders, to learn who was out there and assess their level of threat." The Aristocra provide funding for many new ships, bases, and support facilities. (Approximate date)
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY :: Between 40 BBY and 34 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > Between 40 BBY and 34 BBY :: Following centuries of distrust and tension between the neighboring cultures of the Vekurans and Syrinxians , the planet Syrinx Prime is invaded , leading to open warfare with the planet Vekura . Supreme Chancellor Valorum sends a group of Jedi to stop the conflict, while Yoda , Mace Windu , Ki-Adi-Mundi , Vetna Mooncrest and Obi-Wan Kenobi try to thwart the first attack on Syrinx Prime, Qui-Gon Jinn and Berem Khana try to unsuccessfully negotiate with the Vekuran General Lafco, and Adi Gallia and Seera Longa find a large prison camp of Vekurans on Syrinx Prime. After the meeting with General Lafco, Master Jinn becomes the victim of a seemingly unrelated murder attempt by a masked assassin , who after having failed, flees the scene. After a discussion of the High Council is held, the Jedi come to believe that both worlds are guilty, and decide to sabotage the Vekuran shipyards and Syrinxian weapons forge to push them to push General Lafco and President Hoss into negotiating a truce.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > Between 40 BBY and 34 BBY :: The Jedi Yoda and Vetna Mooncrest are dispatched on a mission to the remote moon of Veeros to investigate experiments being carried out by the moon's sole inhabitant, Atha Prime . Traveling in a Consular -class space cruiser piloted by Captain Maoi Madakor and Antidar Williams , the Jedi arrive at Atha Prime's palace and are greeted by his droid majordomo Blue-Tark who shows them Prime's renowned bio-fields . Suspecting that there is more being hidden from them, the Jedi leave but return several hours later under the cover of solar activity on the south side of the palace. Entering the structure, they discover a horde of xerexi that Prime had created and battle them before encountering Prime himself. Prime managedsto escape from the Jedi on a starship, but other members of the Jedi Order arrive and eliminate the remaining xerexi on the moon.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > Between 40 BBY and 34 BBY :: Qui-Gon Jinn and Obi-Wan Kenobi go on a mission to locate and recover Senator Bail Organa and his staff after they crash in an CR70 corvette on the uncharted Planet WG4587 .Before they can reach the corvette, the Jedi's T-6 shuttle is destroyed by a kaijura , but the pair escape the creature and make their way to Organa on foot. On board the corvette, the Jedi learn the vessel was damaged and that a pack of at least nine kaijura is rapidly approaching. Jinn orders the ship to launch and uses the Force to aid it, ordering Captain Jeremoch Colton to launch all the vessel's escape pods into a kaijura that trapps the corvette in mid-air. Once the creature lets go, the corvette is able to escape from Planet WG4587 and return safely home.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > Between 40 BBY and 34 BBY :: Robbery of the Galactic Bank of Coruscant .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > Between 40 BBY and 34 BBY :: Incident on Liskan .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > Between 40 BBY and 34 BBY :: The assassin Corlis Rath and Qui-Gon Jinn engage in a duel on the agriworld of Mina-Rau . Having poisoned and killed the Jedi Master Fondar Etzis with a fast acting toxin, Rath draws Jinn to Mina-Rau to surprise and kill the Jedi, whom he has been hunting because of an incident that occurred when Jinn was a Padawan. Arriving on Mina-Rau as part of an honor guard with fellow Master Mace Windu and Jedi Knight Aayla Secura , Jinn puts together that Etzis has been murdered and senses the assassin's approach when he finally reveals himself, whereas Windu and Secura are caught off guard and knocked out via poison darts. Rath engaged Qui-Gon and reveals his vendetta against the Jedi has something to do with the dangerous world of Sinsara , something that shocks Jinn and gives Rath and opening to stab him through the chest. Poisoned, Jinn's condition is nearly fatal. In order to save Jinn's life, Secura and Windu need to journey to Sinsara itself to find an antidote.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > Between 40 BBY and 34 BBY :: Mace Windu and Aayla Secura travel to the planet Sinsara to find an antidote for the Emubara poison that has been administered to Qui-Gon Jinn, where they find a civilisation that despises the Jedi, but guides them in the direction to the equally despised group called The Banished . Meeting the King of The Banished, he agrees to provide them with the antidote for the toxin, as long as they kill a kaijura that was brought to the planet years ago and seasonally kills the people of Sinsara. Slaying the creature, who was suffering from being removed from its natural habitat, they are given the antidote they need. Taking Qui-Gon back to Coruscant, he is saved from the toxin, but with severe injuries he is placed into a medically induced coma for the foreseeable future.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > 37 BBY :: Qui-Gon Jinn and Obi-Wan Kenobi are sent to peacefully resolve a dispute on the planet Bri'n between the Metal Clan and the people of Mistress Th'er , the priestess of wood. The leader of the Metal Clan attempts to capture Th'er so that either her word or her blood can be used to destroy her trees. Surrounded by forces of the Metal Clan, Jinn chooses to escape with Mistress Th'er in an Eta -class shuttle and return to Coruscant. Jinn, concerned that the Jedi are seen as warriors of the Republic, seeks guidance from the Cosmic Force. Jinn realizes that the Jedi should pursue balance, for light to finds its way and live through the darkness, coexisting in harmony, through means beyond conflict and violence. He meets with Th'er, suggesting her to recruit allies to her cause to help fight against the Metal Clan.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > 37 BBY :: Mitth'raw'nuru "Thrawn" graduates from the Taharim Academy on Naporar , becoming a lieutenant in the Chiss Expansionary Defense Fleet .

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > 36 BBY :: Queen Amee's reign ends; beginning of Queen Réillata's first term.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > 36 BBY :: A skirmish takes place in the Chiss Ascendancy 's Kinoss system between the Chiss Expansionary Defense Fleet and pirates of the Lioaoin Regime . Prior to the skirmish, Junior Commander Mitth'raw'nuru "Thrawn" of the Expansionary Defense Fleet believes he can prove that the Regime is supporting piracy against the Chiss and other peoples of the region. As such, he undertakes a mission to the Lioaoin heartworld under the guise of a merchant, loudly broadcast that he has discovered pirates, and bait Lioaoin security ships to attack his vessel. Thrawn and the Lioaoin pirates are both navigating using Pathfinder navigators, who have the ability to track each other through hyperspace using the Force. Thrawn uses it to his advantage, baiting the Lioaoin corsairs to pursue his freighter through hyperspace to the Kinoss system, where Mid Captain Irizi'ar'alani of the Chiss patrol cruiser Parala lies in wait. The corsairs fall into Thrawn's trap and are destroyed by the Parala upon arrival. Following the skirmish, the Chiss officers were promoted. It marks the start of the Chiss Ascendancy's Lioaoin pirate campaign . (Approximate date)

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > 35 BBY :: Ahsoka Tano is discovered to be Force-sensitive after an encounter with a raxshir .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > 35 BBY :: Lioaoin pirates attack a Garwian merchant station over the Garwian Unity planet of Stivic , a trade hub for the local nations of the Unknown Regions. Senior Captain Irizi'ar'alani of the Parala receives a Garwian distress call. Senior Commander Mitth'raw'nuru beggs her to assist the Garwians, as the Lioaoins are also a threat to the Chiss Ascendancy , while Mid Captain Roscu objects as the Ascendancy's non-intervention policy prohibits Chiss Defense Force personnel from engaging in first strikes. But as does not prohibit observation of hostilities between other factions, the Parala goes to observe the battle. Senior Captain Ziara permitts Thrawn to 'calibrate' the ranging lasers, which he uses to send a message to the Garwians in modulated laserfire and tell them how to defeat the Lioaoins. The pirates are defeated by the Garwian Unity forces led by Officer Frangelic . (Approximate date)

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > 34 BBY :: By this point, Mace Windu had rescued a young girl named Depa Billaba , who was born on Chalacta . The youngling was brought to the Jedi Temple for training.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > 34 BBY :: By around this point, Finis Valorum had replaced Skor Kalpana as Supreme Chancellor of the Galactic Republic.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > 34 BBY :: Mace Windu, Depa Billaba, Plo Koon, Qui-Gon Jinn, and other Jedi liberate the child soldiers used by Hutt-assisted warlord Guattako on Oosalon . While Windu wanted the child soldiers to find new lives, Grandmaster Yoda asserts that the Jedi Order cannot interfere in local laws, and that the children must face imprisonment for their role in terrorist attacks.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > 34 BBY :: A battle takes place at the Malastare Narrows after the Corporate Alliance Admiral Trench blockades the planet Malastare , and a Republic fleet, in which Wullf Yularen serves as one of the leading officers, attacks Trench's forces . Trench repels them with ease, causing significant losses to the Republic, so a task force led by Jedi Master Kep-She destroys Trench's flagship and supposedly killed him. However, Trench survives the battle.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > 34 BBY :: At age 12, Padmé Naberrie's participation in the Legislative Youth Program leads to her meeting and falling in love with the slightly elder Palo Jemabie .

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > 33 BBY :: The Naboo Crisis is fermented as the Eriadu Conference occurs; as planned by the Sith Darth Sidious, Supreme Chancellor Finis Valorum survives an assassination attempt with a temporary boost in popularity whilst the Trade Federation leadership, as well as potential candidates for the position, including several key executives of Kuat Drive Yards, are killed by the radical political group known as the Nebula Front . Nute Gunray ascends to the position of the Viceroy of the Trade Federation and appoints his allies to powerful positions within the Federation.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > 33 BBY :: Around this time, Darth Sidious deploys Darth Maul to prevent his plans from being exposed by eliminating all participants and witnesses of a pirate attack on a Trade Federation fleet .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > 33 BBY :: On his personal quest for the auctioned Jedi Padawan Eldra Kaitis , Maul recruits bounty hunters on Nar Shaddaa. Maul's group include Cad Bane, Vorhdeilo , and the Nar Shaddaa-born Aurra Sing . The Sith eventually kills Kaitis and the auction host, Boss-Mistress Xev Xrexus of the Xrexus Cartel .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > c. 100 – 32 BBY > 33 BBY :: A robbery takes place at the Republic Regional Headquarters on the planet Jaloria . The Hope of Glee Anselm , an artifact of the Anselmi and Nautolan species of the planet Glee Anselm , is being presented by the Republic at a ceremony to support a treaty to end the war between the two. A group of thieves interrupts the ceremony and steal the artifact, with one thief escaping alive as Republic troops kill the others. Following the heist, the bounty hunter Jango Fett is hired to track down the thieves and recover the artifact.
