Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) > 32 BBY (continued) :: Jedi Master Sifo-Dyas had foreseen an upcoming full-scale conflict, but was accused of war-mongering and removed from the Jedi Council. He is sent by the Jedi Council to resolve a tribal dispute on Felucia, but instead secretly goes to negotiate with the Pykes on Oba Diah along with Chancellor Valorum's aide, Silman , per the Chancellor's initiative.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) > 32 BBY (continued) :: Supreme Chancellor Finis Valorum secretly dispatches Qui-Gon Jinn and Obi-Wan Kenobi to serve as the ambassadors for scheduled negotiations with the Federation in hopes of resolving the Naboo Crisis.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) > 32 BBY (continued) :: Invasion of Naboo; Darth Sidious further manipulates the Trade Federation leadership into instigating a peace crisis for the Republic with the deployment of military forces for the occupation of the harmonious world of Naboo.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) > 32 BBY (continued) > Invasion of Naboo; Darth Sidious further manipulates the Trade Federation leadership into instigating a peace crisis for the Republic with the deployment of military forces for the occupation of the harmonious world of Naboo. :: The Capture of Theed ; the Trade Federation Droid Army establishes itself at the Naboo capital and begins forcefully removing its citizens to prison camps.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) > 32 BBY (continued) :: Battle of Naboo . Queen Amidala returns to Naboo and forms an alliance between the Naboo and Gungans . Qui-Gon Jinn is killed by Darth Maul, who, in turn, is dealt a mortal wound by Obi-Wan Kenobi in the Padawan's rage. Anakin Skywalker deactivates the droid army by destroying the Droid Control Ship .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) > 32 BBY (continued) :: Darth Sidious orders Dooku to arrange for Sifo-Dyas' murder. Dooku fakes Sifo-Dyas' death on Felucia during the tribal conflict there.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) > Before or during 29 BBY :: An archaeological excavation on the planet Dallenor is led by the archaeologist Clatriffe . The first artifacts uncovered in the excavation include ancient broken droid parts, but eventually an item thought to be a Jedi holocron is found. The Krypder Riders , a pirate gang led by Hudso Shaku , attempts to steal the holocron from the archaeologists, leading Clatriffe to hire some of the planet's natives to protect the area. The Jedi Council receives a message about the holocron, sending Obi-Wan Kenobi and Anakin Skywalker on a mission to verify the holocron and return it to the Jedi Order, in Skywalker's first field mission. After meeting with Clatriffe, Kenobi takes the holocron, but the Krypder Riders arrive to take the artifact for themselves. Hudso Shaku confronts Kenobi and notices his lightsaber , wishing to acquire it instead. With help from Skywalker, Kenobi deals with the pirates as peacefully as he can, taking the holocron back to the Jedi.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) > 29 BBY :: Obi-Wan Kenobi and Anakin Skywalker are send on a mission to the Moons of Varl in the Varl system in order to rescue the missing Senate Intelligence Officer Yarg'l . A splinter faction of the criminal Pyke Syndicate led by Baron Grott has set up the Varl Tournament on the moons, operating out of the first moon Black Rock , and are secretly breeding Kayfoundo Kapa , space-borne predators who hunted the Hutts away from their homeworld of Varl . Skywalker enters the tournament undercover and eventually locates Yarg'l, freeding the officer and negotiating their release before taking part in the final race of the tournament, in which the Hutt Neyfig releases the Kayfoundo Kapa. The creatures overrun the Varl system while the Jedi arrest Grott and Neyfig, and the star system is abandoned and quarantined.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) > 29 BBY :: Palpatine takes Skywalker undercover in Coruscant's lower levels.

The Jedi find a war-torn world, split between the Open and Closed factions in the Open-Closed War . The Jedi Order and a Galactic Republic Judicial Forces fleet arrive shortly after, enforcing a cease in hostilities. (Approximate date)

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) > 27 BBY > The Chiss Ascendancy undertakes a series of operations against the Vagaari pirates . :: The first battle between the Vagaari pirates and Chiss Senior Captain Thrawn takes place in the Unknown Regions , where Thrawn retrievies a Vagaari gravity-well generator . The capture of the generator persuades the Chiss Obbic family to ally itself with the senior captain's Mitth family .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) > 27 BBY > The Chiss Ascendancy undertakes a series of operations against the Vagaari pirates . :: A starship hailing from beyond the Unknown Regions gets involved in the Vagaari pirate operations. Syndic Mitth'ras'safis , Thrawn's brother , and a human female steal the starship from the Chaf family , after a Chaf task force captures it. The pair crashes the ship in an attempt to save the people aboard, which, while it would allow the survivors to thrive for generations with the ship's supplies, according to Thrass's human companion, results in the pair's death.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) > 27 BBY > The Chiss Ascendancy undertakes a series of operations against the Vagaari pirates . :: Senior Captain Thrawn severely beats the Vagaari pirates in their last confrontation.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) > 27 BBY > The Chiss Ascendancy undertakes a series of operations against the Vagaari pirates . :: The loss of the Galactic Republic technology within the ship and the death of Syndic Thrass result in the Ascendancy's ruling body being unhappy with Thrawn, whose Chiss heavy cruiser Springhawk is taken away as retaliation for his failure. He sustains injuries during the Vagaari pirate operations, and has to undergo physical therapy at the Chiss Expansionary Fleet medcenter on the planet Naporar .

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) > 25 BBY :: Yupe Tashu , advisor to Darth Sidious, instructs droids to excavate Jakku's Plaintive Hand plateau for the Jakku Observatory. Gallius Rax enters Sidious' service as the project's guard.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) > 25 BBY :: Bodhi Rook is born.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) > 25 BBY :: Yendor is born
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) > 25 BBY :: Sarco Plank is born. on Li-Toran . (Approximate date)
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) > 25 BBY :: Jek Lawquane is born on Saleucami .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) > 25 BBY :: Lyra and Galen Walton Erso are married on Coruscant .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) :: 24 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) > 24 BBY :: Count Dooku delivers the Raxus Address , the Confederacy of Independent Systems is founded.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) > 24 BBY :: The Separatist Crisis begins.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) > 24 BBY > The Separatist Crisis begins. :: Thousands of star systems leave the Republic and join the Confederacy, and they establish the Separatist Senate .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) > 24 BBY > The Separatist Crisis begins. :: The Republic Senate passes the Emergency Powers Act to ensure Palpatine could remain Supreme Chancellor long after his term's expiry. Palpatine forms his own Loyalist Committee .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) > 24 BBY > The Separatist Crisis begins. :: The Galactic Senate debates the Military Creation Act to determine whether the Galactic Republic should raise an army.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) > 24 BBY :: The Alpha tribes people on the planet Kenari launch an exploratory mission with the hope to secure supplies from a crashed Republic transpo corsair . The Republic ship has the logo of the recently formed Confederacy of Independent Systems , and the crew has succumbed to a poison. A surviving Republic officer kills the Alpha leader , leading to the children killing the officer but leaving with their leader's body. However, one boy, Kassa , is left angered and enters the crashed starship, where he finds the remains of the poisoned crew and begins destroying his surroundings. There, he is found by the Andor family of scavengers, who take him off-world to keep him save from an incoming Republic reprisal. (Approximate date)
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) > 24 BBY :: Han joins the White Worms as a Scrumrat after his father leaves him.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) > 24 BBY :: Queen Jamillia begins her second term.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) > 24 BBY :: Chelli Lona Aphra is born to Korin and Lona Aphra .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) :: 23 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) > 23 BBY :: Senator Amidala, though a member of Palpatine's Loyalist Committee, begins working to defeat the Military Creation Act.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) > 23 BBY :: Orson Callan Krennic helps engineer the construction and overhaul facility .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) > 23 BBY :: Dalven Kyrell is born on Jelucan.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) > 23 BBY :: Jango Fett takes his son, Boba, on a hunt on Ord Mantell with a team of three other hunters. The Fetts are betrayed by two of the hunters, though they are killed by Boba, who lets the third hunter go to spread word of the incident. Boba Fett thus begins to build his reputation.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) > 23 BBY :: Ketsu Onyo is born on Shukut . (Approximate date)

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) :: 22 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) > 22 BBY :: The mother of the individual who came to be known as TK-462 gives birth to Xea on Eriadu. (Approximate date)
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) > 22 BBY :: Border dispute on Ansion occurs with Skywalker and Kenobi involved. The result of the border dispute left the galaxy staggered.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) > 22 BBY :: By this point, the Naboo spice-miners' strikes that occurred after the Invasion of Naboo has begun for months.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) > 22 BBY :: Plot to assassinate Senator Amidala . Separatist leaders hope to silence the senator from Naboo, who opposes the Military Creation Act. The bounty hunter Jango Fett is hired. He uses Zam Wesell in two attempts which failed. Zam is captured, but Jango kills her to prevent the Jedi from questioning her.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) > 22 BBY :: Mission to Kamino . Obi-Wan Kenobi uses Fett's Kamino saberdart to trace him to the Kamino system in the Outer Rim. There he finds the clone army commissioned by Sifo-Dyas. He finds Jango Fett, and the two battle. Fett escapes with his son Boba, and Obi-Wan tracks him to Geonosis .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) > 22 BBY :: Anakin is charged with the protection of Senator Padmé Amidala. They go covertly travel to the latter's homeworld while Kenobi searches for the assassin . As they spend more time together, the two fall in love.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) > 22 BBY :: Anakin is haunted by dreams of his mother dying. Believing them to be true, he returns to his homeworld of Tatooine and conducts a mission to prevent her from dying . He finds Shmi in a Tusken Raider camp , who then dies in his arms . In a fit of rage, he slaughters the Tusken Raiders and swears that he will never again be powerless in the face of death after his mother's funeral .

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) > 22 BBY :: Jar Jar Binks proposes that Chancellor Palpatine be given emergency powers to raise an army without the interference of the Senate. The proposal is accepted, and the clone army developed by the Kaminoans is recognized as the Grand Army of the Republic .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) > 22 BBY :: Geonosian Archduke Poggle the Lesser , an long-time, ardent supporter of the Separatist cause, hosts the Separatist Council within the hive galleries of his ruling Stalgasin hive colony.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) > 22 BBY :: The various corporation leaders on the Council, including Nute Gunray of the Trade Federation, ratifies the Geonosian accord ; the Confederacy of Independent Systems is officially founded.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Prelude to galactic war (32–22 BBY) > 22 BBY :: Obi-Wan Kenobi is captured on Geonosis whilst reporting his findings of the Trade Federation presence and the Separatists' battle droid production to Jedi Councilors Yoda and Mace Windu. Anakin Skywalker and Padmé Amidala go to his rescue but are captured also. The three are set to be executed after their refusal to join the Sith and surrender to Poggle and the Separatists. Amongst themselves, the Jedi assemble a strike team of over two-hundred to save those captured by the Geonosians , whilst Jedi Master Yoda travels to Kamino to gather the Republic's new army.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY :: The Clone Wars begins with the First Battle of Geonosis ; end of the millennium-long Great Peace .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY > The Clone Wars begins with the First Battle of Geonosis ; end of the millennium-long Great Peace . :: Mace Windu kills Jango Fett, fueling Boba Fett's hatred towards the Jedi.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY > The Clone Wars begins with the First Battle of Geonosis ; end of the millennium-long Great Peace . :: Most of the Jedi strike team are killed in their attempt to rescue Obi-Wan Kenobi, Anakin Skywalker, and Padmé Amidala from execution.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY > The Clone Wars begins with the First Battle of Geonosis ; end of the millennium-long Great Peace . :: Led by Yoda, the Grand Army of the Republic engages Separatist forces on Geonosis, grounding many enemies vessels and thus most of their forces. However, the attack of the clones failed to prevent the escape of the Separatist Council.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY > The Clone Wars begins with the First Battle of Geonosis ; end of the millennium-long Great Peace . :: Anakin Skywalker loses his right forearm to Count Dooku.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY > The Clone Wars begins with the First Battle of Geonosis ; end of the millennium-long Great Peace . :: Darth Tyranus escapes Geonosis with the plans of a battle station designed by the Geonosians. The Sith apprentice presents the plans to Darth Sidious on Coruscant.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY :: Anakin Skywalker and Padmé Amidala secretly wed on the Varykino island, at the Lake Country of the planet Naboo. The ceremony is officiated by Maxiron Agolerga , Pontifex of the Brotherhood of Cognizance , and witnessed by C-3PO and R2-D2.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY :: The Republic Grand Army assembles on Coruscant as surviving Jedi from Geonosis return to the planet's Jedi Temple.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY :: With their victory on Geonosis, the Republic occupies the world, though they find that they could not afford to maintain the occupation. The planet is retaken by Separatist forces within a year and Poggle the Lesser quickly restarts his droid foundries.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY :: The Antar 4 schism that began prior to the outbreak of the Clone Wars further divides the moon's population; Separatists force many Gotals to flee off-world.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY > The Antar 4 schism that began prior to the outbreak of the Clone Wars further divides the moon's population; Separatists force many Gotals to flee off-world. :: Skywalker and Kenobi are deployed to the Moon of Staggec to rescue Amidala and senator Yarua . Kenobi duels Grievous and Yarua sacrifices himself to save his daughter Viiveenn .

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY :: Sabé and Captain Tonra travel to Tatooine, sent by Padmé Amidala, to attempt to free enslaved individuals there. They spend six weeks in Mos Espa and buy a hundred slaves in order to free them, taking them to the planet Karlinus for a new life.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY :: Forces of the Separatist Droid Army besiege the major population centers of the unaligned, resource-rich planet Hebekrr Major , hoping to claim it for the Separatists. A company of the Grand Army of the Republic, led by Jedi General Sivad and Clone Commander Sticks , defend the civilians of the planet from the attacks.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY :: High Jedi General Obi-Wan Kenobi, Clone Commander " Cody ," Jedi Commander Anakin Skywalker, and clone trooper " Sister " battle Separatist droids together.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY :: A sudden strike on Bracca is carried out by the Confederacy of Independent Systems, The Republic sends a battalion of clone troopers led by newly promoted Jedi Knight Cyruss Okent to respond to the attack.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY :: Following a Confederacy attack on the resource-rich planet Langston that devastated the world's infrastructure, a Jedi-Republic aid mission is led by newly-promoted Jedi Knights Anakin Skywalker and D'urban Wen-Hurd , who are assisted by the 302nd Battalion .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY :: The Cadesura disaster takes place on Cato Neimoidia. Obi-Wan Kenobi and Anakin Skywalker embark on a mission to Cato Neimoidia , where they first meet Asajj Ventress.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY :: The Jedi Knights are made Jedi Generals of the Republic.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY :: Operation on Hissrich ; Mace Windu brings a Jedi strike force consisting of himself, Kit Fisto , Prosset Dibs , and Rissa Mano to the planet Hissrich to stop a Separatist mining operation.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY :: A pair of Confederate gunships ambush a Republic troop transport, causing it to crash and killing or injuring the majority of the clone troopers on board. One of the survivors, Cut Lawquane , flees and deserts the Republic during the battle.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY :: Knighted to fight in the Clone Wars, Jedi General Anakin Skywalker leads Clone Captain Rex in the Battle of Arantara .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY :: Anakin Skywalker gains a scar by his right eye.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY :: Anakin Skywalker leads the 501st Legion on a mission to the planet Benglor in an investigation of Separatist activity. They discover traces of Separatist battle droids, but are attacked by a hostile creature that kills clone trooper Bellow .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY :: Battle of Corvair , in the Corvair sector . Skywalker's forces discover and destroy a Separatist droid factory on Kudo III with the assistance of Admiral Wullf Yularen .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY :: Jedi General Plo Koon and the Wolfpack lead a mission to Quarmendy ; the Nexus trading post is destroyed by Separatist leader Emir Wat Tambor.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY :: The Separatist siege the planet Hisseen ; Republic forces are sent to prevent the fall of the planet to Confederate hands after the Separatists take the Hisseenian parliament hostage.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY :: The Battle of Christophsis ensues as Anakin Skywalker and Obi-Wan Kenobi send supplies to Senator Bail Organa and his relief effort on Christophsis .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY :: Rotta , son of Jabba the Hutt , is kidnapped by Dooku's assassin, Asajj Ventress. The blame is then placed on the Republic by the Separatists in an attempt to destroy the former's reputation with the Hutts, in the hopes that Hutt Space could be opened up to themselves for their war efforts against the Republic.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY :: Anakin Skywalker takes Ahsoka Tano as his Padawan on Christophsis.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY :: Dispatched by Ziro the Hutt , KRONOS-327 fails in his assassination mission to the twelfth moon of Yout .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY :: The Grand Army of the Republic assault a B'omarr Monastery in Hutt-controlled Teth where Rotta the Hutt was being held by Ventress and Separatist forces. Rotta is rescued and his kidnapping by the Separatist uncovered.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY :: Anakin Skywalker and Ahsoka Tano return Rotta to Jabba the Hutt on Tatooine after taking down IG-100 MagnaGuards and dueling Count Dooku, leading to a Hutt Clan–Republic treaty .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY :: After traveling to Ziro Desilijic Tiure's nightclub, which doubled as his palace , Senator Padmé Amidala overhears Ziro conspiring with Count Dooku. She is captured and taken to the palace dungeon, where she is able to contact her protocol droid, C-3PO, who contacts the Coruscant Guard . They dispatch a team, led by Clone Commander Fox , to storm the palace. The senator is rescued and Ziro is arrested.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY :: Ryloth is invaded by Separatist forces; the Battle of Ryloth begins between the invading droid army and a Twi'lek Resistance led by General Cham Syndulla .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY :: Republic Senator Bail Organa and Junior Representative Jar Jar Binks persuade Toydaria 's government to allow for the planet to be used as a staging ground for relief supplies to be delivered to the embattled Ryloth .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY :: The Ambush on Rugosa occurs. Through perseverance and humor, Jedi Master Yoda brought inspiration to three clone troopers against even the full force of Asajj Ventress' army , thus securing the allegiance of the Toydarian king Katuunko for the Republic.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY :: Count Dooku and General Grievous launch a multy-month campaign using Grievous's flagship, the Subjugator -class heavy cruiser Malevolence . It features two mega-ion cannons , which can be used to knock out entire Republic fleets.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY > Count Dooku and General Grievous launch a multy-month campaign using Grievous's flagship, the Subjugator -class heavy cruiser Malevolence . It features two mega-ion cannons , which can be used to knock out entire Republic fleets. :: At the battle of Abregado , Jedi General Plo Koon 's fleet of Venator -class Star Destroyers discovers the Malevolence . As Koon's fleet attempts to contact Republic forces, the fleet is fired upon by the Malevolence 's ion cannon . The entire fleet is disabled and quickly torn apart by turbolasers.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY > Count Dooku and General Grievous launch a multy-month campaign using Grievous's flagship, the Subjugator -class heavy cruiser Malevolence . It features two mega-ion cannons , which can be used to knock out entire Republic fleets. :: A Republic medical convoy of three Pelta -class frigates escorted by a lone Venator -class Star Destroyer, commanded by clone troopers and a Jedi, is ambushed while passing through the Ryndellia system . The entire convoy is eliminated.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY > Count Dooku and General Grievous launch a multy-month campaign using Grievous's flagship, the Subjugator -class heavy cruiser Malevolence . It features two mega-ion cannons , which can be used to knock out entire Republic fleets. :: The Malevolence targets the Republic's secret medical station near the Kaliida Nebula , whith more than sixty-thousand wounded clone troopers being tended to by the Kaminoan doctor Nala Se . Anakin Skywalker leads a squadron of BTL-B Y-wing starfighter/bombers at the resulting Battle of the Kaliida Nebula , where the Malevolence is destroyed.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY > Count Dooku and General Grievous launch a multy-month campaign using Grievous's flagship, the Subjugator -class heavy cruiser Malevolence . It features two mega-ion cannons , which can be used to knock out entire Republic fleets. :: Jedi General Luminara Unduli's fleet group intercepts a fleet of Separatist reinforcements that had been sent to aid Grievous in the Kaliida Nebula.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY :: By this point, Captain Rex and Commander Cody were assisted by Jedi on Tibrin .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY :: The 501st Legion and the 224th Clone Division's Mud Jumpers under Jedi General Laan Tik , in addition to a Republic trained and assisted mimbanese tribe , fight in Mimban against a Separatist droid army. While in combat, the 224th's Mud Jumpers were given a song by a Hologram VJ of the Grand Army of the Republic broadcast .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY :: The Republic outpost known as Rishi Station on the Rishi Moon is defended from a Separatist infiltration by the clone troopers stationed there, preventing a Separatist invasion of Kamino.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY :: General Grievous , leader of the Separatist Droid Army , initiates a military campaign using intelligence from Skytop Station , a Trade Federation core ship and battlesphere repurposed as a listening post, and operated by the Hyper-Communications Cartel from the orbit of the Ruusan moon .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY > General Grievous , leader of the Separatist Droid Army , initiates a military campaign using intelligence from Skytop Station , a Trade Federation core ship and battlesphere repurposed as a listening post, and operated by the Hyper-Communications Cartel from the orbit of the Ruusan moon . :: Grievous invades several planets and blockades several vital hyperspace routes leading to Bespin , Kessel , and Mon Calamari .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY > General Grievous , leader of the Separatist Droid Army , initiates a military campaign using intelligence from Skytop Station , a Trade Federation core ship and battlesphere repurposed as a listening post, and operated by the Hyper-Communications Cartel from the orbit of the Ruusan moon . :: Separatist forces take control of the planet Falleen and the Republic's battle group stationed there is lost to the invasion.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY > General Grievous , leader of the Separatist Droid Army , initiates a military campaign using intelligence from Skytop Station , a Trade Federation core ship and battlesphere repurposed as a listening post, and operated by the Hyper-Communications Cartel from the orbit of the Ruusan moon . :: Republic and Confederacy fleets engage near the planet Bothawui . The Republic achieves a strategic victory, securing Bothawui and preventing Separatist advancements in the Mid Rim Territories. However, R2-D2 is lost and presumed destroyed.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY > General Grievous , leader of the Separatist Droid Army , initiates a military campaign using intelligence from Skytop Station , a Trade Federation core ship and battlesphere repurposed as a listening post, and operated by the Hyper-Communications Cartel from the orbit of the Ruusan moon . :: The Vulture's Claw , a GS-100 salvage ship owned by the Trandoshan scavenger Gha Nachkt , retrieves R2-D2 from the debris of the Battle of Bothawui . Anakin Skywalker and Ahsoka Tano investigate the Vulture's Claw for R2-D2, to no avail.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY > General Grievous , leader of the Separatist Droid Army , initiates a military campaign using intelligence from Skytop Station , a Trade Federation core ship and battlesphere repurposed as a listening post, and operated by the Hyper-Communications Cartel from the orbit of the Ruusan moon . :: Anakin Skywalker, while on a mission to scout ahead for Separatist activity in the outer corridor of a selected region of space, is ambushed by Confederacy warships. He is rescued by Captain Rex and a squad of clone troopers aboard the Twilight .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY > General Grievous , leader of the Separatist Droid Army , initiates a military campaign using intelligence from Skytop Station , a Trade Federation core ship and battlesphere repurposed as a listening post, and operated by the Hyper-Communications Cartel from the orbit of the Ruusan moon . :: After learning of the existence and location of Skytop Station, the Republic launches a raid where R2-D2 is rescued by Anakin Skywalker and the station is destroyed.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY :: Padmé Amidala goes on diplomatic mission to Rodia after the planet's supplies are attacked by pirates, to ensure that the planet remains allied with the Republic. Yet, Onaconda Farr , Rodia's Senator, had allied himself with Nute Gunray and the Confederacy in exchange for supplies. Upon her arrival in the Senatorial Palace on Rodia, Amidala is taken captive, to be given to Gunray as part of the arrangement. After arriving to collect Amidala, the viceroy reveals that he intends to execute her, and Farr begins to distrust him. Amidala breaks out of her cell, and C-3PO is able to contact Republic clone troopers for support. Gunray is apprehended by Amidala and Farr and taken into custody. Rodia remains allied to the Republic, and Palpatine dispatches relief supplies to the planet.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 22 BBY :: On Naboo, Queen Jamillia's reign ends and Neeyutnee is elected to her first term.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: Viceroy Nute Gunray is rescued on the Venator -class Star Destroyer Tranquility from Galactic Republic custody by Separatist forces with the help of Republic traitor Captain Faro Argyus , who is later executed by Ventress.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: Kit Fisto, Jedi Knight Nahdar Vebb , and a squad of clone troopers undertake a mission to recapture Nute Gunray. However, Dooku, displeased with General Grievous's recent failures in the war, used a Republic homing beacon to lure the Jedi and clones to the general's castle on the third moon of Vassek as a test for Grievous. All Republic forces are eliminated except for Fisto, who escapes.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: The Republic attempts to capture Dooku. Anakin Skywalker allows himself to be taken prisoner aboard Dooku's frigate while in an ice field and Obi-Wan Kenobi infiltrates the frigate when it is later in space over Vanqor , freeing Skywalker. The two Jedi find and confront Dooku, but as the Republic Star Destroyer Resolute opens fire on the frigate, the Sith Lord flees from the ship in his solar sailer . Skywalker and Kenobi steal a transport shuttle and pursue the count, but both the Jedi and Sith's ships are damaged and forced to crash-land on Vanqor, where Dooku traps the Jedi in a cave and manages to escape.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: The pirate captain Hondo Ohnaka captures Kenobi, Skywalker, and Dooku, and the Republic agrees to pay Ohnaka and his gang a ransom in exchange of the prisoners. A group led by Senator Kharrus , Jar Jar Binks, and Clone Commander Stone travel to Ohnaka's base of operations on the planet Florrum , but their shuttle is shot down by a group of pirates led by Turk Falso , a lieutenant of Ohnaka who wanted the ransom for himself, killing Kharrus and the pilots. However, Binks and the clones manage to stop Falso and his men, eventually reaching the prison camp where Skywalker and Kenobi where held and liberating them. Dooku escapes.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: Jedi General Aayla Secura 's task force is destroyed in the Battle of Quell , but she is rescued by Anakin Skywalker and Ahsoka Tano.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: With war brought to their doorstep, the pacifist Lurmen side with a group of stranded Jedi and Republic soldiers in the defense of their village on the planet Maridun from Separatist battle droids led by Neimoidian General Lok Durd .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: The native Talz of Orto Plutonia are caught in the Clone Wars, leading to the One-Day War between the Talz and the Pantorans . Pantoran Senator Riyo Chuchi negotiates peace with the Talz, conceding Orto Plutonia's sovereignty to the natives.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: Senator Amidala and Representative Binks investigate the Blue Shadow Virus and lead the raid on the laboratory of Doctor Nuvo Vindi. He is arrested and the virus outbreak is contained.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: Obi-Wan Kenobi and Anakin Skywalker travel to the planet Iego to retrieve reeksa root, the only known cure for the Blue Shadow Virus . They liberate the planet from the Ghost of Drol .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: The Republic manages to break through the Ryloth blockade during its counteroffensive to liberate the planet Ryloth from the Confederacy of Independent Systems.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: The city of Nabat on Ryloth, seized by the Confederacy and its inhabitants taken hostage, is liberated by Obi-Wan Kenobi and the clone troopers from Ghost Company .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: With Ryloth liberated from Separatist occupation and Republic Military presence established on the planet, the Battle of Ryloth ends.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: The Confederacy of Independent Systems is victorius in the First Battle of Felucia , forcing Republic forces to retreat from the planet.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: Hired by Darth Sidious, Cad Bane takes on a Raid on the Jedi Temple , where he steals a holocron necessary for accessing the kyber memory crystal , which contained the names of future Jedi younglings.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: During the battle of Devaron , Rodian Jedi Master Bolla Ropal , keeper of the Kyber memory crystal, is captured by Separatist commanded by Cad Bane, who tortures Ropal to death over Deveraon after the Jedi's refusal to give the bounty hunter access to the memory crystal. Bane instead threatens to kill Ahsoka Tano and thus forces Anakin Skywalker to do so at the battle before escaping.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: Cad Bane embarks on a series of kidnappings of Force-sensitive children listed in the memory crystal, taking potential younglings from Glee Anselm , Rodia , and Naboo . However, Bane is intercepted by Anakin Skywalker and Ahsoka Tano at Naboo's underwater Jan-gwa city , which gains local notoriety as a result.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: Mace Windu and Obi-Wan Kenobi take charge of Skywalker and Tano's mission, tracing Cad Bane to his secret hideout, Black Stall Station , in an attempt to capture the kidnapper and liberate the stolen children. However, they fail, only retrieving the stolen holocron and its memory crystal, though Skywalker takes Tano to a secret facility on Mustafar, which he found to be the location of the captured infants. They ultimately foil Darth Sidious' plan to create an army of Force-talented spies in his service, and rescue the two kidnapped children.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: The Confederacy of Independent Systems destroys the Felucia Medical Station HCTFF2 , a Republic Haven -class medical station orbiting Felucia . After losing contact with the station the Republic deploys Obi-Wan Kenobi, Anakin Skywalker, and Ahsoka Tano in a T-6 shuttle to investigate. They are detected and attacked by an automated vulture droid deployment station , leading them to crash into the planet.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: Obi-Wan Kenobi, Anakin Skywalker and Ahsoka Tano join a group of bounty hunters led by Sugi in a defense of a farming village in Felucia from pirates .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: The Confederacy of Independent Systems attempts to deplete the Galactic Republic's fuel supply by sending a massive army to conquer the planet Malastare. During the resulting battle, the separatist army is deactivated by a prototype electro-proton bomb designed by Republic scientist Sionver Boll . This opens up a large sinkhole that causes the Zillo Beast to awaken.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: The Zillo Beast is transported to Coruscant for study, as the Republic's scientific community and Chancellor Palpatine both desired to study the beast's invulnerable scales to create impenetrable armor for the Grand Army of the Republic. The beast escapes and goes on a rampage across the city, it is ultimately killed by a bombardment of poisonous gas from a number of LAAT/is, but not before killing and injuring many clone troopers and civilians.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: Padmé Amidala, while on diplomatic mission to Cato Neimoidia , is able to discover the existence of the Geonosis primary droid factory .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: General Grievous attacks Anakin Skywalker's forces near Dorin , with the objective of distract Republic forces from traveling to Geonosis , which the Republic had learned was the site of a new droid factory . Republic starfighter squadrons are able to rout Grievous's forces.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: Provoked by Poggle the Lesser's droid foundries on Geonosis producing new weapons for the Separatists, the Republic initiates the Second Battle of Geonosis .

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY > Provoked by Poggle the Lesser's droid foundries on Geonosis producing new weapons for the Separatists, the Republic initiates the Second Battle of Geonosis . :: Beneath the Progate Temple , the Jedi and the Republic kill Karina the Great , the Queen of Geonosis. Poggle the Lesser returns to Republic custody.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: As Supreme Chancellor Palpatine, Darth Sidious presents the battle station plans given to him by Dooku at the outbreak of the Clone War to the Republic Strategic Advisory Cell , which begins building the battle station in secret over Geonosis with unlimited funding for fear that the Separatist Alliance was developing a similar weapon elsewhere.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: Jedi General Mace Windu oversees the Galactic Republic's defense on the planet Dantooine against the Separatist Droid Army. Windu's forces withstand the attack but require medical supplies as a result of their efforts.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: Clone trooper Scythe , infected by a brain worm while on Geonosis, brings a backpack full of the parasites onboard the Pelta -class frigate TB-73 en route to the Ord Cestus medical station . Scythe infects most of the other clones onboard with the worms, and the infected clones kill the frigate's two pilots. Barriss Offee is captured and infected, leaving Ahsoka Tano as the only un-infested individual on board. After getting in contact with Anakin Skywalker, she learns that the worms, coming from a hot planet, are vulnerable to the cold, so ruptures the coolant systems to flood the ship and bring the temperature down, incapacitating the clones.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: During a space battle within the Saleucami system , Jedi Master Eeth Koth is captured by General Grievous and taken captive to Saleucami .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: The Battle of Saleucami occurs. Jedi Councilor Eeth Koth is rescued from Grievous' Separatist forces in the Saleucami system by Republic forces led by Adi Gallia , Obi-Wan Kenobi, and Anakin Skywalker.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: After the Battle of Saleucami and before the end of the Clone Wars

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY > After the Battle of Saleucami and before the end of the Clone Wars :: While Koth is part of the High Council, the mission to Enthenium occurs; Yoda duels Grievous and finds that Operation: Titan is underway on Golatha . There, he and Anakin Skywalker battle the Separatists' new megadroid .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY > After the Battle of Saleucami and before the end of the Clone Wars :: Koth is eventually forced to step down from the High Council and decides to leave the Jedi Order, being replaced by Agen Kolar on the Council by the end of the Clone Wars and retiring as a priest in the Church of the Ganthic Enlightenment .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY > After the Battle of Saleucami and before the end of the Clone Wars :: The Separatist Alliance leads an invasion of Saleucami , hoping to use the planet as an outpost, staging area, and trans-shipment point for the Salin Corridor hyperspace route .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY > After the Battle of Saleucami and before the end of the Clone Wars :: A surprise assault takes place on Roche in the Mid Rim, the smuggler Has Obitt is caught in the middle of the attack.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: A saboteur member of the Mandalorian Death Watch and acting with support from the Separatist Alliance, launches an attack on a Republic cruiser located in a shipyard. Upon being discovered, he exchanges fire with Republic forces before choosing to take his own life. In response, the Jedi High Council dispatches Obi-Wan Kenobi to the planet Mandalore to speak with Duchess Satine Kryze , the leader of the pacifistic New Mandalorians . While on Mandalore, Kenobi leeds an investigation to discover if Kryze, the planet, or the New Mandalorians had joined the Confederacy.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: While Duchess Satine and Obi-Wan Kenobi stroll through the gardens at Peace Park on Sundari , a bomb is set off by a member of Death Watch that destroys the New Mandalorian Memorial Shrine . The bomber runs off to flee, but is cornered by the Jedi at a balcony. Rather than being arrested, the bomber jumps off the balcony to commit suicide.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: Kenobi and Satine go on a diplomatic mission to Mandalore's moon Concordia to confer with the local governor, Pre Vizsla . They are ambushed by Death Watch warriors and Pre Vizsla is exposed as the Overlord of the Death Watch. He had been conspiring with Count Dooku, who had been backing the Death Watch in an attempt to destabilize the pacifist government of the New Mandalorians.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: After Vizsla reveals himself as Death Watch's leader, Kryze along with Senator Tal Merrik and others go aboard the Coronet to speak to the Republic Senate in order to convince them of Mandalore's neutrality. Kenobi, along with Anakin Skywalker and detachments of clone troopers from the 212th Attack Battalion and the 501st Legion accompany Kryze and her party to protect them from Death Watch and a force of B2-series super battle droids.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: Death Watch engineer a bombing on Kalevala , a planet located in the Mandalore system , that kills Jerec , the New Mandalorian Deputy Minister . Later on that day, the attack is addressed in the Galactic Senate by Supreme Chancellor Sheev Palpatine.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: A Death Watch assassin sets out to assassinate Duchess Satine Kryze while she is on Coruscant attempting to preserve Mandalore's neutrality in the Clone Wars. The assassin fails, allowing Mandalore to stay neutral and preventing Death Watch's plan to take over the planet.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: Boba Fett and a team of bounty hunters sabotage the Venator -class Star Destroyer Endurance in an attempt to kill Jedi Master Mace Windu. The Endurance crashes on the planet Vanqor .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: Mace Windu and Anakin Skywalker search the wreckage of the Endurance for any survivors. The bounty hunters, already there, had killed the surviving clone troopers, took three Republic officers as hostages and set up a booby trap that leaves Skywalker and Windu trapped in the wreckage. Plo Koon and Ahsoka Tano go to Vanqor with the clone troopers of the 104th Battalion to rescue the trapped Jedi

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: Plo Koon and Ahsoka Tano confront Boba Fett and his allies in Florrum . The hostages are freed, Boba Fett and Bossk are arrested, and Aurra Sing is presumed dead.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: New Mandalorian Prime Minister Almec , in league with a Mooga smuggling ring , initiates a conspiracy to use the black market to smuggle supplies onto the planet Mandalore, lining his own pockets in the process.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: After Duchess Satine, Padmé Amidala, Captain Patrok Ru-Saxon of the Mandalorian Guard , and a force of his men investigate criminal activity at a warehouse at the Sundari shipping docks , a shootout between the Moogan smugglers and the Mandalorian Guard ensues. The Moogans are arrested and Ru-Saxon orders the facility that the smugglers were using to be burned to the ground.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: A civil war takes place on the planet Balith , leading to requested intervention from the Galactic Republic. Under orders of the Jedi High Council, Anakin Skywalker and the Grand Army 's Third Legion are dispatched to the conflict.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: A diplomatic conference is held by members of the Senate on Alderaan during the to address the growing number of refugees who were displaced by the Republic's war against the Confederacy. During the conference bounty hunter Aurra Sing, under contract from the aligned Separatist Ziro the Hutt, attempts to assassinate Padmé Amidala, but is stopped by Ahsoka Tano and arrested.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: The Separatists launch an attack on Kamino, hoping to eliminate the cloning facilities in Tipoca City and to deprive the Republic from creating more clone troopers for their army, resulting in the Battle of Tipoca City . The Separatists, led by General Grievous and Asajj Ventress, are repelled by the Republic. However, the attack on Kamino proves the Republic had intelligence leaks and that every Republic planet is vulnerable to assault.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: Actress Risha Synata , a spy for the Confederacy, orchestrates a plot invite senators, who were unconvinced of joining the Separatist Alliance, to her ship and gas them to advance her goals. She is stopped by Padmé Amidala and Anakin Skywalker.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: The Trade Federation establishes a blockade above the moon Pantora , orchestrated by Sib Canay , Nute Gunray , and Lott Dod in an attempt to force Pantora to join the Separatist Alliance. Because he disownes the blockade as a rogue action, Federation Senator Dod is able to keep his position in the Galactic Senate.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: To increase pressure of the blockade, the daughters of the Pantoran Supreme Chairman Notluwiski Papanoida are kidnapped . With the assistance of Ahsoka Tano , Pantoran Senator Riyo Chuchi and Chairman Papanoida are able to rescue both daughters and uncover the conspiracy, forcing the Trade Federation to lift the blockade.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: Bounty hunters employed by the Hutt Clan, led by Cad Bane , held Chancellor Palpatine and several senators hostage in order to free Ziro the Hutt from the Republic Judiciary Central Detention Center . Cad Bane and his team escape with Ziro.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: A mission to capture the Ziro leads to a showdown between Cad Bane and Obi-Wan Kenobi and Quinlan Vos on Teth . Both sides were on the hunt for Ziro, who escaped from the custody of both the Republic and the Grand Hutt Council , but found him dead on Teth after he was killed by Sy Snootles at the behest of Jabba the Hutt.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: A Jedi ceremony is held for Ahsoka Tano at the Jedi Temple on Coruscant, in which she is given new Padawan beads by Grand Master Yoda to signify her growth as a Jedi.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: Senators Padmé Amidala and Mina Bonteri attempt a Confederate–Republic peace initiative , but it is disrupted by Count Dooku with the bombing of Coruscant's central power distribution grid .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: Sabine Wren is born on Krownest . (exact chronology undefined)

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: Jyn Erso is born to Galen and Lyra Erso on Vallt . (Approximate date) Soon after, the Erso family is detained by the native Koorivar , sympathizers of the Separatist cause. Having captured Morseerian scientists for a prisoner exchange, Krennic leads Republic forces in rescueing the family, who then move to Coruscant.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: The Confederacy of Independent Systems besiege Grange for a period of over two standard months.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: A farming accident on Raada injures the Togruta Selda , where he loses his left arm, leg, and lekku, and kills Kaeden and Miara Larte 's parents. (Approximate date)
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: By this point, the Republic Special Weapons Group 's plans for both an automated battlemoon asteroid and a torpedo siege platform —developed after the Naboo Crisis—were ruled out at the design stage as a result of the Republic's then pacifistic leanings and the consequent lack of funding.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: In the aftermath of the bombing of Coruscant's central power distribution grid , mandatory blackouts are put into place. Senator Onaconda Farr is assaulted by bounty hunters Robonino and Chata Hyoki during one of the blackouts.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: After the bombing of Coruscant's central power distribution grid and breakdown of peace talks, Count Dooku alleges the Republic launched an attack on Confederate people, killing many including Separatist Senator Mina Bonteri. While Republic spies attribute Bonteri's death to Separatist agents, Dooku withdraws Bonteri's peace proposal offered by the Separatist Senate .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: Between 21 and 20 BBY
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY > Between 21 and 20 BBY :: A funeral is held for Senator Onaconda Farr on Coruscant, after he is poisoned.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY > Between 21 and 20 BBY :: Senatorial aide Lolo Purs is arrested for the murder of Farr and other high-profile political murders and attempted killings.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 21 BBY :: Construction of the Death Star begins over Geonosis.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 20 BBY :: Gedeek Obaz is born on Cantonica.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 20 BBY :: The Republic and the Confederacy fight for control over the planet Sullust . During this battle, Asajj Ventress is targeted by Count Dooku, who wished to prove his allegiance to his Sith Master, Lord Sidious by killing his aspiring apprentice . Ventress is presumed dead in the conflict, but escapes.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 20 BBY :: Asajj Ventress returns to her homeworld Dathomir . There, Mother Talzin agrees to aid in getting revenge on Dooku. Nightsisters go on a mission to assassinate Dooku, but he repells the attack.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 20 BBY :: Dooku's new Sith apprentice, Savage Opress , attacks the Temple of Eedit on the planet Devaron , resulting in the Devaron massacre .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 20 BBY :: After failing to kidnap Toydarian king Katuunko alive, Savage Opress is punished by Dooku to the point of Opress siding with Asajj Ventress. The two of them confront Dooku together but are unable to kill him, fall apart, and escape.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 20 BBY :: Anakin Skywalker, Obi-Wan Kenobi, and Ahsoka Tano travel to Mortis, where they encounter three powerful Force wielders : the Father , the Daughter , and the Son . Anakin is put through a number of tests by them, proving that he is the Chosen One who will bring balance to the Force.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 20 BBY :: Jedi Master Even Piell and the crew of his Star Destroyer are captured by Confederacy forces, after beeing attacked and boarded while returning from the Outer Rim Territories.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 20 BBY :: Jedi and clone troopers launch a mission to infiltrate the Citadel , a Separatist prison on Lola Sayu , in order to rescue Even Piell, Captain Wilhuff Tarkin , and their clone forces. Though Piell is killed, Tarkin and his forces are rescued

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 20 BBY :: A funeral is held for Even Piell on Lola Sayu.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 20 BBY :: Having been forced into a retreat at the First Battle of Felucia , the Republic re-established a presence on the planet after an offensive into Separatist-held territory.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 20 BBY :: Ahsoka Tano is taken captive to the planet Wasskah by a group of Trandoshan hunters to hunt her, and other Jedi, for sport. She takes command of a team of Jedi youngling who had been evading the hunters, and they attack the floating fortress of the hunters and free the Wookiee Chewbacca .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 20 BBY :: On the planet Mon Cala a schism confronts the Mon Calamari and Quarren , as the later rebel against the Mon Calamari with the support of the Confederacy of Independent Systems. The Grand Army of the Republic, Jedi Order, and the Gungan Grand Army came to the defense of the Mon Calamari to fight the invading Separatist Droid Army. The Mon Calamari and the Quarren are reunified, and the Separatists repelled.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 20 BBY :: A battle is fought on Horain in the Crantori system between the Republic and Confederacy. During the battle, B1-series battle droid B1-0516 is hit by a blaster bolt, which causes the droid to develop a conscience, and fight for the Republic.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 20 BBY :: The Gungans ' Boss Lyonie 's minister, Rish Loo , influences the Boss to seek an alliance with the Separatists. Anakin Skywalker, Padmé Amidala, and Jar Jar Binks arrive to Naboo to advise against the arrangements. After an attempted assassination, Lyonie is injured and the Gungan Grand Army prepares for an attack on the Naboo by Grievous and his army. The Gungan militia, lead by General Roos Tarpals , disables the droid forces. Grievous is captured by the Gungans, while Dooku captures Anakin Skywalker, and the two generals are subsequently freed in a prisoner exchange.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 20 BBY :: After a series of devastating groundquakes rocked the world of Aleen , Clone Commander Wolffe and 104th Battalion are sent to deliver relief supplies, with R2-D2 and C-3PO providing assistance in installing the new equipment and translating for the clones.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 20 BBY :: The flagship of Jedi Master Adi Gallia comes under attack by a fleet of Confederacy warships led by Grievous. Caught off guard while en route to Republic territory, the Separatist fleet manages to destroy Gallia's Destroyer and take her captive.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 20 BBY :: Plo Koon and clones of the 104th Battalion board the Separatist dreadnought where Adi Gallia was being held, and rescue her from Grievous.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 20 BBY :: Following the death of Umbara's senator Mee Deechi , the Umbarans withdraw from the Republic and commit their militia to the Confederacy. The Republic sends Jedi Master Pong Krell , Anakin Skywalker, Obi-Wan Kenobi and Saesee Tiin to retake Umbara with their troops. Pong Krell is executed for treason against the Republic, after it's revealed his ultimate goal was recognition by Dooku to become his new apprentice. The Galactic Republic occupies Umbara .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 20 BBY :: The Republic sents help to the the Togrutan colony planet of Kiros , neutral in the war, after learning it was being invaded by Confederate forces. However, by the time they arrive, the Confederacy had already occupied Kiros's capital and transferred the entire population to the planet Zygerria to be sold as slaves. The Republic forces fight through the capital, only to find the whole population missing.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 20 BBY :: Anakin Skywalker, Ahsoka Tano, and Obi-Wan Kenobi undertake an undercover mission to Zygerria to rescue the Togrutan populationfrom Zygerrian slavers . Kenobi and Captain Rex are captured and forced into slavery at the Kadavo slave processing facility .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 20 BBY :: After escaping the Royal Slave Auction , Anakin Skywalker and Ahsoka Tano learn from the Zygerrian Queen, Miraj Scintel , that the colonists had been transported to Kadavo . Calling on Jedi General Plo Koon for reinforcements, Skywalker and Tano traveled to the Kadavo slave processing facility. In the ensuing battle , the surviving Togruta captives are rescued and Republic forces destroy the Kadavo facility.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 20 BBY :: The Confederacy and the Republic held a peace conference on the neutral world of Mandalore . Hoping to reach a diplomatic end to the war, delegations from the Republic Senate and the Separatist Senate meet in the throne room of Duchess Satine Kryze 's Royal Palace . However, the negotiations quickly collapse.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 20 BBY :: Lux Bonteri , Ahsoka Tano and R2-D2 arrive on the planet Carlac after the Confederate–Republic peace conference , which Bonteri had interrupted. He had gained the location of Count Dooku and wanted revenge on him for the death of his mother, Mina Bonteri , by allying with Pre Vizsla 's Death Watch warriors. But after they start to torch Ming Po Town , Bonteri gets disappointed with them and escapes with Tano and R2-D2.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 20 BBY :: A faux funeral is held for Obi-Wan Kenobi, as part of a Jedi Council's plot to send him undercover as the bounty hunter Rako Hardeen . Amongst those in attendance is Anakin Skywalker, who is unaware of the plot.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 20 BBY :: Cad Bane instigates a riot at the Republic Judiciary Central Detention Center on Coruscant in order to provide a cover for his escape. He flees with Moralo Eval and Obi-Wan as Rako Hardeen in a Panther police interceptor .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 20 BBY :: Anakin Skywalker and Ahsoka Tano track down the trio of escaped bounty hunters to the planet Orondia and confront them, but they escape. Anakin and Ahsoka discover that Obi-Wan is alive.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 20 BBY :: Moralo Eval, a criminal working for Count Dooku, works out plans to kidnap Chancellor Palpatine. To find the most suitable recruits, Dooku and Eval host a tournament on Serenno . The bounty hunters face multiple tests in the Box , a floating cubic structure designed by Eval.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 20 BBY :: The 847th Festival of Light is held, a Naboo tradition that celebrates the anniversary of the planet Naboo joining the Republic.

Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 20 BBY :: A skirmish takes place in the Royal Palace of Naboo between Count Dooku and Obi-Wan disguised as Rako Hardeen and Anakin Skywalker. The Jedi were attempting to rescue Chancellor Palpatine, whom Dooku was attempting to kidnap after the failure of his plan to have a team of bounty hunters do it. Kenobi and Skywalker rescue the Chancellor, but Dooku is able to escape.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 20 BBY :: As a retaliation for the actions of Mother Talzin and Ventress against Dooku, the Confederacy launches an invasion led by Grievous on the planet Dathomir that results in the almost total annihilation of the Nightsisters .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 20 BBY :: The safe cargo objective operation is carried out by a group of six bounty hunters, Latts Razzi , Dengar , Asajj Ventress , C-21 Highsinger , Bossk and Boba Fett , who was leading the posse. They were hired by the Belugan Rigosso to help him deliver a chest safely to Otua Blank .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 20 BBY :: Nightbrother Savage Opress finds his lost brother, Maul, on Lotho Minor. The forgotten Sith Lord is brought back to his homeworld of Dathomir . Mother Talzin restores Maul's sanity and memories through magick and rebuilds him with droid parts. Thinking Obi-Wan Kenobi had robbed him of his destiny at the Battle of Naboo, Maul takes Opress as his apprentice and ventures to take revenge on the Jedi.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 20 BBY :: Lead by General Flebek , the Separatists look to find the rumored secret to invisibility on the planet Retta . Yoda and Anakin Skywalker are sent to stop them . After the Jedi discovered that the secret to invisibility was the power of the Segredo Kreeda , in order to protect it they convince Flebek that the whole thing was a Jedi trick, and she orders her forces to leave Retta.
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 20 BBY :: In order to draw the attention of Obi-Wan Kenobi, Maul and Savage Opress massacre the inhabitants of a village on Raydonia .
Timeline of galactic history > Republic Era (c. 1000 – 19 BBY) > Fall of the Republic (32–19 BBY) > Clone Wars (22–19 BBY) > 20 BBY :: Obi-Wan Kenobi, who had been captured by Maul and Opress after responding to the massacre they committed, is rescued from their ship by Opress's former master, Asajj Ventress. After engaging the brothers in combat, Ventress and Kenobi flee using a escape pod.
