Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Return of the Jedi (4 ABY) > 4 ABY > Operation Yellow Moon; Aboard Nien Nunb's Mellcrawler , Leia Organa leads a faux Alliance recruiting mission in the Corva sector , nearly a hundred-thousand light years away from the second Death Star, that is meant to distract the Empire while the Rebellion gathers an armada at Sullust. :: With the individual voluntary sacrifices of two members of Organa's crew, as well as a surprise return of the rebel recruits, the crew destroys the Shieldmaiden using the Mellcrawler as a bomb , escaping Khione's Star Destroyer with a stolen Imperial shuttle named Tydirium .
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Return of the Jedi (4 ABY) > 4 ABY :: Aboard the shuttle Tydirium , Leia Organa, Nien Nunb, and Kidi Aleri reach Kothlis , where they join Luke Skywalker. Skywalker reports that they had gathered that Han Solo is still in carbonite, held at Jabba's Palace.
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Return of the Jedi (4 ABY) > 4 ABY :: Iden Versio escapes from the Invincible Faith with Moff Derrek Raythe 's message, in which Death Squadron is ordered to move to the far side of Endor as part of the Empire's plans to trap the Rebel Alliance during what the rebels think to be their surprise assault on the Emperor's new battle station .
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Return of the Jedi (4 ABY) > 4 ABY :: With his green-bladed lightsaber , Luke Skywalker leads a raid at Imperial Refining Platform M36 to secure an entire year's worth of fuel supplies for the Rebel Alliance. With the rebels skeptical of Skywalker for his Force abilities sometimes giving false positives of potential threats, the rebels refuse to heed Skywalker's call to risk jumping into hyperspace and are attacked by an Imperial Star Destroyer as a result. Skywalker resists Darth Sidious' telepathic urges to abandon the rebels for being weak and the temptation to leave the war to live a quiet life, rejoining the rebels aboard their transport. Controlling his anger that festered from his guilt of nearly abandoning the rebels, Skywalker assists their leader in helping the rebels escape to safety.
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Return of the Jedi (4 ABY) > 4 ABY :: While a battle between the Empire and the Alliance takes place in the world Mordal 's city of Maborn , the Ballast family becomes trapped in the area of contention, and the daughter of Corwin Ballast and his wife Lynnta die in the firefight. The battle ends without a decisive victor, with the combatants choosing to halt hostilities.

Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Return of the Jedi (4 ABY) > 4 ABY :: Rescue of Han Solo ; on Tatooine, Han Solo is rescued from Jabba the Hutt, who is killed by Leia Organa. Boba Fett is consumed by the sarlacc of the Great Pit of Carkoon .
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Return of the Jedi (4 ABY) > 4 ABY :: Jabba's demise leads to the fall of his criminal empire .
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Return of the Jedi (4 ABY) > 4 ABY > Jabba's demise leads to the fall of his criminal empire . :: EV-9D9 is temporarily disabled but later becomes a bartender at Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina by 9 ABY .
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Return of the Jedi (4 ABY) > 4 ABY :: Lando Calrissian defeats a pirate fleet at the Battle of Taanab , earning himself the rank of general in the Rebel Alliance.
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Return of the Jedi (4 ABY) > 4 ABY :: Squadron Five is replenished with the newly graduated Bansu Ro and Rac Syrmo and destroys the rebel recruitment base traced from Zin Graw's leak.
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Return of the Jedi (4 ABY) > 4 ABY :: Yoda dies on Dagobah; Luke Skywalker discovers that he is not only truly the son of Darth Vader, but also the brother of Leia Organa.
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Return of the Jedi (4 ABY) > 4 ABY :: By this point, the rebels had fought the Spice Runners of Kijimi , whose leader, Zarah Bliss , is replaced by Zeva Bliss .
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Return of the Jedi (4 ABY) > 4 ABY :: The Alliance Fleet gathers in the Sullust system ; days before their offensive, the Spice Runners had been bribed and manipulated by the Empire to set up an assassination attempt on Mon Mothma, but it is foiled by rebel spy Tomasso , Shara Bey, and Kes Dameron. Tomasso additionally informs Mothma that the Imperial leadership is aboard the second Death Star.
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Return of the Jedi (4 ABY) > 4 ABY :: A strike team led by Alliance General Han Solo lands on the Forest Moon of Endor with the shuttle Tydirium . They gather Ewok allies from Bright Tree Village .

Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Return of the Jedi (4 ABY) > 4 ABY :: Luke Skywalker tells Leia Organa that they are siblings and that Darth Vader is their father. Luke Skywalker then leaves to confront Vader himself, attempting to join forces with him to fight against the Emperor as Jedi.
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Return of the Jedi (4 ABY) > 4 ABY :: Battle of Endor
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Return of the Jedi (4 ABY) > 4 ABY > Battle of Endor :: Departing Sullust, the Alliance Fleet flies into the trap set for them by the Emperor in the Endor system. Led by Admiral Ackbar from aboard the Home One , the rebels destroy the Executor .
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Return of the Jedi (4 ABY) > 4 ABY > Battle of Endor :: Han Solo's strike team and Ewok allies destroy the Death Star's shield generator , allowing rebel starfighters to infiltrate the Death Star's reactor core.
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Return of the Jedi (4 ABY) > 4 ABY > Battle of Endor :: Vader duels his son in the Emperor's Throne Room , but is defeated by the furious Jedi, whom Darth Sidious wishes to turn to the dark side as his new apprentice. Realizing his own fear and anger, Luke Skywalker throws away his lightsaber and refuses to kill Vader. While Sidious attempts to destroy the Jedi, Darth Vader's compassion for his son overwhelms him, and, resuming his duty to the Force as the Chosen One , Anakin Skywalker kills his former Sith Master at the cost of his own life. By destroying the Sith, Anakin brings balance to the Force and passes away in peace, and Luke Skywalker escapes from the Death Star as a true Jedi.
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Return of the Jedi (4 ABY) > 4 ABY > Battle of Endor :: The second Death Star is destroyed by the Millennium Falcon .
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) :: 4 ABY
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > 4 ABY :: Concurrent to the Battle of Endor

Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > 4 ABY > Concurrent to the Battle of Endor :: An Imperial armada launches a surprise attack on the Core Worlds, though it is defeated at the border of the Hosnian system by two Rebel MC75 Star Cruisers ; the Accordance and the Temperance . The Accordance is lost, although the Temperance rescues some survivors.
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > 4 ABY :: Hours after the Battle of Endor
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > 4 ABY > Hours after the Battle of Endor :: TIE fighters and TIE strikers from the forces of Moff Ubrik Adelhard ambush a Rebel Alliance squadron that had entered the Anoat sector . Nearly all of the Alliance squadron escapes the battle, but is trapped in the Anoat sector. The pilot Rynn Zenat escapes to Endor after her ship appears to have been shot down, and the Alliance learns of the Iron Blockade .
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > 4 ABY :: Soon after the Battle of Endor
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > 4 ABY > Soon after the Battle of Endor :: News of the deaths of the Emperor and Darth Vader as well as the destruction of the second Death Star and the Executor at the Rebellion's hands are broadcast across the galaxy.
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > 4 ABY > Soon after the Battle of Endor :: Luke Skywalker gives his late father a funeral on Endor, and Anakin Skywalker joins Yoda and Obi-Wan Kenobi as Force spirits.
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > 4 ABY > Soon after the Battle of Endor :: Moff Adelhard, commanding his flagship Star Destroyer Scepter , engages in a skirmish with Rebel Alliance Navy forces that had entered the Anoat sector. After managing to disable the Alliance starfighters, the Imperials destroy all rebel starships, leaving no survivors.

Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > 4 ABY > Soon after the Battle of Endor :: Celebrations of the Empire's fall at Endor takes place throughout the galaxy, including bonfires in Bright Tree Village, gatherings on Cloud City, a rally on Naboo , and parades on Tatooine . However, celebrations on Coruscant lead to a crackdown at Monument Plaza, sparking the Coruscant civil war .
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > 4 ABY > Soon after the Battle of Endor :: Rebel celebrants including Chewbacca, Lando Calrissian, Mon Mothma, Hera Syndulla and Ewoks Chirpa and Logray attend the wedding of Han Solo and Leia Organa , officiated by Luke Skywalker and celebrated at Bright Tree Village.
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > 4 ABY > Soon after the Battle of Endor :: Billions of sentient beings are conceived in direct celebration of the Battle of Endor, leading to the large generation of victory kids .
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > 4 ABY :: One day after the Battle of Endor
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > 4 ABY > One day after the Battle of Endor :: Han Solo leads the Pathfinders and some Ewok warriors in an assault on an Imperial outpost on the far side of Endor. Once inside, they gather intelligence revealing the Empire's future plans, indicating that the war with the Empire is not yet over.
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > 4 ABY :: The Rebel pilots of Rampant Squadron , assisted by Lieutenant Shara Bey, liberate the Beltire system from the Empire.
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > 4 ABY :: After the after-party's after-party on Endor

Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > 4 ABY > After the after-party's after-party on Endor :: While Han Solo and Leia Organa enjoy their time on Endor and would later go on a honeymoon aboard the Halcyon , Lando Calrissian, Chewbacca, Nien Nunb, and Shriv Suurgav undertake a mission to Neskar Station aboard the Millennium Falcon . With the battle-racer Sebulba in debt to the Hutts and having connections to pirates who have been robbing rebel supply lines, the rebels contact Sebulba over Neskar and acquire a lead on the pirates.
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > 4 ABY :: Seventeen days after the Battle of Endor
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > 4 ABY > Seventeen days after the Battle of Endor :: Cawa City , on the planet Sterdic IV , is liberated from the Empire by the Rebellion's Feral Group and Green Squadron led by Lieutenant L'ulo L'ampar , after heavy starfighter losses.
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > 4 ABY :: Sentinel droids are dispatched to select Imperial leaders to ensure the execution of the fallen Emperor's Contingency . Relaying Palpatine's will, they decree the initiation of Operation: Cinder .
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > 4 ABY :: As Moff Derrek Raythe 's Imperial -class Star Destroyer Dauntless prepares to depart the Imperial dockyard at one of the Fondor Shipyards ' stations , with experimental satellites meant for Operation: Cinder in tow, while the special commando unit Inferno Squad overses its protection, a rebel fleet attacks Fondor Station. The MC80 Star Cruiser within the fleet disables the Dauntless with its ion cannons, leaving the Star Destroyer defenseless. To prevent the rebels from learning about the satellites' true purpose, Inferno Squad and several TIE fighters are deployed to engage the rebel ships. Inferno Squad defends the Dauntless from U-wing transports attempting to board the Destroyer. Iden Versio infiltrates the rebel Star Cruiser's weapons bay and sabotages its ion cannons with the assistance of Agent Gideon Hask . Upon leaving the Cruiser, Versio continues to defend the Dauntless and frees it by destroying the docking clamps holding the ship in place. The battle ends in an Imperial victory when the Destroyer cripples the rebel Cruiser with its turbolasers and departs Fondor Station with the satellites intact.

Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > 4 ABY :: Posing undercover as smugglers, Rebel operatives travel to the fringe of Anoat Sector in the Oggrud , an explosive laden Barloz -class freighter . The ship is intercepted by a fleet of Spice Runner ships commanded by Zeva Bliss , who seek to ally themselves with Ubrik Adelhard's coalition . Spice Runner lieutenant Vigilch demands the Rebel operatives allow the Spice Runners to board their ship or be destroyed. Rather than surrender, Rynn Zenat ramms the Oggrud into the Spice Runner ships, triggering massive explosions. Adelhard's Specter later arrives at the battlefield, where they discover the Spice Runners have sustained significant damage in the Oggrud's attack. Bliss's flagship, the Ragged Claw remains functional, but all other Spice Runner ships are gone or beyond repair. All four members of the investigation team survive the encounter. Adelhard's forces are able to recover the crew from the freighter's escape pod and take them prisoner onboard the Specter . The crew is later freed from their cell by undercover New Republic spy Kith Alaytia . However, before they can escape, are confronted by Adelhard's enforcers Bragh and Reyna Oskure , and incapacitated.
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > 4 ABY :: Imperial Special Forces Agent Del Meeko , accompanied by several squads of stormtroopers, travels to the planet Pillio to destroy the Emperor's Observatory , and stop the valuable relics hidden there from falling into the hands of the enemies. Luke Skywalker, meanwhile, feels called to the planet by the Force, and goes to investigate. Ultimately all the Imperial forces are wiped out, save for Agent Del Meeko. The observatory is not destroyed, and Skywalker recovers a compass.
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > 4 ABY :: At Kestro City on the planet Vardos , Iden Versio and Del Meeko disobey their orders to return the Aqualish Gleb alone to Admiral Garrick Versio , instead choosing to save 43 civilians as well. This act is seen as treasonous, and Gideon Hask and Garrick attempt to have Meeko and Iden killed. Meanwhile, the city descends into rioting as the inhabitants realize they are being left to die by the Empire. Iden and Del fight their way through the Imperial forces back to their ship, the Corvus , before escaping off-world and eventually sending a distress call to the Rebel Alliance.
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > 4 ABY :: Twenty days after the Battle of Endor

Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > 4 ABY > Twenty days after the Battle of Endor :: Imperial forces launch Operation: Cinder against Naboo. At this point, Sosha Soruna had become the Queen of Naboo. Leia Organa coordinates resistance efforts in the streets of Theed.
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > 4 ABY > Twenty days after the Battle of Endor :: The Pathfinders , led by Han Solo, raid an Imperial Security Bureau black site at the Wretch of Tayron . After entering the base and accesing the Imperial files, the Rebellion gains the intelligence needed to discover and fight against Operation: Cinder.
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > 4 ABY :: Three months after the Battle of Endor
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > 4 ABY > Three months after the Battle of Endor :: Two fragments of the Great Tree , that once dwelled at the heart of the Coruscant Jedi Temple, are retrieved from an Imperial base on the planet Vetine by Luke Skywalker and Lieutenant Shara Bey. Skywalker takes one of the tree fragments but gives the second to Bey and her family .
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > 4 ABY > Three months after the Battle of Endor :: Imperial forces launches Operation: Cinder against Abednedo , Burnin Konn, Candovant , and Commenor . (Approximate date)
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) :: Weeks following the Battle of Endor (exact chronology undefined)
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > Weeks following the Battle of Endor (exact chronology undefined) :: The 204th carries out Operation: Cinder on Nacronis , wiping out its inhabitants despite the Rebel Alliance's efforts to save the world. Yrica Quell of the 204th deserts as a result, and would later be found by the New Republic.
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > Weeks following the Battle of Endor (exact chronology undefined) :: The 204th attacks the Hellion's Dare , a New Republic Nebulon-B frigate captained by the Chadra-Fan Kreskian , while in orbit above the planet Jiruus . Both Riot and Hound Squadrons scramble to defend the frigate before escaping to hyperspace.

Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) :: Sometime after the Battle of Endor (exact chronology undefined)
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > Sometime after the Battle of Endor (exact chronology undefined) :: Darth Sidious is reborn within a clone body in Exegol's Sith Citadel, but the clone body rapidly decays in his Sith Eternal 's care. They install Snoke into the galaxy.
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > Sometime after the Battle of Endor (exact chronology undefined) :: Rebels depart their outpost on D'Qar.
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > Sometime after the Battle of Endor (exact chronology undefined) :: Leia Organa begins training in the ways of the Force on Ajan Kloss , per her choice of location, under the tutelage of her brother, Luke Skywalker.
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > Sometime after the Battle of Endor (exact chronology undefined) :: During the Alliance to Restore the Republic's existence
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > Sometime after the Battle of Endor (exact chronology undefined) > During the Alliance to Restore the Republic's existence :: Imperial Governor Ubrik Adelhard locks down the Anoat sector under the Iron Blockade . Deprived of the Rebellion's help, those trapped inside the blockade start an uprising .
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > Sometime after the Battle of Endor (exact chronology undefined) > During the Alliance to Restore the Republic's existence :: The New Republic liberates the planet Sullust from the Empire after months of fighting. After the battle, Admiral Gial Ackbar and Mon Mothma escort Councillor Sian Tevv into the government center for his ceremonial inauguration.

Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > Sometime after the Battle of Endor (exact chronology undefined) > During the Alliance to Restore the Republic's existence :: The self–proclaimed Grand Moff Valco Pandion abandons the Imperial communications station on Malastare, causing the Empire to lose its foothold on the planet. The Alliance's Blade Squadron , led by Commander Braylen Stramm , destroys the planetary shield and the communications station, and the battle of Malastare ends.
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > Sometime after the Battle of Endor (exact chronology undefined) :: Four years after their victory at the Battle of Yavin, the Alliance to Restore the Republic declares the formation of the New Republic .
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > Sometime after the Battle of Endor (exact chronology undefined) :: During the New Republic's existence; months after the Battle of Endor
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > Sometime after the Battle of Endor (exact chronology undefined) > During the New Republic's existence; months after the Battle of Endor :: Operation: Cinder against Abednedo is over by this point.
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > Sometime after the Battle of Endor (exact chronology undefined) > During the New Republic's existence; months after the Battle of Endor :: New Republic Special Forces and Alphabet Squadron hunt for Shadow Wing .
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > Sometime after the Battle of Endor (exact chronology undefined) > During the New Republic's existence; months after the Battle of Endor :: New Republic forces led by Sergeant major Jom Barell foil an attempt by a group of Imperials to restart droid foundries left on the planet Geonosis as a remnant of the Clone Wars.
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > Sometime after the Battle of Endor (exact chronology undefined) > During the New Republic's existence; months after the Battle of Endor :: New Republic agent Wedge Antilles conducts a scouting mission to the planet Akiva, to spy on the Imperials that had gathered for an Emergency summit where they intend to regroup and launch an attack against the New Republic. He is captured by Admiral Rae Sloane.

Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > Sometime after the Battle of Endor (exact chronology undefined) > During the New Republic's existence; months after the Battle of Endor :: The Imperial Future Council , group of high ranking Imperials including financier Arsin Crassus , General Jylia Shale , adviser Yupe Tashu , Grand Moff Valco Pandion , and Admiral Rae Sloane , holds an emergency summit on Akiva to decide the future of the Empire.
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > Sometime after the Battle of Endor (exact chronology undefined) > During the New Republic's existence; months after the Battle of Endor :: Imperial and New Republic forces clash around a town in the mountains of the planet Naalol , with the town reduced to rubble. The devastation led Chancellor Mon Mothma to consider relinquishing the emergency powers that had been granted to the Charter of Chancellor following the reconstitution of the Galactic Senate on Chandrila .
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > Sometime after the Battle of Endor (exact chronology undefined) > During the New Republic's existence; months after the Battle of Endor :: After learning about Wedge and the Imperial conference, the New Republic pilot Norra Wexley , her son Temmin Wexley , and the B1-series battle droid " Mister Bones " join forces with the bounty hunter Jas Emari and the former Imperial loyalty officer Sinjir Rath Velus to inspire a rebellion on Akiva . The Akiva rebellion coincides with the arrival of New Republic Special Forces soldier Jom Barell and a Republic fleet led by Commander Kyrsta Agate . With the defeat of the Imperial fleet and garrison, the Satrapy of Myrra capitulates, and Akiva becames the first Outer Rim world to join the New Republic.
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > Sometime after the Battle of Endor (exact chronology undefined) > During the New Republic's existence; months after the Battle of Endor :: Republic forces lead a successful attack on the Imperial dockyard at Var-Shaa . Veteran of the Battle of Jeyell and flagship of Titan Squadron , the Imperial Star Destroyer Overseer , is retrofitted after winning the battle.

Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > Sometime after the Battle of Endor (exact chronology undefined) > During the New Republic's existence; months after the Battle of Endor :: Commanded by Lindon Javes , the New Republic Vanguard Squadron is assigned to the Bormea sector aboard the MC-75 cruiser, the Temperance .
Timeline of galactic history > Imperial Era (19 BBY – 5 ABY) > Galactic Civil War—after the Battle of Yavin (0–5 ABY) > Fall of the Empire (4 ABY–5 ABY) > Sometime after the Battle of Endor (exact chronology undefined) > During the New Republic's existence; months after the Battle of Endor :: At Nadiri Dockyards , the Republic's Project Starhawk produces the Starhawk , a prototype vessel made from salvaged Galactic Empire starships at the debris field of Sissubo for the development of the Starhawk -class battleship .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Galactic Civil War (continued; 5 ABY) :: 5 ABY
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Galactic Civil War (continued; 5 ABY) :: Six months after the Battle of Endor
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Galactic Civil War (continued; 5 ABY) > Six months after the Battle of Endor :: Shara Bey and Kes Dameron move to Yavin 4, planting a fragment of the Great Tree within their property .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Galactic Civil War (continued; 5 ABY) > Six months after the Battle of Endor :: The Rebel Alliance officially reorganizes into the New Republic, accomplishing its goal of restoring the Republic.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Galactic Civil War (continued; 5 ABY) > Six months after the Battle of Endor :: The New Republic restores the Galactic Senate in Hanna City on the planet Chandrila , its capital.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Galactic Civil War (continued; 5 ABY) > Six months after the Battle of Endor :: Han Solo, with the help of imperial defector Ralsius Paldora , finds data cubes stored in a forest in Takodana , with intelligence crucial to help liberate the Wookiee homeworld of Kashyyyk . During the search, they are attacked by imperial forces, but Solo is able to escape with the data cubes with the assistance of Inferno Squad.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Galactic Civil War (continued; 5 ABY) > Six months after the Battle of Endor :: Having turned against the Empire, Inferno Squad undertakes a mission to Chinook Station on Bespin to capture former member Gideon Hask and shut down the Imperial fueling operations there.

Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Galactic Civil War (continued; 5 ABY) > Six months after the Battle of Endor :: Cloud City is liberated from Governor Ubrik Adelhard 's Imperial remnant . Lobot , relaying messages from Lando Calrissian, forms a resistance movement with the Bespin Wing Guard on the planet that starts the fight. Soon after, the Uprising in the Anoat sector led by " the Smuggler " liberates the city, basing the Uprising's operations in the Paradise Atrium .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Galactic Civil War (continued; 5 ABY) > Six months after the Battle of Endor :: The hunt for Shadow Wing leads to an Imperial operation at Jarbanov . Concurrently, the Republic 61st Mobile Infantry participates in a campaign in the Cerberon system . (Approximate date)
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Galactic Civil War (continued; 5 ABY) > Six months after the Battle of Endor :: New Republic forces attack the Imperial -held Hyborean Moon , destroying a ISB's blacksite prison as well as its civilian complexes.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Galactic Civil War (continued; 5 ABY) > Six months after the Battle of Endor :: Imperial Vice Admiral Perwin Gedde is captured in the planet Vorlag by a team of New Republic hunters led by Norra Wexley .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Galactic Civil War (continued; 5 ABY) > Six months after the Battle of Endor :: New Republic forces attempt to liberate the Imperial-held world of Nag Ubdur . The Imperial military in the Ubdur system is cut off from the rest of the Empire, making them fight with an increased desperation. The Imperials are initially able to inflict heavy casualties on the Republic forces, including a bloody ambush at Govneh Ridge , but eventually are forced to retreat to defensive entrenchments ten kilometers away from the Ubdurian merchant city of Binjai-Tin . In the process, they raze the city and massacre its inhabitants. During the campaign, the Imperials are desperate enough to use their TIE starfighters in suicide attacks against New Republic positions.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Galactic Civil War (continued; 5 ABY) > Six months after the Battle of Endor :: Siege of Arkanis . As the world falls under the New Republic, bounty hunter Mercurial Swift evacuates Brendol Hux and his son off-world, by orders of Fleet Admiral Gallius Rax.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Galactic Civil War (continued; 5 ABY) > Six months after the Battle of Endor :: After a multi-week battle , the Kuat Drive Yards shipyards , orbiting the Core World planet of Kuat , fall under New Republic forces led by Fleet Admiral Gial Ackbar.

Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Galactic Civil War (continued; 5 ABY) > Six months after the Battle of Endor :: Luke Skywalker and New Republic pilot Rynn Zenat travel to the planet Lehanis to recover Jedi Master Ky Narec 's compendium . During their mission, Skywalker and Zenat encounter Arch-Mage Yuan Howzell and the Acolytes of the Beyond .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Galactic Civil War (continued; 5 ABY) > Six months after the Battle of Endor :: The Wookiees and their homeworld of Kashyyyk are liberated from Imperial territory G5-623 , a breakaway faction of the Galactic Empire led by Grand Moff Lozen Tolruck , by a New Republic fleet led by Admiral Gial Ackbar and forces on the planet led by Han Solo and Norra Wexley's team .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Galactic Civil War (continued; 5 ABY) > Six months after the Battle of Endor :: The Empire attacks Chandrila during the Imperial–Republic peace talks between Mon Mothma of the New Republic and Rae Sloane of the Galactic Empire held in Hanna City. Newly-freed prisoners from Ashmead's Lock on Kashyyyk who were under the influence of controller chips, involuntarily attack Mothma and other New Republic leaders. Mothma and Kyrsta Agate are injured in the attacks, while Hostis Ij , Crix Madine , and others are rumored to be dead. Masterminded by Gallius Rax, the attacks horrify Sloane, who considers the tactic too close to the tactics of the Rebel Alliance.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Galactic Civil War (continued; 5 ABY) > Six months after the Battle of Endor :: The New Republic launches an attack on the Scepter , the flagship of Moff Adelhard, following his involvement in an assassination attempt on Luke Skywalker on Chandrila. Prior to the New Republic's involvement, Adelhard had confronted his Advisor Reyna Oskure after discovering her allegiance to the remains of the Empire, whom Adelhard's Imperial remnant had broken ties with. As New Republic forces begin to arrive, Oskure, with the help of the mercenary Kranor , gains the upper hand over Adelhard, and orders Kranor to execute the Grand Moff as she takes command of the Scepter . However, in Oskure's absence, Kranor allows Adelhard and his right hand man Bragh to flee while still claiming Oskure he had killed them, allowing Adelhard and his most loyal troops escape to Gallowyss via escape pod. Shortly after, Oskure requests backup from Adelhard's fleet and disbands the Iron Blockade , in which Adelhard had quarantined the Anoat sector following the Battle of Endor. After receiving a communication from Oskure informing them of such actions and requesting that they leave the Anoat sector alone, the New Republic retreats back to Chandrila at the request of Admiral Gial Ackbar .

Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Galactic Civil War (continued; 5 ABY) > Six months after the Battle of Endor :: Two days after the attack on the Scepter , Rynn Zenat and Luke Skywalker engage Imperial forces loyal to Adelhard, who has been exiled to the distant Anoat sector outpost of Gallowyss . While Adelhard ultimately escapes aboard a Lambda shuttle late in the battle, the New Republic learns of his survival.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Galactic Civil War (continued; 5 ABY) > Six months after the Battle of Endor :: The Acolytes of the Beyond , on orders from Adelhard, attack Chandrila in attempt to assassinate Senator Leia Organa.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Galactic Civil War (continued; 5 ABY) > Six months after the Battle of Endor :: Following his escape during the Skirmish on Gallowyss, Adelhard, having already retaken command of his Imperial remnant , returns to his former flagship, the Scepter , and recovers the Star Destroyer from the control of Reyna Oskure .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Galactic Civil War (continued; 5 ABY) > Six months after the Battle of Endor :: As part of a series of orchestrated attacks on the Empire in the lead-up to the Battle of Jakku, the Adelhard coalition attacks the Arquitens -class command cruiser of General Stansel Malgreen while it is en-route to Jakku . Upon the command cruiser entering range of Adelhard's Scepter , he has it open fire on the command cruiser with turbolasers before eventually ramming the Star Destroyer into the command cruiser, making it to explode and killing all of its crew members.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Galactic Civil War (continued; 5 ABY) > Six months after the Battle of Endor :: The Empire launches three invasions of Naboo to wipe out the New Republic presence in the system. Because Naboo had been Palpatine's homeworld, the planet had become a rallying point for Imperial sympathizers, though they are foiled by Corona Squadron of the New Republic Defense Fleet.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Galactic Civil War (continued; 5 ABY) > Six months after the Battle of Endor :: General Lando Calrissian and Shriv Suurgav of Inferno Squad destroy an abandoned weapons depot in Sullust , in order to eliminate a weapons factory providing armaments to the Empire's operations in the Western Reaches .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Galactic Civil War (continued; 5 ABY) :: In the waning months of the Galactic Civil War

Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Galactic Civil War (continued; 5 ABY) > In the waning months of the Galactic Civil War :: Having been ordered by the late Emperor Palpatine himself to destroy the Empire for failing him, Gallius Rax concentrates the bulk of Imperial forces under his command to Jakku in the hopes of luring the Republic into battle there and obliterating the entire planet mid-battle, thus ensuring the death of the fragmented Empire. However, Rax also plots to retreat into the Unknown Regions with a select few Imperials whom he had deemed worthy to forge a new empire in the shadows.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Galactic Civil War (continued; 5 ABY) :: Eleven months after the Battle of Endor
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Galactic Civil War (continued; 5 ABY) > Eleven months after the Battle of Endor :: The New Republic engages in border skirmishes with the New Separatist Union .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Galactic Civil War (continued; 5 ABY) > Eleven months after the Battle of Endor :: New Republic General Hera Syndulla leads Alphabet Squadron in pursuit of the 204th Imperial Fighter Wing after spotting the Imperials in the Ciaox Verith system .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Galactic Civil War (continued; 5 ABY) > Eleven months after the Battle of Endor :: General Syndulla leads Alphabet Squadron on a mission to Chadawa , where they battle Imperial loyalist forces enforcing Operation: Cinder, including the 204th, and the Chadawan government . Before the battle, Imperial loyalists had inflicted Operation: Cinder upon Dybbron III and Kortatka .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Galactic Civil War (continued; 5 ABY) :: By this point, the 204th Imperial Fighter Wing had attacked Fedovoi End after its ruling Yomo Council refused to follow Grand Admiral Rae Sloane's orders.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Galactic Civil War (continued; 5 ABY) > By this point, the 204th Imperial Fighter Wing had attacked Fedovoi End after its ruling Yomo Council refused to follow Grand Admiral Rae Sloane's orders. :: General Ria reports to New Republic High Command of the Repulic's Xagobah campaign against the local Imperial-Royalist coalition .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Galactic Civil War (continued; 5 ABY) :: The newly founded Confederacy of Corporate Systems and the New Separatist Union adds to New Republic Chancellor Mon Mothma's worries as the Republic prepares to move its seat of power from Chandrila to the agriworld Nakadia .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Galactic Civil War (continued; 5 ABY) :: By this point, Brin Izisca had become a leader of the Church of the Force , and made holographic recordings of his teachings, including himself reading from the Journal of the Whills .

Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Galactic Civil War (continued; 5 ABY) :: The Sovereign Latitudes of Maracavanya 's Star Dreadnought , the Liberty's Misrule , destroys three Imperial II -class Star Destroyers .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Galactic Civil War (continued; 5 ABY) :: New Republic Senator Tolwar Wartol is arrested for attempting to assassinate Mon Mothma by planting a bomb in her office at the Chandrila Senate house . The attempt fails as Mothma had left to buy a baby gift for Leia Organa, and her advisor Auxi Kray Korbin dies instead.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Galactic Civil War (continued; 5 ABY) :: Battle of Jakku . One year and four days after the Battle of Endor, New Republic forces and the bulk of the Imperial Starfleet engage on Jakku, with the Republic emerging victorious.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Galactic Civil War (continued; 5 ABY) > Battle of Jakku . One year and four days after the Battle of Endor, New Republic forces and the bulk of the Imperial Starfleet engage on Jakku, with the Republic emerging victorious. :: Imperial leader Brendol Hux offers local orphans a chance to leave the suffering of Jakku by recruiting them as child soldiers under the leadership of his son, Armitage. Infinitely loyal, the soldiers included Archex . Gallius Rax is killed by Rae Sloane while attempting to obliterate Jakku in the goal of eliminating all Imperial forces.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Galactic Civil War (continued; 5 ABY) :: The Galactic Concordance . The New Republic and the Galactic Empire cease hostilities, and both powers begin a process of disarmament. The remaining forces of the Empire led by Grand Admiral Rae Sloane, amongst them Brendol Hux and his rescued orphans, adopt Rax's scheme and retreat to the Unknown Regions, rendezvousing with the fallen Emperor's personal Super Star Destroyer , the Eclipse .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) :: 5 ABY
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 5 ABY :: The taming of the Unknown (5 ABY–15 ABY) : The Imperial remnant that fled to the Unknown Regions is met by secret reinforcements in uncharted space. There, the remnant of the Empire grows in power, eventually becoming the First Order , and Imperial-era leaders, such as Grand Admiral Rae Sloane, General Brendol Hux, and Allegiant General Enric Pryde make way for the rise of Snoke, heir apparent to the fallen Emperor. Some come to realize that their new leader was himself subservient to an unseen force.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 5 ABY :: The Ryloth Insurgency ends.

Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 5 ABY :: Ben Solo is born to Leia Organa and Han Solo. By this point, Leia Organa had concluded her year-long training with Luke Skywalker for she witnessed visions of the future, seeing where she would best serve the galaxy.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 5 ABY :: Luke Skywalker begins searching the galaxy for lost lore of the Force.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 5 ABY :: After the Galactic Civil War, the Cosmic Force becomes dormant and is seemingly quieted to those who could sense its presence. (Approximate date)
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) :: Sometime after 5 ABY
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > Sometime after 5 ABY :: An Imperial remnant led by Grand Moff Randd has fled to the Queluhan Nebula in the Unknown Regions.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > Sometime after 5 ABY :: Tamara Ryvora is born on the planet Kuat to a racer . Her father's career would later inspire her to become a racer herself.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > Sometime after 5 ABY :: Team Fireball , a racing team, is found by Jarek Yeager .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) :: 6 ABY
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 6 ABY :: Paige Tico is born on the Hays Minor mining colony to Hue and Thanya Tico .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 6 ABY :: Phasma is born on Parnassos .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 6 ABY :: Siv is born.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 6 ABY :: Simero Quonit is born.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 6 ABY :: Terex travels to Kaddak .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 6 ABY :: Luke Skywalker uncovers Jocasta Nu's cache .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 6 ABY :: Information concerning the Pyke Syndicate is pulled from the Imperial-class Star Destroyer Deliberator close to the Kessel system .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 6 ABY :: Fenril Crisis .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 6 ABY > Fenril Crisis . :: Pirates raid New Republic trading vessels at the Rimma Trade Route , near the planet Sullust . Several starships are destroyed and dozens of traders are killed.

Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 6 ABY > Fenril Crisis . :: A Nagai pirate crash-lands on an unknown planet at the edge of the Fenril sector and is pursued by Rynn Zenat and Luke Skywalker after provoking the death of New Republic pilot Sandrin . Rynn and Luke disarm the pirate, who informs Luke about the lost Crown of Verity , before detonating a bomb and killing himself.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 6 ABY > Fenril Crisis . :: A trade summit is held and the New Republic is going to attend, until a meeting between New Republic Senator Leia Organa, Chancellor Mon Mothma, and the Pirrosi delegation led by Prime Minister Kezrin Almovar turns sour. Prime Minister Almovar claims the New Republic is not welcome at the trade summit because they are acting like a desperate bully, and because they can't even defend their own supply shipments from pirate attacks. Shortly after, the New Republic is formally expelled from the trade summit. In a holo-transmission, Almovar confirms that the Fenril sector will be pulling out of all trade with the New Republic and will be responding to any trespassers into the sector with force.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 6 ABY > Fenril Crisis . :: At the Alshuey Town Bar on the planet Guat'a , Beilert Valance is kicked out by members of the Zantarrk gang , who later confront him outside the bar. Han Solo steps in to stop the gang from killing him, which begins a shootout . After causing a large explosion, the two New Republic agents escape back to the Millennium Falcon and away from the gang.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 6 ABY > Fenril Crisis . :: While entering the Fenril sector, the CR90 corvette Nechrim's Wake and other vessels are attacked by multiple Zantarrk Gang starships, and the trading vessel is forced to crash land on the planet Loradil , where its crew is attacked by Confederacy of Independent Systems battle droids.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 6 ABY > Fenril Crisis . :: Mission to Gadrilam .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 6 ABY > Fenril Crisis . :: The Nagai Garlev crashes onto Cloud City on the planet Bespin, where he demands to speak to his old comrades Lando Calrissian and Han Solo. Joined by Beilert Valance, Solo arrives on Bespin and meet with Calrissian, but, by that point, a mysterious assassin, secretly the Anzati Reyna Oskure, has already killed Garlev. The assassin then manages to escape aboard a new model of cloud car.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 6 ABY > Fenril Crisis . :: A funeral is held for Garlev at Cloud City by Han Solo, Lando Calrissian and Beilert Valance.

Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 6 ABY > Fenril Crisis . :: Seeking to bring the Fenril sector planet of Kaltrais , once a proud member world of the Galactic Republic, into the New Republic, Organa contacts her childhood friend, the planet's President Tusvein Shoirin . But after the offer is strangely denied and an in-person meeting arranged, she suspects and travels to the planet with Kith Alaytia , against the wills of Mon Mothma and Luke Skywalker. After a quick meeting with Shoirin confirms that he is no longer truly in control, Organa and Alaytia are captured by occupying Zantarrk Gang stormtroopers. They manage to escape imprisonment and free Shoirin as the Millennium Falcon arrives with Han Solo, Luke Skywalker, Rynn Zenat , and Beilert Valance to rescue them. Over Kaltrais, the Falcon is attacked by a Fenril Consortium's fleet before Shoirin gives his life shutting down the planet's defense systems and causing the fleet to retreat. After the battle, Reyna Oskure reveals to the New Republic that she is part of the Consortium.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 6 ABY > Fenril Crisis . :: Luke Skywalker, Han Solo, Beilert Valance, and Rynn Zenat are send by Mon Mothma to Loradil to rescue the crew of New Republic merchant corvette Nechrim's Wake , who are under attack by a group of surviving Confederacy of Independent Systems battle droids based in a Providence -class Carrier . The New Republic agents fight through the crashed carrier, eventually meeting droid resistance. In order to fight their way out of the carrier, the three men find and use Phase II clone trooper armor for the ensuing battle, while Zenat escapes to the downed Republic corvette. There, she meets captain Gauvis and Finch from its crew, who introduce her to Nagai rebellion member Marntiv , the reason why the ship was targeted by the Zantarrk Gang. After a battle with countless battle droids and several Armored Assault Tanks , they manage to escape aboard the Millennium Falcon with the merchant crew members and Marntiv.

Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 6 ABY > Fenril Crisis . :: The Nagai rebellion stages an insurrection following years of abuse and slavery. As Nagai slaves are being moved and used by the Zantarrk Gang and the Fenril Consortium, the followers of Garlev indentured on the Fenril sector world of Kaltrais rise up against their oppressors, starting a violent revolt. This insurrection quickly grows under the leadership of Jesrit , and New Republic agents led by Luke Skywalker soon arrive to help after rescuing Marntiv on Loradil. Fighting on the ground, the New Republic aided Nagai make quick progress, with Republic special agent Bastion having been placed on Kaltrais earlier by Leia Organa. They eventually make it to Pirrosi Prime Minister Almovar 's chamber, talking her down from her plans as the insurrection continues. Vowing to make things right, Almovar calls her fleet away from the New Republic, as the New Republic's agents accompany the newly-freed Nagai to a hangar. There they steal many ships as Luke Skywalker covers for their departure before he is picked up in the Millennium Falcon . Using the stolen ships, the Nagai rebellion is now bound for their homeworld of Nagi.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 6 ABY > Fenril Crisis . :: The freed Nagai link up with the rest of their freed comrades revolting against the Fenril Consortium with the goal of retaking their ancestral planet. As the battle rages, the Millennium Falcon is intercepted by pirate forces in orbit and crashed into the battle on the surface, and its occupants are united with the Nagai rebels. Skywalker, Zenat, and Jesrit are attacked while in transit to get medical attention for the dying Zenat, resulting in Jesrit and Zenat being captured and brought to Oskure's throne in the Nagai Royal Palace . The Anzati is distracted by Solo's party's infiltration, including Beilert Valance and Agent Bastion. Skywalker, left in the wastes of Nagi, runs until fainting from exhaustion, but is awoken by Tuula , daughter of Garlev. Zantarrk leader Gallana Venk is sent to destroy Solo's group, but is killed in the process by Beilert Valance. After tracking Oskure's location, Bastion is killed, but the information she gains leads Solo and Valance to Oskure, who is trying to escape the planet as her pirate forces blockade the world in orbit.

Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 6 ABY > Fenril Crisis . :: In response to an earlier call for aid from Solo, Leia Organa sends Kith Alaytia and a New Republic task force to Nagi to aid the Nagai in their battle. Solo, Valance, Skywalker, and Tuula arrive just as Oskure's shuttle is being loaded, and Skywalker holds her still while he placed the Crown of Verity on her head. She reveals that her entire fleet is rigged to self-destruct, which will allow her to take the entire New Republic fleet and everyone on the surface with it.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) :: 7 ABY
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 7 ABY :: Terex obtains the Carrion Spike .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 7 ABY :: The Vorantis , a ship owned by the pilot Brantis Mo Fresk , beat the starship Brightfox in the Karee Blockade Clutch .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 7 ABY :: Han Solo and Lando Calrissian search for the Phylanx Redux Transmitter , a weapon system capable of transmitting a virus that causes droids to attack and kill organics. They hope to prevent its creator, Pau'an gangster Fyzen Gor , from unleashing a massacre on Cloud City.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 7 ABY > Han Solo and Lando Calrissian search for the Phylanx Redux Transmitter , a weapon system capable of transmitting a virus that causes droids to attack and kill organics. They hope to prevent its creator, Pau'an gangster Fyzen Gor , from unleashing a massacre on Cloud City. :: Mission to Substation Grimdock .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 7 ABY > Han Solo and Lando Calrissian search for the Phylanx Redux Transmitter , a weapon system capable of transmitting a virus that causes droids to attack and kill organics. They hope to prevent its creator, Pau'an gangster Fyzen Gor , from unleashing a massacre on Cloud City. :: The New Republic Defense Fleet blockades the prison moon Substation Grimdock , after Imperial Sergeant Magernon grants amnesty to many of the prisoners and starships of many pirate organizations arrive to collect the prisoners. During the fight, Fyzen Gor escapes aboard the pirate frigate Radium Destrobar . Following the loss of their two largest warships, the pirates surrender.

Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 7 ABY > Han Solo and Lando Calrissian search for the Phylanx Redux Transmitter , a weapon system capable of transmitting a virus that causes droids to attack and kill organics. They hope to prevent its creator, Pau'an gangster Fyzen Gor , from unleashing a massacre on Cloud City. :: Han Solo and Lando Calrissian track the transmitter to the Mesulan Remnants Belt , where they fight Fyzen Gor and his Original Dozen , helped by L3-37 's Elthree Assault Team . Gor is killed by Solo.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) :: 8 ABY
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 8 ABY :: Poe Dameron begins to learn to fly starships from his mother, Shara Bey.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) :: 9 ABY
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 9 ABY :: Gideon's Imperial remnant issues a bounty to multiple hunters on "the Child"—a Force-sensitive member of Yoda's species named Grogu. Multiple parties clash in the ensuing hunt for Grogu , with the Mandalorian bounty hunter Din Djarin emerging as the victor after undertaking a mission to Arvala-7 .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 9 ABY :: Despite giving the Child to his Imperial clients, Din Djarin would not let go, and instead mounts a rescue .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 9 ABY :: A village on the planet Sorgan hires Din Djarin and Carasynthia Dune to protect them from Klatooinian raiders that had been attacking and raiding them. After basic combat training for the villagers and building defenses around the village, in the resulting skirmish the Klatooinian tribe is repelled and their AT-ST Raider destroyed.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 9 ABY :: While on Tatooine, Din Djarin is hired by bounty hunter Toro Calican to assist him in the capture of renegade assassin Fennec Shand . After a hunt , Calican shoots Shand in the stomach, and she is left for dead. Calican learns about the bounty on Grogu, and tries to capture him, but is killed by Djarin . The following night, Shand is saved by Boba Fett.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 9 ABY :: In the Bothan-Five incident , a crew hired by Ranzar Malk in Roost space station, led by mercenary Migs Mayfeld , and including Din Djarin, infiltrates the New Republic Correctional Transport Bothan-5 in order to liberate prisoner Qin . As the crew reaches the holding cell, they betray Djarin and he is forced to lock the other mercenaries in a cell before escaping with the prisoner. Djarin returned Qin to the Roost space station and left behind a New Republic tracking device, allowing the New Republic to destroy the station.

Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 9 ABY :: Nevarro is liberated from the Imperial remnant of Moff Gideon by Din Djarin and his allies, including Greef Karga, Cara Dune, Kuiil and IG-11. The later sacrifices himself via self-destruction in order to kill a platoon of stormtroopers to prevent Grogu from being captured.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 9 ABY :: During a mission to Tatooine, Din Djarin brokes an alliance between the citizens of Mos Pelgo and a tribe of Tusken Raiders , and together they take down a leviathan krayt dragon that had been terrorizing their region of the planet.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 9 ABY :: Djarin is tasked by Peli Motto with delivering the Querm Rybet " Frog Lady " to her husband on Trask , in exchange for the location of a group of Mandalorians. As a result, he meets Bo-Katan Kryze's unit .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 9 ABY :: Din Djarin joins Bo-Katan Kryze's group of Mandalorians in a mission to steal weapons from Moff Gideon's Imperial remnant. Before parting ways, Kryze instructs Djarin to find her friend Ahsoka Tano on Corvus .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 9 ABY :: Greef Karga, now Magistrate of Nevarro, recruits Din Djarin and Cara Dune into attacking Moff Gideon's Nevarro Imperial base , with the objective of eliminating the Imperial presence on the planet. After fighting their way into the base, they discover cloning cylinders containing remnants of Doctor Penn Pershing's failed experiments, indicating that Grogu was sought for his midi-chlorians. The base is destroyd and Gideon's Imperial remnant is driven from Nevarro.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 9 ABY :: Djarin travels to Corvus along with Grogu, meeting Ahsoka Tano.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 9 ABY > Djarin travels to Corvus along with Grogu, meeting Ahsoka Tano. :: They liberate the city Calodan together from the control of Elsbeth's regime , fighting mercenaries and HK-87 assassin droids . Tano defeats the city's despot Morgan Elsbeth in a duel and interrogates her for the whereabouts of Grand Admiral Thrawn.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 9 ABY > Djarin travels to Corvus along with Grogu, meeting Ahsoka Tano. :: Tano sees that she could not train Grogu, as Djarin had formed a paternal bond with the child, and in turn suggests that Djarin take Grogu to Tython, where the child could find his path in the Force.

Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 9 ABY :: Grogu, while trying to comunicate with other Jedi through the seeing stone , located at the ancient ruins of the Force-henge on the planet Tython, is captured by Moff Gideon's dark troopers and taken to Gideon's light cruiser . Din Djarin, Boba Fett and Fennec Shand fight Imperial forces but are unable to rescue Grogu, and in the fight the Razor Crest is destroyed.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 9 ABY :: Din Djarin and his allies, Cara Dune, Migs Mayfeld, Boba Fett, and Fennec Shand undertake a Mission against Imperial remnants on the planet Morak . Djarin and Mayfeld infiltrate the Morak Imperial refinery posing as Juggernaut Pilots to retrieve information on the whereabouts of Moff Gideon's light cruiser. During their escape, Mayfeld fires on a shipment of rhydonium, causing a chain reaction that heavily damages the refinery.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 9 ABY :: Din Djarin and his allies, along with Nite Owls Bo-Katan Kryze, Koska Reeves and Axe Woves mounts a successful rescue of Grogu from Moff Gideon's cruiser. They are able to pilot a stolen shuttle through the launch tube and crash-land in the cruiser, allowing the team to board it. Din Djarin defeats Gideon in a duel, and a Dark Trooper platoon called by Gideon is destroyed by Luke Skywalker, who sensed Grogu through Tython's seeing stone.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 9 ABY > Din Djarin and his allies, along with Nite Owls Bo-Katan Kryze, Koska Reeves and Axe Woves mounts a successful rescue of Grogu from Moff Gideon's cruiser. They are able to pilot a stolen shuttle through the launch tube and crash-land in the cruiser, allowing the team to board it. Din Djarin defeats Gideon in a duel, and a Dark Trooper platoon called by Gideon is destroyed by Luke Skywalker, who sensed Grogu through Tython's seeing stone. :: Djarin takes the Darksaber while Gideon is taken into New Republic custody, though he is broken out en route to trial.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 9 ABY > Din Djarin and his allies, along with Nite Owls Bo-Katan Kryze, Koska Reeves and Axe Woves mounts a successful rescue of Grogu from Moff Gideon's cruiser. They are able to pilot a stolen shuttle through the launch tube and crash-land in the cruiser, allowing the team to board it. Din Djarin defeats Gideon in a duel, and a Dark Trooper platoon called by Gideon is destroyed by Luke Skywalker, who sensed Grogu through Tython's seeing stone. :: As Bo-Katan Kryze returned to her forces without the Darksaber, her Mandalorians abandon her and become privateers under Axe Woves .

Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 9 ABY > Din Djarin and his allies, along with Nite Owls Bo-Katan Kryze, Koska Reeves and Axe Woves mounts a successful rescue of Grogu from Moff Gideon's cruiser. They are able to pilot a stolen shuttle through the launch tube and crash-land in the cruiser, allowing the team to board it. Din Djarin defeats Gideon in a duel, and a Dark Trooper platoon called by Gideon is destroyed by Luke Skywalker, who sensed Grogu through Tython's seeing stone. :: The Jedi Luke Skywalker beckons Grogu to train as a Jedi with him. Removing his Mandalorian helmet, Djarin gives his blessing to Grogu before letting the latter go.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 9 ABY :: By this time, Luke Skywalker is building a Jedi Temple on the planet Ossus.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 9 ABY :: Boba Fett and Fennec Shand attack Jabba's Palace. Fett kills Bib Fortuna and takes his place as master of the palace.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 9 ABY :: Boba Fett assumes the title of Daimyo after taking control of the throne of Jabba from Bib Fortuna. He laids claim to Jabba's possessions, including the criminal empire that Jabba built on Tatooine.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 9 ABY :: Boba Fett and Fennec Shand are ambushed outside Sanctuary , a cantina and casino in the city of Mos Espa , by a group of assassins belonging to the Order of the Night Wind . They are helped by two Gamorrean Warriors, and defeat the assassins, Fennec captures one of them for interrogation.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 9 ABY :: A Hutt brother and sister , twin cousins of Jabba, send the Wookiee bounty hunter Krrsantan to assassinate the Daimyo. However, Krrsantan fails to kill Boba Fett and is captured. Defeated, the twins apologize to Fett and give him a rancor .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 9 ABY :: Fett recruits into his gotra the Mods , a street gang of cyborgs operating within the Worker's District in Mos Espa. The gang had resorted to stealing from the water monger Lortha Peel since they were unable to find work in order to pay for the high price of water. After learning of their situation, Fett gives them an offer to work for him.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 9 ABY :: Boba Fett and the Mods chase Mayor Mok Shaiz 's majordomo through the streets of Mos Espa. After capturing him, he informed Fett that Shaiz was working with the Pyke Syndicate .

Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 9 ABY :: Din Djarin hunts the Klatooinian Kaba Baiz to his meat packing plant on Glavis Ringworld . He eliminates Baiz and five other Klatooinians and convinces the other workers to let him walk out of the plant unharmed.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 9 ABY :: At the Mandalorian covert on Glavis Ringworld, Paz Vizsla , member of House Vizsla , challenges Djarin for a duel so he could regain the Darksaber back to his Clan . The duel is stopped by the Armorer , who exiles Djarin after learning he had removed his helmet.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 9 ABY :: The Marshal of Freetown Cobb Vanth and his deputy Scott face Cad Bane , a bounty hunter under the employment of the Pyke Syndicate , in a shoot-out in the outskirts of the town. Cobb Vanth is wounded and Scott is killed, and Cad Bane warns the citizens of Freetown not to interfere in the syndicate's takeover of Tatooine.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 9 ABY :: After a brief time training with Luke Skywalker in his Temple, Grogu decides to return to Din Djarin. They reunite in Mos Espa after R2-D2 transports Grogu in Luke's X-Wing from Tython to Tatooine.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 9 ABY :: A gang war between Daimyo Boba Fett's Fett gotra and the Pyke Syndicate for the control of Tatooine.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 9 ABY > A gang war between Daimyo Boba Fett's Fett gotra and the Pyke Syndicate for the control of Tatooine. :: The Pyke Syndicate destroys Garsa Fwip's Sanctuary by planting a bomb within a camtono left inside the cantina. Everyone inside the Sanctuary, including Garsa Fwip and her servers, are killed. Although Mayor Mok Shaiz approved of the Pykes operating in Mos Espa to combat Boba Fett and his gotra, he did not approve of the bombing. The incident marks the beginning of open warfare between the Fett Gotra and Pykes.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 9 ABY > A gang war between Daimyo Boba Fett's Fett gotra and the Pyke Syndicate for the control of Tatooine. :: The Fett gotra, helped by the people of Freetown and Din Djarin and Grogu, battles the Pyke Syndicate, allied with the Aqualish , Strassi and Klatooinian crime families, in Mos Espa for the control of the planet. After a Fett gotra victory, the Pyke Syndicate falls back from Mos Espa, the city is partially destroyed, and Cad Bane is killed by Boba Fett.

Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 9 ABY > A gang war between Daimyo Boba Fett's Fett gotra and the Pyke Syndicate for the control of Tatooine. :: Fennec Shand assassinates the leadership of the Pykes and their allies at their Desert Survey Office in the city of Mos Eisley. With their deaths, the Fett gotra defeats the Pyke Syndicate presence on the world and emerges as its leading criminal syndicate.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) :: c. 9 ABY
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > c. 9 ABY :: During a Children of the Watch induction ceremony outside a Mandalorian covert , a Lake monster attacks members of the Tribe. The Mandalorians have difficulty dealing with the beast until the arrival of Din Djarin, who launches proton torpedoes from his N-1 starfighter , killing the beast. Djarin had found proof that the Living Waters of Mandalore could still exist and had arrived to ask "the Armorer" for permission to launch a quest to redeem himself in the eyes of the Children of the Watch.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > c. 9 ABY :: In Nevarro City , Greef Karga shoots Vane 's blaster and kills four pirates belonging to Gorian Shard's pirate gang who wanted to drink inside the Nevarro school , with the assistance of Din Djarin.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > c. 9 ABY :: While in orbit above Nevarro, Djarin and Grogu are attacked by pirate starfighters commanded by Vane, who sought to avenge the deaths of his brothers. After a chase through asteroid fields , and evading Gorian Shard's Corsair , Djarin manages to escape, destroying five of the pirate starfighters in the process.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > c. 9 ABY :: With Bo-Katan Kryze's help, Din Djarin bathes in the Living Waters of Mandalore in order to redeem his position in the Children of the Watch , in the process discovering that Mandalore is still habitable. While also submerged in the Living Waters, Bo-Katan witnesses a live Mythosaur.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > c. 9 ABY :: A large force of TIE bombers , send by Gideon's Imperial remnant, destroy the castle of Bo-Katan Kryze on the planet Kalevala , homeworld of House Kryze in the Mandalore system. TIE interceptors attack Bo-Katan Kryze's Gauntlet starfighter and Din Djarin's N-1 starfighter, who are unable to stop the bombing.

Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > c. 9 ABY :: Doctor Penn Pershing , former Imperial scientist and Amnesty Officer, joins fellow officer Elia Kane into retrieving a mobile lab station from a decommissioned Imperial-class Star Destroyer, hoping to use it to continue his cloning research. However, New Republic soldiers arrest Pershing, and Elia Kane erases his memory to prevent him from revealing the secrets of Moff Gideon's cloning project to the wider galaxy.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > c. 9 ABY :: After Ragnar Vizsla , a Mandalorian Foundling, is taken from the Mandalorian covert by a canyon raptor to its nest, he is rescued by a war party led by Bo-Katan, including Din Djarin and Ragnar's father, Paz Vizsla .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > c. 9 ABY :: Mandalorians from The Tribe, led by Bo-Katan Kryze, and including Din Djarin, Paz Vizsla, and the Armorer, liberate Nevarro from the pirates of Gorian Shard , who had captured the the planet at the behest of Moff Gideon. Bo-Katan's Gauntlet starfighter drops the Mandalorian warriors into the city, who fight in the streets against the pirates. Meanwhile, Bo-Katan's Gauntlet and Din Djarin's N-1 starfighter destroy Gorian Shard's Corsair, killing him and his crew.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > c. 9 ABY :: Bo-Katan Kryze is accepted into the Children of the Watch, and the Armorer tasks Kryze with reuniting all Mandalorians.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > c. 9 ABY :: After the son of a Mon Calamari viceroy runs away with his Quarren lover Shuggoth aboard her starship, his mother hires a group of Mandalorian privateers led by Axe Woves to retrieve him and bring him home.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > c. 9 ABY :: Din Djarin and Bo-Katan Kryze travel to the planet Plazir-15 in an attempt to recruit the Mandalorian mercenary forces following Axe Woves, who were stationed on the planet. There they investigate the mysterious malfunctioning of Plazir-15's droids at the behest of the planetary goverment, and capture rogue Head of Security Commissioner Helgait , who was behind the malfunctioning of the droids.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > c. 9 ABY :: Kryze returns to Axe Woves' group of Mandalorians with the Darksaber in hand, regaining their allegiance and her Mandalorian fleet .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > c. 9 ABY :: The Shadow Council , among which include Brendol Hux and Gideon, anticipates Gilad Pellaeon's promise of the return of Grand Admiral Thrawn.

Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > c. 9 ABY :: Together with the Children of the Watch, the Mandalorian resistance led by Bo-Katan Kryze lands on the planet Mandalore.
