On the surface they find survivors of the Great Purge of Mandalore , and join forces to retake Mandalore from Moff Gideon' Imperial remnant, who continued to control the planet with the secret support of the Imperial warlords on the Shadow Council after the fall of the Empire. The Mandalorians defeat Gideon's forces, including members of the Praetorian Guard. Gideon and his Force-sensitive clones are killed, destroying his Imperial remnant. After the battle, Din Djarin adopts Din Grogu as his son and is tasked with taking him on his journeys, Mandalore is resettled by the Mandalorians who begin to rebuild the planet, and the Great Forge is relit.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) :: c. 9 ABY (continued)
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > c. 9 ABY (continued) :: Ahsoka Tano, Huyang, and Sabine Wren begin searching for Ezra Bridger together, coming into conflict with Morgan Elsbeth and her Dark Jedi mercenaries Baylan Skoll and Shin Hati on their quest to find Grand Admiral Thrawn.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > c. 9 ABY (continued) > Ahsoka Tano, Huyang, and Sabine Wren begin searching for Ezra Bridger together, coming into conflict with Morgan Elsbeth and her Dark Jedi mercenaries Baylan Skoll and Shin Hati on their quest to find Grand Admiral Thrawn. :: Former Jedi Knight Baylan Skoll and his apprentice Shin Hati board and attack the New Republic Defender -class cruiser Vesper to rescue Morgan Elsbeth. They kill almost all the New Republic forces, including the captain of the ship Hayle , and after retrieving Elzbeth the cruiser is destroyed.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > c. 9 ABY (continued) > Ahsoka Tano, Huyang, and Sabine Wren begin searching for Ezra Bridger together, coming into conflict with Morgan Elsbeth and her Dark Jedi mercenaries Baylan Skoll and Shin Hati on their quest to find Grand Admiral Thrawn. :: Ahsoka Tano travels to a Nightsister temple on the planet Arcana to retrieve a map that leads to the missing Grand Admiral Thrawn. However, Tano is ambushed by HK-87 assassin droids sent by Morgan Elsbeth, who self-destruct after Tano escapes with the map and destroys the stronghold.

Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > c. 9 ABY (continued) > Ahsoka Tano, Huyang, and Sabine Wren begin searching for Ezra Bridger together, coming into conflict with Morgan Elsbeth and her Dark Jedi mercenaries Baylan Skoll and Shin Hati on their quest to find Grand Admiral Thrawn. :: Governor Ryder Azadi of Lothal , accompanied by Lothal Senator Jai Kell , holds a ceremony in Capital City to celebrate the Liberation of Lothal and also to honor the Spectres with a mural .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > c. 9 ABY (continued) > Ahsoka Tano, Huyang, and Sabine Wren begin searching for Ezra Bridger together, coming into conflict with Morgan Elsbeth and her Dark Jedi mercenaries Baylan Skoll and Shin Hati on their quest to find Grand Admiral Thrawn. :: On Lothal, Ahsoka Tano and Sabine Wren duel Shin Hati, who attempts to steal the map to the missing Grand Admiral Thrawn for Morgan Elsbeth. Ultimately, Hati successfully escapes with the map after stabbing Wren in the stomach with her lightsaber.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > c. 9 ABY (continued) > Ahsoka Tano, Huyang, and Sabine Wren begin searching for Ezra Bridger together, coming into conflict with Morgan Elsbeth and her Dark Jedi mercenaries Baylan Skoll and Shin Hati on their quest to find Grand Admiral Thrawn. :: The former Inquisitor Marrok and Shin Hati travel to the Santhe Shipyards on the planet Corellia to retrieve the final hyperdrive engine for the Eye of Sion , an intergalactic transport, while Ahsoka Tano and Hera Syndulla try to stop them. Ahsoka duels Marrok and Hera Syndulla pursue the Transport CT-O5 escaping with the engine. Although they escape, Syndulla places a tracking device on the hyperdrive engine. Santhe Shipyards' Regional Supervisor Myn Weaver is arrested for plotting with the Imperial Remnants.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > c. 9 ABY (continued) > Ahsoka Tano, Huyang, and Sabine Wren begin searching for Ezra Bridger together, coming into conflict with Morgan Elsbeth and her Dark Jedi mercenaries Baylan Skoll and Shin Hati on their quest to find Grand Admiral Thrawn. :: Ahsoka Tano and Sabine Wren discover the Eye of Sion in the Denab system . At Morgan Elsbeth's command, Shin Hati and Marrok lead a starfighter squadron against Tano and Wren, attempting to destroy the T-6 1974 shuttle carrying them. During the dogfight , Tano's droid Huyang scanns the Eye of Sion which is a large hyperspace transport ring , but her T-6 shuttle is damaged in the process. Hati's squadron pursue the Jedi to the planet Seatos , and ultimately the Jedi escape from Hati and Marrok, whose squadmates are killed during the battle.

Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > c. 9 ABY (continued) > Ahsoka Tano, Huyang, and Sabine Wren begin searching for Ezra Bridger together, coming into conflict with Morgan Elsbeth and her Dark Jedi mercenaries Baylan Skoll and Shin Hati on their quest to find Grand Admiral Thrawn. :: On Seatos , Sabine Wren duels Shin Hati while Ahsoka Tano duels Marrok. After killing Marrok, Tano travels to a henge used for mapping the other galaxy, where she faces Baylan Skoll in a duel. After temporarily disabling the map, Skoll knocks her off the edge of a cliff, and she enters the World Between Worlds . After Hati disappears, Wren finds Skoll at the henge and threatens to destroy the map. Knowing she wants to find Ezra, Skoll calls her bluff, convincing her to allow him to reactivate the map so that she can go with them to find Bridger.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > c. 9 ABY (continued) > Ahsoka Tano, Huyang, and Sabine Wren begin searching for Ezra Bridger together, coming into conflict with Morgan Elsbeth and her Dark Jedi mercenaries Baylan Skoll and Shin Hati on their quest to find Grand Admiral Thrawn. :: Elsbeth's Eye of Sion is completed over Seatos. The Dark Jedi capture the pursuing Sabine Wren and together they depart for the galaxy of Thrawn's exile.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > c. 9 ABY (continued) > Ahsoka Tano, Huyang, and Sabine Wren begin searching for Ezra Bridger together, coming into conflict with Morgan Elsbeth and her Dark Jedi mercenaries Baylan Skoll and Shin Hati on their quest to find Grand Admiral Thrawn. :: New Republic General Hera Syndulla defies orders to help Tano and Wren in their pursuit on Seatos, and is recalled for trial by senators such as Hamato Xiono .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > c. 9 ABY (continued) > Ahsoka Tano, Huyang, and Sabine Wren begin searching for Ezra Bridger together, coming into conflict with Morgan Elsbeth and her Dark Jedi mercenaries Baylan Skoll and Shin Hati on their quest to find Grand Admiral Thrawn. :: Wren, Tano, and Ezra Bridger reunite on Peridea and kill Morgan Elsbeth.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > c. 9 ABY (continued) > Ahsoka Tano, Huyang, and Sabine Wren begin searching for Ezra Bridger together, coming into conflict with Morgan Elsbeth and her Dark Jedi mercenaries Baylan Skoll and Shin Hati on their quest to find Grand Admiral Thrawn. :: The Dathomiri Great Mothers help Thrawn's forces with their return to the known galaxy, arriving at Dathomir.

Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > c. 9 ABY (continued) > Ahsoka Tano, Huyang, and Sabine Wren begin searching for Ezra Bridger together, coming into conflict with Morgan Elsbeth and her Dark Jedi mercenaries Baylan Skoll and Shin Hati on their quest to find Grand Admiral Thrawn. :: While Wren, Tano, and Huyang also remain on Peridea, Ezra Bridger returns to the New Republic.

Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 18 ABY :: Ransolm Casterfo experiences as a member of the Riosa's planetary security force make him come to believe that improving Riosa's fortunes lay in embarking in a political career, as Riosa needs better political and economic management to rebuild after the damage done by the Empire, and leaves the security force.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 18 ABY :: Torra Doza is born to Venisa and Imanuel Doza .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 18 ABY :: Jac Lodain is born.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 18 ABY :: A cell of the smuggler gang known as the Spice Runners of Kijimi undertakes a heist on Kellgar Seven . The group, led by Vigilch , succeedes and escapes to the moon Yavin 4 . However, the cell's members discover that their pilot, Beke Mon'z , is betraying them to rival syndicates, while actually he is a spy for the New Republic Security Bureau officer Sela Trune . On Yavin 4, Vigilch kills Mon'z, leaving the Spice Runners stranded, while Trune leads an investigation on the moon following the death of her operative. The group is assisted by Poe Dameron , a resident of Yavin 4 who wishes to escape the moon, who pilots their XS stock light freighter Ragged Claw offworld.

Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 18 ABY :: Poe Dameron joins the Spice Runners of Kijimi, developing a close relationship with Zorii Bliss , the daughter of the Spice Runners' leader Zeva Bliss .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 18 ABY :: A skirmish is fought between the Spice Runners of Kijimi and the rival Zualjinn Syndicate on the planet Quintil . After Tomasso , the leader of a smaller Spice Runner cell, kills the Zualjinn high commander while meeting with the syndicate under the guise of a diplomatic mission, he is left stranded on Quintil, with the Zualjinn searching for him. The remaining members of the cell, led by Vigilch, embark on a mission to save Tomasso, who is located by Zorii Bliss and the new recruit Poe Dameron. The Zualjinn locate the remaining Spice Runners, pinning them down in a blaster fight. Dameron attempts to trick the Zualjinn leader into thinking he is betraying the Spice Runners as a distraction, but Tomasso is caught sneaking onto their starship , and the Spice Runner cell is captured and imprisoned. However, the smugglers are freed by a group of Kyuzo associates of Tomasso, led by Zatticha . The Kyuzo aide the Spice Runners in reaching their vessel and escaping the planet, though the smugglers are pursued by three Zualjinn ships. With Dameron piloting, the Spice Runners manage to escape the Zualjinn by hyperspace skipping , crash-landing on the planet Sorgan . Following Dameron's feat, the Spice Runner cell officially recognizes him as a member.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 18 ABY :: After escaping the Pykes, Ledesmar , a mercenary and former slave of the Pyke Syndicate , steals a Moraysian cruiser and its complement of droids, and strucks out alone, at some point obtaining the helmet of Zeva Bliss. In order to both eliminate Ledesmar as a potential threat and retrieve the helmet, a cell of the Spice Runners led by Vigilch attacks the cruiser , with Poe Dameron's piloting defeating Ledesmar's automated drones and allowing them to board. Aboard, the EV-series droid EV-6B6 , unwillingly serving the mercenary, leads Zorii Bliss and Poe Dameron into a trap. While Ledesmar kills Vigilch, Bliss manages to kill the mercenary. However, Sela Trune intends to use the Spice Runners' mission as a trap, having received word of the mission from Tomasso, who has become an informant for the New Republic. Five New Republic starships exit hyperspace near the Moraysian cruiser, and Trune boards the cruiser with a team of officers, cornering Bliss, Dameron, and the freed EV-6B6 as they try to escape. While Bliss and the droid escape on a BTL-S3 Y-wing starfighter , Dameron incapacitates Trune, fleeing the cruiser in the Ragged Claw , but not before making sure that Trune's officers rescue her. Trune takes the Spice Runner Marinda Gan prisoner.

Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 18 ABY :: The smuggler Alfris Sotin proposes a deal to the Spice Runners of Kijimi , and they send Zorii Bliss and Poe Dameron to Ankot Station to meet him. However, Sotin betrays them to the Guavian Death Gang , and the Spice Runners find themselves under attack by Guavian soldiers . Bliss and Dameron manage to escape, also freeing several slaves Sotin had aboard his freighter, the Vondel .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) :: 19 ABY
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 19 ABY :: The Spice Runners of Kijimi send Zorii Bliss and Poe Dameron to the planet Guat'a to steal the star maps known as the Letters of Where and When , from the warlord Smaatku . They are pursued by Smaatku and his guards, who are killed when Tomasso hits them with the blaster cannons of the freighter Vondel . Following the heist, the Osako pirates pursue the Spice Runners through the nearby Torch Nebula , having been approached by Kes Dameron , Poe's father, to track down his son.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 19 ABY :: Zeva Bliss , leader of the Spice Runners of Kijimi, invites numerous criminal allies and enemies to Kijimi under the guise of making alliances, but intending to instead execute the criminals present, lifting the Spice Runners up in the galactic underworld. While Bliss speaks to her guests, her daughter Zorii, alongside Dameron and the droid EV-6B6 , are sent to activate the trap that will leave the criminals prisoner to the Spice Runners. While Dameron is not initially informed of the summit's true purpose, he eventually realizes what Bliss plans to do, and refuses to follow her orders. He and EV-6B6 abandon working for the Spice Runners, helping the criminals escape their execution. At the same time, rogue New Republic officer Sela Trune visits Kijimi intent on killing Zeva Bliss, but is struck down and fatally wounded by the Spice Runner leader. After the criminals are freed, some, including Tarand Crowe , remain behind to fight against the Spice Runners. However, EV-6B6 is destroyed by the guard Gezlar , who almost succeeds in killing Dameron. After Trune's defeat, Dameron attacks Zeva Bliss. Bliss overpowers Dameron, but is stopped from killing him by Zorii. Zorii suggests that she and Dameron defeat Zeva and take control of the Spice Runners, but Dameron refuses to continue living a criminal life, leading his former partner to order him to run. Dameron finds assistance from Crowe, who directs him to a contact of his on Kijimi.

Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 19 ABY :: During his attempt to rebuild the Jedi Order, Luke Skywalker travels with his Padawan Ben Solo and the explorer Lor San Tekka to the planet Elphrona , where they hope to find Jedi artifacts in the planet's Jedi outpost . On route to Elphrona, Snoke takes the opportunity to sow seeds of doubt in Solo about the Jedi Order, while inside the outpost, the Jedi and Tekka encounter the Knights of Ren, who also wish to claim the artifacts inside the outpost.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 19 ABY :: Phasma and her older brother Keldo of the desolate Unknown Regions planet of Parnassos reside with their family directly around the Nautilus , the clan's ancestral home. They grew up having to defend the family's territory from raids from the Scyre and the Claw clans. Phasma orchestrates the deaths of her family , including her father and mother , in order to ensure both herself and Keldo survive while still being able to live in the Nautilus.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 19 ABY :: Captain Cardinal begins training a new generation of First Order stormtroopers on the Absolution under Brendol Hux .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 19 ABY :: Exantor Divo , son of the once agent of Imperial Security Bureau Andressa Divo , and grandson of the once police inspector of the Coruscant Security Force Tanivos Exantor Divo , graduates from the Hosnian Prime Academy of Law Enforcement .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 19 ABY :: Yama Dex is born on Corellia.

Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 21 ABY :: Luke Skywalker and Lando Calrissian undertakes a mission to Pasaana , in which the duo tracks Ochi of Bestoon after Skywalker sensed a disturbance in the Force. The two fail to find Ochi, who eventually dies on Pasaana . Calrissian stays on the planet after finding peace and a sense of community amongst the local Aki-Aki .

Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 24 ABY :: Aboard the Naboo yacht of the late Emperor Palpatine, Brendol Hux and a small group of stormtroopers crash on Parnassos. They leave Parnassos after recruiting the Scyre warrior Phasma , who betrays her people to seek a better life, and the girl Frey , who is placed in the stormtrooper training program.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 24 ABY :: Cardinal is tasked with introducing Phasma to First Order technology and protocols, and Cardinal's duty as the lead stormtrooper trainer is split with Phasma. Cardinal is transferred to the Absolution , and Brendol Hux acquires a new bodyguard.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 24 ABY :: Joph Seastriker enrolls in the New Republic Academy .
