Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) :: 28 ABY
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 28 ABY :: A dedication ceremony is held on Hosnian Prime in honor of Bail Organa; a seventy-meter-high Jelucani fogstone statue of him, designed by Janyor of Bith , is revealed. Senator Tai-Lin Garr and Leia Organa address a vast crowd of a thousand different species, reminding them of the sacrifices the galaxy made to restore the Republic.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 28 ABY :: A period of political turmoil is lived in the New Republic Senate caused by the Amaxine warriors , a paramilitary faction secretly supported by the First Order , which had began chanelling funds via the Rinnrivin Di's cartel through to the Amaxine warriors in order to restore the legacy of the former Empire.

Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 28 ABY > A period of political turmoil is lived in the New Republic Senate caused by the Amaxine warriors , a paramilitary faction secretly supported by the First Order , which had began chanelling funds via the Rinnrivin Di's cartel through to the Amaxine warriors in order to restore the legacy of the former Empire. :: Over a seven year period, Rinnrivin Di had created a criminal empire based on smuggling and gambling. Eventually, Rinnrivin's activities exacted a economic toll on the Gaulus sector, which included Ryloth . In response, the Ryloth government dispatched Emissary Yendor Brethen to petition the New Republic Senate on Hosnian Prime for help. The Populist Senator Leia Organa and her Centrist colleague Ransolm Casterfo agree to investigate on behalf of the Senate. They travel to the planet Bastatha , hosted by Magistrates Xun and Tosta , who take them on a tour of their casino , and there Leia is kidnapped by Rinnrivin's henchmen who bring her to Rinnrivin's underground headquarters . He tries to bribe the senator into easing restrictions on the spice trade. However, Casterfo manages to track down Leia and rescue her. The two escape and alert the Bastatha security forces . After searching Rinnrivin's headquarters, they discover evidence that Rinnrivin was funneling his profits into shadow corporations in the Outer Rim.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 28 ABY > A period of political turmoil is lived in the New Republic Senate caused by the Amaxine warriors , a paramilitary faction secretly supported by the First Order , which had began chanelling funds via the Rinnrivin Di's cartel through to the Amaxine warriors in order to restore the legacy of the former Empire. :: The Amaxine warriors bomb a conference building of the New Republic Senate on Hosnian Prime, acting on the orders of Lady Carise Sindian , a senator who wants to create a distraction while the First Order prepares to emerge from hiding in the Unknown Regions. As the bombing is only intended to be a distraction and not an all-out act of war, a warning is left on a paper streamer hidden by a napkin inside the conference building, which allows Leia Organa to have the premises evacuated. Although the bombing manages to spawn confusion in the Senate, further pitting the Centrist and Populist against each other, Sindian chastises the Amaxines, criticizing them for not having created a more discreet distraction.

Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 28 ABY > A period of political turmoil is lived in the New Republic Senate caused by the Amaxine warriors , a paramilitary faction secretly supported by the First Order , which had began chanelling funds via the Rinnrivin Di's cartel through to the Amaxine warriors in order to restore the legacy of the former Empire. :: Leia Organa and her senatorial staff travel to the planet Sibensko , and posing as smugglers, they manage to infiltrate the underwater Sibensko city. While Greer Sonnel and Joph Seastriker load thermal detonators, Leia manages to download banking records linking the Amaxine warriors to Rinnrivin Di's cartel. Leia is cornered by Rinnrivin Di but manages to kill him and his henchmen by collapsing a hydraulic tunnel on them. She flees up a landing platform where is rescued by Han Solo. They shoot a Amaxine starfighter that crashes into the ammunition depot, destroying the underwater city and the Amaxine base, effectively eliminating Rinnrivin Di's cartel and the Amaxine warriors as reliable First Order proxy agents.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 28 ABY > A period of political turmoil is lived in the New Republic Senate caused by the Amaxine warriors , a paramilitary faction secretly supported by the First Order , which had began chanelling funds via the Rinnrivin Di's cartel through to the Amaxine warriors in order to restore the legacy of the former Empire. :: On Hosnian Prime, New Republic Senator Tai-Lin Garr is assassinated by Arliz Hadrassian , leader of the Amaxine warriors. Garr was a prominent member of the Populist faction in the New Republic Senate who had been nominated as the new Populist candidate for First Senator . After shooting Garr, Hadrassian turns the gun on herself.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 28 ABY :: Following the assassination, the Populists hold a memory service to honor their fallen comrade. Later Lady Carise Sindian fabricates evidence framing Ransolm Casterfo as an accomplice of Hadrassian, and he is arrested.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 28 ABY :: Senator Leia Organa resigns from the Galactic Senate following revelations of her parentage. Organa then begins forming the Resistance paramilitary group.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 28 ABY :: Carise Sindian is expelled from Elder Houses .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 28 ABY :: Brendol Hux contacts Snoke through the latter's sentry droid .

Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 28 ABY :: Luke Skywalker's Jedi Temple is destroyed and the new generation of Jedi are killed by Ben Solo, who is surrounded by darkness. Solo flees the site, but he is pursued by students Hennix , Tai , and Voe . Fueled by the words of Snoke and Darth Sidious at the Drengir's Amaxine station and the Sith Citadel on Exegol, respectively, Solo is torn apart by expectations as the heir to galactic heroes and thinks that he had no choice. Assuming the name Kylo Ren, he turns to the dark side of the Force and takes the place of Ren as master of the Knights of Ren, in the process killing Hennix in a Battle of Elphrona and Voe in a skirmish on the Minemoon of Mimban. Kylo Ren later becomes a First Order warlord.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 28 ABY :: Luke Skywalker goes into exile over Kylo Ren's fall to the dark side; he ultimately retreats to the ancient world of Ahch-To by a route inscribed upon a holographic map with his personal X-wing .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 28 ABY :: Han Solo and Leia Organa drift apart following their son's fall.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Peace (5–28 ABY) > 28 ABY :: Allegiant General Enric Pryde is issued the Steadfast Resurgent -class Star Destroyer by Supreme Leader Snoke.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) :: 29 ABY
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 29 ABY :: World secede from the New Republic, publicly forming the political formation of the First Order. The Cold War begins.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 29 ABY :: The Resistance is staffed to operational levels.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 29 ABY :: Leia Organa begins to search for Luke Skywalker.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 29 ABY :: R2-D2 goes into low-power mode.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 29 ABY :: BB-8 is built on Hosnian Prime .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) :: 30 ABY
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 30 ABY :: BB-8 is assigned to Poe Dameron.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 30 ABY :: Brendol Hux is killed under suspicious circumstances, and his son, Armitage, takes over as head of the First Order infantry.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) :: 31 ABY

Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 31 ABY :: Two pirate crews, led by Sidon Ithano and Scorza respectively, compete in a treasure hunt for the lost Treasure of Count Dooku on board the crashed Separatist warship Obrexta III on the planet Ponemah Terminal . Scorza is killed by reactivated B2 super battle droids, and the treasure turns out to be the clone trooper Kix , who had been captured and put in Cryo-cycle stasis by the Confederacy of Independent Systems after he had discovered Order 66 before it happened. Kix joins Sidon Ithano's crew.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 31 ABY :: Poe Dameron and BB-8 leaves the New Republic for the Resistance.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 31 ABY :: Gannis Ducain steals Millennium Falcon from Han Solo .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) :: 32 ABY
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 32 ABY :: Poe Dameron forms Black Squadron and begins searching for Lor San Tekka; the Hunt for Lor San Tekka commences.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) :: 33 ABY
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 33 ABY :: Senator Lanever Villecham is elected Chancellor of the New Republic.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 33 ABY :: Rapier Squadron of the New Republic responds to a distress signal from the Yissira Zyde , a freighter being hijacked by the First Order, and engages their forces above Suraz 4 . However, the First Order successfully hijacks the Yissira Zyde.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 33 ABY :: Poe Dameron goes on an unsanctioned mission to find the captured Yissira Zyde . This brings him into contact with the Resistance leader General Leia Organa, who arranges for Dameron and Rapier Squadron to join the Resistance.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 33 ABY :: A Resistance team led by Captain Hoff , and including C-3PO, travels to the planet Taul aboard the Sphyrna -class Hammerhead corvette Sterdic Star . They obtain the location of Admiral Ackbar and transmit it to the Resistance.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 33 ABY :: Commander Poe Dameron along with the droids C-3PO and BB-8 rescue Admiral Gial Ackbar from the First Order Resurgent -class Star Destroyer Subjugator , where was being held hostage.

Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 33 ABY :: The New Republic obtains intelligence of the First Order, and Resistance sympathizers within the New Republic send pilot Kazuda Xiono and his squadron to rendezvous with Poe Dameron and deliver the data to the Resistance. They are ambushed by a First Order squadron led by Major Elrik Vonreg , and after defeating them with the help of Poe Dameron, Kazuda Xiono joins the Resistance.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 33 ABY :: Suspecting that the New Republic Senator Erudo Ro-Kiintor , with help from the Corporate Sector Authority , was secretly colluding with the First Order, Leia Organa dispatches Poe Dameron and his comrades Iolo Arana and Karé Kun on a mission to steal Ro-Kiintor's private yacht Hevurion Grace so that the Resistance can examine his ship's computers for incriminating information. Poe and his comrades manage to steal the Hevurion Grace and narrowly escape First Order forces. Senator Ro-Kiintor is captured and the Corporate Sector Authority dealings are exposed.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 33 ABY :: Poe Dameron and Black Squadron of the Resistance travel to the planet Ovanis to find Lor San Tekka to ask for his help in locating Luke Skywalker. During the course of the mission , Black Squadron comes into conflict with the First Order Agent Terex , who is after the same information. Following a dogfight and a skirmish against a large winged creature , Black Squadron manages to defeat Terex's forces with the help of the Crèche , a sect who worshiped a large egg known as the Crèche egg .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 33 ABY :: Poe Dameron and Black Squadron Black Squadron, in their search for Lor San Tekka, needed to question the Hutt crime lord Grakkus imprisoned in Megalox Beta Penitentiary , who had encountered Lor San Tekka previously. So they infiltrate the prision, but are confronted by Agent Terex . When Grakkus offers to reveal the information to whoever free him first, Poe gets BB-8 and the other astromech droids to disable the prison's gravity field, exposing Terex and the prisoners to the planet's high gravity. After rescuing Grakkus, the Resistance obtains more information about Lor San Tekka's whereabouts, but suspend the search to deal with a spy leaking information to the First Order.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) :: 34 ABY
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 34 ABY :: The junk boss Unkar Plutt is kidnapped by the Zendiat Collective in order to recover a J9 worker drone that was sold to him. The scavenger Rey tricks them, and is able to recover the junk boss and take him back to Niima Outpost , where Krynodd had taken over. For her efforts, Rey is awarded 30 portions .

Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 34 ABY :: The skirmish on Pheryon occurs.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 34 ABY :: Poe Dameron, C-3PO, BB-8 and the technician Oddy Muva travel to the planet Kaddak to obtain information that could lead to the First Order's Supreme Leader Snoke . They manage to rescue the BX-series droid commando N1-ZX from the Ranc Gang . The group is then pursued by Agent Terex , who had retaken control of the Ranc Gang. In an attempt to prevent Terex and the Ranc Gang from finding the Resistance base on D'Qar, Dameron and the droids flee to a desert planet .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 34 ABY :: Poe Dameron is followed by Terex and his Ranc Gang to the desert world. After Poe crash-landed his X-wing on the planet, a skirmish breaks out in the Fjor system between the Ranc Gang and the Resistance's Black Squadron. Terex's Ranc Gang is subsequently wiped out by First Order forces under Commander Malarus , who apprehend Terex for insubordination. During the battle, L'ulo L'ampar sacrifices himself to protect innocent lives.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 34 ABY :: The Resistance holds a funeral for L'ulo L'ampar at their base on D'Qar, conducted by Poe Dameron.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 34 ABY :: A mission to obtain fuel occurs.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 34 ABY :: Resistance members Karé Kun and Jessika Pava along with the journalist Suralinda Javos , travel to the planet Spalex where the First Order was attempting to mine the planet's thorilide , to get footage of First Order troops to use against the First Order and support the Resistance in the New Republic Senate. They are captured by First Order forces under Commander Malarus and Agent Terex. Oddy Muva lets them out of their cell and then sacrifices himself in a TIE fighter, destroying the light cruiser Enshado .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 34 ABY :: Leia Organa and Poe Dameron, along with Black Squadron and Suralinda Javos, travel to the planet Cato Neimoidia to rescue Lor San Tekka from a prison after he was arrested. However, he is taken prisoner by the First Order. Terex travels to the Absolution to meet with Captain Phasma.

Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 34 ABY :: Kylo Ren travels to the planet Pillio to learn where Lor San Tekka had taken the map to Luke Skywalker, and learns Tekka took the map to the planet Bayora . After Ren leaves Pillio, former Inferno Squad member Del Meeko is confronted by Gideon Hask , now a First Order officer, who mocks his former comrade before executing him at point-blank range. He orders Gleb and the Jinata Security to bury the bodies of Meeko and his crew, but to leave the Corvus alone in a bid to draw out Iden Versio .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 34 ABY :: Black Squadron rescues Lor San Tekka from the Great Forveen Nebula after he is dropped into the nebula by Terex, evading First Order jet troopers and TIE Fighters in the process.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 34 ABY :: The Resistance conducts a series of missions , after learning that the First Order is trying to take control of the Cassander sector by supplying weapons to the pirates in the sector.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 34 ABY > The Resistance conducts a series of missions , after learning that the First Order is trying to take control of the Cassander sector by supplying weapons to the pirates in the sector. :: The Resistance first target in the sector is to destroy a pirate controlled spaceport in the world of Mamkoda .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 34 ABY > The Resistance conducts a series of missions , after learning that the First Order is trying to take control of the Cassander sector by supplying weapons to the pirates in the sector. :: The Resistance conducts a relief mission to the planet Caraxl . The mission ultimately is aborted after Resistance pilot Tallissan Lintra spots First Order TIE fighters approaching, the Resistance trying to avoid problems with the New Republic Senate orders their pilots to avoid contact with First Order starships.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 34 ABY > The Resistance conducts a series of missions , after learning that the First Order is trying to take control of the Cassander sector by supplying weapons to the pirates in the sector. :: The bombers of Cobalt Squadron , supported by the A-Wings of Tallie Torchers , destroy the pirate base on Sheh Soahi . With the defeat of the pirates, the First Order plans in the Cassander sector are foiled.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 34 ABY :: Sent by Commander Dameron, Kazuda Xiono and CB-23 embark on a mission to spy on First Order activity at the Colossus refueling platform on Castilon , racing with local ace Torra Doza.

Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 34 ABY > Sent by Commander Dameron, Kazuda Xiono and CB-23 embark on a mission to spy on First Order activity at the Colossus refueling platform on Castilon , racing with local ace Torra Doza. :: The pirate Kragan Gorr and his gang use a low-visibility storm, codenamed " triple dark ", to launch an attack on the Colossus on behalf of their employers, the First Order. The Ace Squadron , the platform's defenders, are outnumbered by the pirates. Kazuda Xiono broadcast a grating feedback loop over the pirates' communications channel, preventing them from coordinating their attack, and allowing Ace Squadron to repell the pirate gang.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 34 ABY > Sent by Commander Dameron, Kazuda Xiono and CB-23 embark on a mission to spy on First Order activity at the Colossus refueling platform on Castilon , racing with local ace Torra Doza. :: Baron Elrik Vonreg attempts to coerce the station's Captain Imanuel Doza to accept First Order protection from Kragan Gorr.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 34 ABY > Sent by Commander Dameron, Kazuda Xiono and CB-23 embark on a mission to spy on First Order activity at the Colossus refueling platform on Castilon , racing with local ace Torra Doza. :: The First Order hunts two children, siblings Eila and Kel , who are the sole survivors of the massacre of their village on their homeworld Tehar , with the intent to kill them so they can not reveal the atrocity to anyone else. As part of their search, they placed a large bounty on the children. Kazuda Xiono heards of the bounty, and with assistance from Neeku Vozo and the Colossus Chelidae engineering staff, is able to save the children by faking their deaths in front of the First Order's Commander Pyre , who reports their deaths believing his mission was complete.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 34 ABY > Sent by Commander Dameron, Kazuda Xiono and CB-23 embark on a mission to spy on First Order activity at the Colossus refueling platform on Castilon , racing with local ace Torra Doza. :: Poe Dameron and Kazuda Xiono investigate a derelict Darius G -class freighter broadcasting a distress signal, that had been attacked by members of Kragan Gorr's pirate gang, led by Synara San . The freighter was carrying a cargo of Kowakian monkey-lizards , and a giant Kowakian ape-lizard killed and ate most of the pirates, but San was able to survive by locking herself in a crate. She is discovered by Dameron and Xiono, who assume her to be a crewmember of the freighter, and rescure her, fighting off pirate ships coming in response to the distress signal's shuttle. When San wakes up Castilon, she claims to be a victim of the attack, and after contacting Gorr he orders her to blend in until he contacts her with an assignment.

Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 34 ABY > Sent by Commander Dameron, Kazuda Xiono and CB-23 embark on a mission to spy on First Order activity at the Colossus refueling platform on Castilon , racing with local ace Torra Doza. :: The Warbird gang launches a raid on the platform, after Synara San informs Gorr that the Ace Squadron is off-platform and the targeting computer for the platform's defense turbolasers is down. The pirates are forced to retreat when Jarek Yeager and Kazuda Xiono fix the computer, allowing Captain Imanuel Doza to activate the defenses and repel the pirates. However, the damage from the attack forces Doza to reconsider the First Order's offer of protection for the platform, contacting Commander Pyre to ask about the details of the offer.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 34 ABY > Sent by Commander Dameron, Kazuda Xiono and CB-23 embark on a mission to spy on First Order activity at the Colossus refueling platform on Castilon , racing with local ace Torra Doza. :: The Platform Classic , a major sky race, is held on the Colossus by Captain Imanuel Doza, who invites famous racer Marcus Speedstar to participate. Speedstar wins the race, defeating the pilots of Ace Squadron and Team Fireball .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 34 ABY > Sent by Commander Dameron, Kazuda Xiono and CB-23 embark on a mission to spy on First Order activity at the Colossus refueling platform on Castilon , racing with local ace Torra Doza. :: Kazuda Xiono infiltrates Doza Tower trying and find out how Captain Imanuel Doza might be colluding with the First Order, assisted by Doza's daughter Torra , who had snuck out of the tower after her father had attempted to lock her in her room while he had a meeting with Commander Pyre. Xiono manages to obtain information about Doza's meeting with Pyre from Doza's office , discovering that the Captain was a former Imperial officer.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 34 ABY > Sent by Commander Dameron, Kazuda Xiono and CB-23 embark on a mission to spy on First Order activity at the Colossus refueling platform on Castilon , racing with local ace Torra Doza. :: Kazuda Xiono and Poe Dameron travel to the Unknown Regions to investigate Station Theta Black , a space station utilized by the First Order to mine and process dedlanite to make blasters. They destroy the station, defeating Elrik Vonreg's squadron in the process.

Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 34 ABY > Sent by Commander Dameron, Kazuda Xiono and CB-23 embark on a mission to spy on First Order activity at the Colossus refueling platform on Castilon , racing with local ace Torra Doza. :: The All Aces Battle Royale , a sky race hosted every ten cycles for ace pilots on Castilon, takes place on the Colossus , and many pilots, including Pamarthens , racers from Hosnian Prime, and the First Order operative Marnia Un'la'na are among the aces who travel to Castilon to participate. Under the pseudonym "Bolt-Shatterer-K," Kazuda Xiono flies in the race using a borrowed backup racer attempting to remain close to Un'la'na's ship to intercept a transmission she is sending to the First Order. After successfully capturing her data transfer using an encryption recorder , Xiono is knocked out of the race and crash-lands. He later takes the transmission captured and delivers it to the Resistance.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 34 ABY > Sent by Commander Dameron, Kazuda Xiono and CB-23 embark on a mission to spy on First Order activity at the Colossus refueling platform on Castilon , racing with local ace Torra Doza. :: Bibo , a juvenile rokkna , is accidentally brought on board the Colossus inside of a wrecked Z-95 Headhunter salvaged by Synara San. Neeku Vozo decides to adopt him, unaware that Bibo's mother , a full-grown, enormous, adult of the species with the capability to destroy the platform, is heading to the Colossus intent on recovering her child. Eila and Kel, being force-sensitive, had dreamed of the attack, and warn Vozo and Tamara Ryvora the only way to save the platform is to give Bibo to the attacker. After retrieving her child, the mother peacefully leaves.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 34 ABY > Sent by Commander Dameron, Kazuda Xiono and CB-23 embark on a mission to spy on First Order activity at the Colossus refueling platform on Castilon , racing with local ace Torra Doza. :: First Order operative Teroj Kee tries to steal a phase connector from Flix and Orka 's shop, the Office of Acquisitions , on the Colossus . After luring the temporary shop keeper Kazuda Xiono into a cargo container, Kee steals the phase connector and attempts to escape aboard his Darius G -class freighter . However, Xiono manages to sabotage the ship's engine, causing it to crash into the sea.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 34 ABY > Sent by Commander Dameron, Kazuda Xiono and CB-23 embark on a mission to spy on First Order activity at the Colossus refueling platform on Castilon , racing with local ace Torra Doza. :: Gorr's Warbird gang abducts Torra Doza, Captain Doza's daughter, forcing him to accept the First Order occupation of the Colossus .

Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 34 ABY :: Occupation of the Colossus .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 34 ABY > Occupation of the Colossus . :: After the First Order occupies the Colossus , Kazuda Xiono helps Synara San, a spy for the Warbird gang, escape from the station, before she can be captured, in the last of the platform's escape pods. San returns to the Warbirds while Xiono avoids being captured for his role in the escape.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 34 ABY > Occupation of the Colossus . :: Following an incident in which Kel and Eila knock out a First Order stormtrooper, Kazuda Xiono disguises as the stormtrooper and infltrates the First Order headquarters on the platform, in order to find out if he reported the incident to the First Order. There Xiono steals a data rod and finds out a full garrison of First Order troops is coming to the Colossus.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 34 ABY > Occupation of the Colossus . :: Poe Dameron and Kazuda Xiono travel to the Dassal system , where Xiono had identified possible First Order activities. They discover that the Dassal system's sun is missing, and all of its planets had been cored out. On a formerly inhabited moon of the only perfectly-cored planet , Dameron and Xiono discover an abandoned village , which had been the site of a massacre. They are spotted by a probe droid , and its destruction drew in Major Elrik Vonreg and his squadron of TIE fighters. Dameron and Xiono escape their pursuers by luring them into the gravity well in the center of the cored-out planet, destroying Vonreg's squadron. Xiono returns to the Colossus and Dameron departs on a mission to Jakku .
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 34 ABY > Occupation of the Colossus . :: Kazuda Xiono and Torra Doza rescue several inhabitants of the Colossus that had been captured by the First Order. Hype Fazon and Aunt Z escape the platform on a stolen transport and head to Takodana , while Grevel and Nod escape custody.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 34 ABY > Occupation of the Colossus . :: Kazuda Xiono deactivates the First Order communication jammer on top of Doza Tower so he and his allies can contact the Resistance and ask for help fighting the First Order occupation of the Colossus . Kazuda's transmission reaches General Organa, who informs them the Resistance is unable to send reinforcements, so in turn he rallies the inhabitants of the Colossus into forming the Colossus resistance .

Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 34 ABY :: Tuanul , a spiritual village on the planet Jakku , is sacked by First Order forces led by Kylo Ren, who had been seeking the map to the location of Luke Skywalker. As four First Order squadrons descend on Tuanul with a force of eighty stormtroopers, Poe Dameron receives the map from Lor San Tekka. Dameron attempts to flee prior to the assault but his T-70 X-wing starfighter is disabled by the attacking stormtroopers, despite BB-8's warning just before the assault began. Dameron has BB-8 escape the village with the map. Subsequently, Tekka is killed by Kylo Ren, Dameron captured, and the villagers killed.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 34 ABY :: Poe Dameron is locked up on the Resurgent -class Star Destroyer Finalizer by Kylo Ren. There, he is tortured and interrogated by the latter for information about what he did with the map to Luke Skywalker, but he reveals no information.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 34 ABY :: Stormtrooper FN-2187 , who had decided to desert the First Order, helps Poe Dameron escape . They steal a TIE fighter, and evade stormtroopers in the Destroyer's hangar and its turbolasers to escape to Jakku. While piloting the TIE, FN-2187 is rechristened as Finn by Dameron. Their ship is shot down by missiles, and the blast knocks Dameron unconscious, while Finn ejects from the TIE shortly before it crashes on the planet's surface. Dameron recovers consciousness just in time to set the craft down more or less intact, and finds himself alone and sets off to find a ship and contact the Resistance.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 34 ABY :: The scavenger Rey, the former First Order stormtrooper Finn, and the Resistance astromech droid BB-8 escape from Jakku aboard the retrieved Millennium Falcon , previously stolen by Unkar Plutt, to evade the First Order.
Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 34 ABY :: Aboard their freighter, the Eravana , Han Solo and Chewbacca manage to recover the Millennium Falcon , in which Finn and Rey had escaped from Jakku. Parties of the Guavian Death Gang and Kanjiklub board the freighter to collect debts owed to them by Solo. While Han tries to talk the boarding parties down, Rey accidentally release a trio of rathtars from the cargo hold. The rathtars storm through the freighter, killing several gangsters and giving Han, Chewbacca, and the fugitives a chance to escape on board the Falcon . Launching away from the freighter at lightspeed, they manage to escape the freighter and kill a rathtar that had attached itself over the cockpit.

Timeline of galactic history > New Republic Era (5–34 ABY) > Cold War (29–34 ABY) > 34 ABY :: Shortly after the death of Del Meeko, Shriv Suurgav finds the Corvus abandoned on Pillio with the crew and Del gone, and contacts Iden Versio, who makes her way to the Corvus with her daughter Zay. The three begin their search for Del, which leads them to the planet Athulla , where they find by a Jinata Security fleet commanded by Leema Kai kidnapping Athullans. Iden and Zay manage to disable the fleet and eliminate Kai , with the J-Sec fleet surrendering and telling them about Project Resurrection .
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) :: 34 ABY (continued)
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) :: In the Hosnian Cataclysm , the Hosnian system is destroyed by the First Order, marking the annihilation of Courtsilius , Raysho , Hosnian , Cardota , and Hosnian Prime , the capital of the New Republic, by Starkiller Base , a superweapon on Ilum inside the Unknown Regions that is capable of destroying entire star systems. The massive sub-hyperspace ripple created by the destruction of the system makes the event visible in real time around the galaxy, including the planets of Takodana and Vardos. With the destruction of Hosnian Prime comes the destruction of the Galactic Senate and the Home Fleet of the New Republic Defense Fleet as the conflict between the First Order and the Resistance escalates into full open warfare . With the New Republic political structure decimated and its most important fleet in ruins, the First Order and its armed forces establishes itself as the primary power in the galaxy as both the Resistance and the weakened New Republic are left vulnerable.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) :: The Cosmic Force is reawakened as individuals, such as Rey and Finn experience an awakening in their connection to the Force.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) :: Iden Versio, Zay Versio and Shriv Suurgav travel to the world of Vardos in search of Iden Versio's former mentor Protectorate Gleb . However, in Kestro City they discover Gleb's body shot by Gideon Hask, who tells them he had personally executed Del Meeko before taking them into custody. Hask orders the Resurgent -class Star Destroyer Retribution to shoot down the Corvus and the First Order troopers to burn the city. A battle erupts between Inferno Squad, Jinata Security forces, and the First Order. Shriv and the Versios escape the battle into the Retribution in TIE/sf space superiority fighters .

Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) :: The Colossus resistance led by Kazuda Xiono, Jarek Yeager , and Captain Doza expel First Order forces from the Colossus and take the station into hyperspace. Tamara Ryvora, a mechanic who had been working for Yeager, joins the First Order.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) :: Finn, Han Solo, Chewbacca, and Rey, seeking to return the map to the Resistance, stop at the castle of Maz Kanata on Takodana . There both a Resistance spy and a First Order informant identify BB-8 and inform their respective allies, drawing both forces to Takodana to recover BB-8 and the map.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) :: Maz Kanata's castle is attacked by Kylo Ren. Flying in with TIE/fo space superiority fighters and Atmospheric Assault Landers , the First Order sieges the castle and levels it, and Ren corners and captures Rey. During the fighting at the castle, Finn, Han Solo and Chewbacca are forced to surrender until Resistance X-wings led by Poe Dameron arrive, and a dogfight ensued resulting in the destruction of many First Order TIEs and the deaths of many stormtroopers from X-wing strafing runs. Kylo Ren orders the First Order divison to pull out, saying they had what they came for, and BB-8 ends up in the hands of the Resistance.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) :: The Battle of Starkiller Base , the first major battle in the First Order-Resistance War , is fought. Resistance T-70 X-wing starfighters of Blue Squadron and Red Squadron , led by Poe Dameron attack Starkiller Base with the goal of disable and destroy the superweapon in order to prevent the First Order, which is charging its main weapon, from destroying the Resistance base on D'Qar. Starkiller Base is destroyed, and the First Order sustains mayor casualties and is significantly weakened, despite both Kylo Ren and General Armitage Hux surviving the battle. Rey escapes custody with the help of Han Solo and Finn, and discovers she is Force-sensitive. Kylo Ren murders his father, Han Solo, and is defeated by Rey in a duel.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) :: After learning the fate of Del Meeko on Vardos, Iden Versio leads Zay Versio and Shriv Suurgav aboard Gideon Hask 's Resurgent -class Star Destroyer , the Retribution , to retrieve intelligence on the First Order and eliminate Hask for Meeko's death . The skirmish that follows results in the deaths of Versio and Hask, as well as the successful retrieval of First Order intelligence and specifications on the Mandator IV -class Siege Dreadnought .

Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) :: Captain Phasma , the First Order TIE fighter pilot TN-3465 , and the BB unit BB-K8 to hunt down Lieutenant Sol Rivas for his alleged "treason" against the First Order. In truth, Phasma initiates the operation since he was the only one who knew that Phasma had betrayed the First Order to save herself by lowering the shields of Starkiller Base. Following the Battle of Starkiller Base , Sol Rivas flees to the uncharted planet of Luprora where he was captured by the R'ora , a species indigenous to the planet. Captain Phasma, TN-3465 and BB-K8 followe Rivas on a TIE/sf space superiority fighter . Over the next four days, Phasma enlists the help of the humanoid Lupr'or in attacking the R'ora stronghold . Using generators salvaged from an abandoned Lupr'or starship, Phasma and her Lupr'or army manage to electrocute the Tsw'ells in the lake guarding the R'ora stronghold. While the Lupr'or fight the R'ora, Phasma executes Rivas. Before departing Luprora, Phasma destroys BB-K8 and kills TN-3465 in order to eliminate anyone who knew of her true role in Starkiller Base's destruction. Phasma then fabricates a report claiming that she had eliminated Rivas for his alleged treachery and that her comrades had perished in the process.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) :: With the exposure of their base on D'Qar, the Resistance begins evacuating , and in the early hours of the evacuation, Leia Organa holds a funeral for her fallen husband Han Solo. The escape was interrupted by the arrival of a First Order fleet consisting of three Resurgent -class Star Destroyers and one Mandator IV -class Siege Dreadnought, the Fulminatrix . To buy time for the Resistance transports to escape, Poe Dameron attacks the dreadnought, eliminating its surface cannons and clearing the way for a squadron of Resistance bombers to attack. The resultant assault obliterates the Fulminatrix , but all bombers are lost along with four of their escorting starfighters. However, Dameron's attack buys enough time for the Resistance fleet to jump to hyperspace.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) :: General Leia Organa sends Inferno Squad , Black Squadron and Resistance operative Vi Moradi on separate missions to the Outer Rim Territories to find allies of the Resistance and gather any surviving New Republic commanders.

Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) > General Leia Organa sends Inferno Squad , Black Squadron and Resistance operative Vi Moradi on separate missions to the Outer Rim Territories to find allies of the Resistance and gather any surviving New Republic commanders. :: Members of Black Squadron are unintentionally involved in a local battle on the world Pastoria . Visiting the planet in the hopes of persuading King Siroc into supporting the Resistance, the Squadron, led by Temmin Wexley , is instead tricked into assisting with the death of the king's primary rival . Black Squadron fails to persuade King Siroc to ally with the Resistance against the First Order.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) > General Leia Organa sends Inferno Squad , Black Squadron and Resistance operative Vi Moradi on separate missions to the Outer Rim Territories to find allies of the Resistance and gather any surviving New Republic commanders. :: Vi Moradi travels to Batuu with the objective of forming a Resistance cell and establishing a base on the planet.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) > General Leia Organa sends Inferno Squad , Black Squadron and Resistance operative Vi Moradi on separate missions to the Outer Rim Territories to find allies of the Resistance and gather any surviving New Republic commanders. :: Shriv Suurgav and Zay Versio recruit Carlist Rieekan and some of Iden Versio's old Imperial friends who did not join the First Order into the Resistance.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) :: With the First Order in need of refueling stations to supply their of conquest the galaxy, Commander Pyre and Agent Tierny aboard the Star Destroyer Thunderer hunt for the Colossus , which roams the galaxy for a safe haven. In order to supply the Colossus , its crew steal coaxium from the wreckage over D'Qar.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) :: Rey and Chewbacca find Luke Skywalker on Ahch-To, a planet in the Unknown Regions. Skywalker briefly trains her before she departs to try to redeem Kylo Ren.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) :: The First Order fleet, having deployed their recently developed means of tracking a ship through hyperspace, ambushes the fleeing Resistance fleet upon entering the Oetchi system . Comprising thirty Resurgent -class vessels and the Supreme Leader's flagship, the Mega -class Star Dreadnought Supremacy , the First Order fleet destroys the Vakbeor -class cargo frigate Vigil before it can activate its deflector shields.

Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) :: Before the Resistance pilots can scramble their fighters, the Raddus hangar is destroyed by a torpedo fired from Kylo Ren's TIE/vn space superiority fighter . Several pilots die in the attack, including Tallissan Lintra , and Dameron narrowly survives. Ren has an opportunity to destroy the bridge of the command ship but is unable to open fire on his mother. However, a member of Kylo Ren's personal squadron , Lieutenant Poldin LeHuse hits the bridge. The attack obliterates the Resistance High Command , killing Admiral Gial Ackbar and other Resistance officers with the exception of Organa, who calls upon the Force to survive the vacuum of space and return to the Raddus .
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) :: Vice Admiral Amilyn Holdo takes charge of the Resistance after the incapacitated Leia Organa. Shut out from the Vice Admiral's plans, Poe Dameron devises his own plan to save the fleet with the help of Resistance technician Rose Tico and Finn. Using the information Finn acquired from his past service aboard the Supremacy , the trio intends to disable the hyperspace tracker so the Resistance can jump to lightspeed without being tracked. Needing a Master Codebreaker , Maz Kanata points them to the casino city of Canto Bight on Cantonica .
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) :: Finn, Tico, and BB-8 arrive to the Canto Casino , where they then find the Master Codebreaker, but before they can approach him are arrested by the Canto Bight Police Department for landing in an illegal area. In prison they meet a man named DJ , a codebreaker, who manages to unlock the prison cells. Finn and Tico escape through the sewers into the fathier stables. They release the fathiers and ride them out, trampling over the police and escaping in the Yacht Libertine , piloted by DJ and BB-8 after they steal it.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) :: Rey is captured by the First Order whilst trying to redeem Kylo Ren, and brought before Supreme Leader Snoke aboard his flagship, the Supremacy . A wavering Ren betrays and murders Snoke, then attempts to forge a new order for the galaxy with himself and Rey as its new leaders. However, she declines and escapes after a fight in the throne room .
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) > Rey is captured by the First Order whilst trying to redeem Kylo Ren, and brought before Supreme Leader Snoke aboard his flagship, the Supremacy . A wavering Ren betrays and murders Snoke, then attempts to forge a new order for the galaxy with himself and Rey as its new leaders. However, she declines and escapes after a fight in the throne room . :: Rey's lightsaber is destroyed during the fight.

Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) :: The Resistance fleet is effectively wiped out in the Crait system while fleeing the First Order fleet, but are able to score a victory of their own as Vice Admiral Amilyn Holdo launches a suicide attack which heavily damages the Supremacy and destroys many Star Destroyers.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) :: Battle of Crait . Resistance forces that escaped to the surface of Crait are pursued by remaining First Order forces in the system. The two factions engage briefly, before the remaining Resistance members escape aboard the Millennium Falcon .
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) :: Luke Skywalker dies with peace and purpose on Ahch-To, becoming one with the Force in a sacrifice that inspires hope for the rebel fighters, who have Rey amongst them to ensure that the spark of rebellion would not die, and that Skywalker with his legendary bloodline would not be the last Jedi.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) :: Hunt for the Colossus
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) > Hunt for the Colossus :: Following the flight of the Colossus from the planet Castilon, the platform begins to run low on food and other basic supplies, and Aunt Z suggest to capture a giant jakoosk from the moon of Celsor 3 for meat, enough for the Colossus ' population. Captain Kragan Gorr , along Kazuda Xiono and Torra Doza travel to the moon to hunt the jakoosk, but the creature destroys several pirate airspeeders and they are forced to retreat. A second expedition with Kazuda Xiono, Torra Doza and Tamara Ryvora manages to shoot the creature in its unprotected underside, killing it.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) > Hunt for the Colossus :: The First Order sends the Nikto engineer Nenavakasa Nalor to sabotage the Colossus . Posing as a stranded spacer, Nena manages to gain the trust of the Colossus crew and attempts to draw a wedge between the station inhabitants and the Warbird gang. Synara San and Kazuda Xiono discover Nena as a First Order spy, and although she escapes, Kaz and Neeku manage to undo her sabotage and escape the First Order forces.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) > Hunt for the Colossus :: After Nalor's sabotage, the platform is short on fuel, so members of Team Colossus travel to Flix 's homeworld of Drahgor III to obtain fuel from members of Flix's family . They descend into their fuel refinery and face three 3 Karnex Dragons to retrieve the fuel.

Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) > Hunt for the Colossus :: Team Colossus attempts to resupply from Ashas Ree , but barely escape First Order Raiders in search of the world's Sith relic with the help of archaeologist Mika Grey .
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) > Hunt for the Colossus :: On Torra Doza's birthday, the Colossus attempts to meet Torra's mother, Venisa, who was serving the Resistance, but the station is chased away by the First Order, and Venisa Doza is captured aboard the Thunderer . She escapes after encountering cadets Tamara Ryvora—whom she advises about the failings of the First Order—and Jace Rucklin . Ace Squadron celebrates Torra's birthday.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) > Hunt for the Colossus :: With the Colossus in need for credits, Ace Squadron takes part in the Voxx Vortex 5000 , a sky race held in the Voxx Cluster , against the racing droids owned by the Hutt casino owner Vranki the Blue. Kazuda Xiono and Torra Doza win their relay race, gaining 500,000 credits for the Colossus .
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) > Hunt for the Colossus :: The Colossus station fights against forces of the Guavian Death Gang in an asteroid field at the edge of Guavian-controlled space . The space station had passed through the asteroid field in an attempt to exit Guavian space unnoticed by the criminal organization, but after being spotted by a scout, the station is detained by Guavian forces, who demand they pay a toll of 1 million credits or have the station seized and its population turned over to the First Order. Imanuel Doza refuses the Guavian leader's demands, and Ace Squadron engage and is able to destroy most of the Guavian starships as the Colossus reaches open space, allowing the station to escape.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) > Hunt for the Colossus :: Xiono and his best friend and engineer, Neeku Vozo , and CB-23 infiltrate the Titan to secure a trans-binary deflector necessary to prevent cosmic radiation from killing all those aboard the Colossus , disrupting a meeting between General Hux, Commander Pyre, and other officers. Unbeknownst to Xiono, Tamara Ryvora secretly helps him escape.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) > Hunt for the Colossus :: Team Colossus rescues Resistance agent Norath Kev on Varkana , with them all narrowly escaping First Order capture.

Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) > Hunt for the Colossus :: Kragan Gorr's Warbird gang stages a mutiny on the Colossus for their own gain, using B2 battle droids and a B1 repaired by Neeku Vozo; however, Vozo had reprogrammed the droids, with Xiono and Synara San helping to foil the mutiny and expel the pirates.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) > Hunt for the Colossus :: A First Order Resurgent -class Star Destroyer attacks and destroys an Aeosian village on Aeos Prime as part of their campaign to deny the Resistance access to former Rebel Alliance bases, leading to the abandonment of the village and several wounded Aeosians.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) > Hunt for the Colossus :: With Captain Doza hopeful that Aeos Prime would provide a suitable home for the Colossus , Ace Squadron scouts the surrounding ocean but are attacked by hostile Aeosians . Thanks in part to Xiono, their queen calls off the attack and makes peace with Doza, negotiating the Colossus ' stay. Xiono remains restless and does not wish to stay in their new home, and wishes to continue fighting the First Order.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) > Hunt for the Colossus :: Xiono decides to leave and rejoin Norath Kev and the Resistance near Batuu. However, he encounters a First Order probe droid over Aeos Prime, and the Thunderer promptly attacks the Colossus . It flees with the help of the Aeosians.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) > Hunt for the Colossus :: The First Order blockades the planet Dantooine, cuting off all communication and stranding Resistance recruits. Resistance's Jade Squadron led by Venisa Doza, and members of Ace Squadron including Torra Doza and Kazuda Xiono, extract shuttles carrying the recruits through the blockade and successfully escort them to the Colossus. During the fight, one of the shuttles is destroyed, and First Order Lieutenant Galek is killed, along with most of his TIE fighter squadron .
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) > Hunt for the Colossus :: A First Order fleet, led by Commander Pyre and Agent Tierny , bombards a section of Aeos Prime in retaliation for assisting the Colossus . Tamara Ryvora , horrified by the massacre, decides to defect from the First Order.

Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) > Hunt for the Colossus :: Jarek Yeager and Kazuda Xiono arrange to rendezvous with Tamara Ryvora on the planet Castilon, who travels there under the guise of leading a training mission. However, First Order Security Bureau Agent Tierny discovers Ryvora's defection and dispatches the Star Destroyer Thunderer after them. Despite being captured by the First Order and exposing the Colossus to First Order pursuers, the team manages to sabotage the Star Destroyer's shield generator and escape the warship.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) > Hunt for the Colossus :: Kazuda Xiono and Tamara Ryvora contact the Colossus , warning them that the First Order is coming for them. When the Thunderer arrives, Commander Pyre deploys several TIE squadrons against the space station, but the Colossus residents were ready. Commander Venisa Doza leads Jade Squadron and Ace Squadron against the Thunderer , bombarding its engines and eventually destroying the ship, and with it Commander Pyre and all it's crew, ending the Hunt for the Colossus. Agent Tierny is executed by Supreme Leader Kylo Ren for her failure.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) :: After First Order declares to the inhabitants of the planet Ikkrukk that they now fall under their control, Black Squadron and eventually its commander Poe Dameron , arriving shortly after the Battle of Crait, fight against the invasion and Ikkrukk First Order sympathizers at the Battle of Grail City . The city's defenses are able to destroy the attacking Maxima-A class heavy cruiser Fortitude and Grail City is saved, but multiple cultural centres within the city are destroyed by the First Order sympathizers. Prime Minister Grist alleges there is too much damage to Grail City to afford supporting the Resistance and that such aid would only give the First Order more cause to return.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) :: The Resistance's Falcon , Zay Versio and Shriv Suurgav, and Black Squadron reunite. They are joined by rebel veterans Carlist Rieekan, Orrimaarko , Phantom Squadron , Wedge Antilles, and Norra Wexley, and they shelter at Yendor's Ryloth Defense Authority cave base . They launch a series of missions to start rebuilding the Resistance.

Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) > The Resistance's Falcon , Zay Versio and Shriv Suurgav, and Black Squadron reunite. They are joined by rebel veterans Carlist Rieekan, Orrimaarko , Phantom Squadron , Wedge Antilles, and Norra Wexley, and they shelter at Yendor's Ryloth Defense Authority cave base . They launch a series of missions to start rebuilding the Resistance. :: A mission to Corellia completed by two separate teams; Poe Dameron leads Corellian Team One in securing a list of people targeted by the First Order and being sold at a secret auction; and Wedge Antilles leads Corellian Team Two in rescuing former New Republic Senator Ransolm Casterfo from First Order enslavement.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) > The Resistance's Falcon , Zay Versio and Shriv Suurgav, and Black Squadron reunite. They are joined by rebel veterans Carlist Rieekan, Orrimaarko , Phantom Squadron , Wedge Antilles, and Norra Wexley, and they shelter at Yendor's Ryloth Defense Authority cave base . They launch a series of missions to start rebuilding the Resistance. :: Dross Squadron , led by Shriv Suurgav, travels to the junkyard planet of Bracca to take much-needed starships. There they are helped by a group of workers from the Scrapper Guild who are resisting the First Orber's occupation of the planet, and are able to obtain multiple X-wing starfighters before fleeing the planet.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) :: The First Order launches an attack after discovering the Resistance is set up in the Ryloth Defense Authority cave base . In the fighting, at least 1 pilot and Yendor's daughter Hahnee Brethen are killed, and Rey leads the defense against the First Order forces while the Resistance evacuates the planet.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) :: After fleeing Ryloth, the Resistance move to a Collective safe house on Helmaxa , beginning to recruit more people to the cause. Having received supplies from Tah'Nuhna , the Resistance then relocates to Anoat .
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) :: Rebuilding his command, Kylo Ren discovers the First Order's reserve forces under the leadership of Allegiant General Enric Pryde, who is given a seat on the Supreme Council .
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) :: First Order forces, led by General Armitage Hux aboard the Star Destroyer Finalizer , annihilate the planet Tah'Nuhna for assisting the Resistance. TIE bombers destroy the capital city and the government tower.

Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) :: The pilots of Black Squadron, led by Poe Dameron, secure munitions that the New Republic had impounded from pirates and stored in Base 354-23X on the moon of Avedot . To retrieve them they are forced to fight the criminals of the Kendoh Gang , led by Kendoh Voss , and lose three of their members.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) :: Leia Organa leads a mission to Mon Cala , securing their people's support and Aftab Ackbar 's ships just as the First Order invades the waterworld.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) :: Blockade of Kashyyyk ; the Resistance, among them Chewbacca and Beaumont Kin, battles First Order jet troopers subjugating the Wookiee world.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) :: Poe Dameron and Finn travel to the planet Tevel , to liberate the Tevel bacta production plant from the First Order and it's Tevellan forced workers. Allied with Tevellan conspirators led by Karkan , the Resistance defeats the First Order forces led by Major Kander Varak and retake the plant for the Tevellans.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) :: First Order forces led by Commander Branwayne Spiftz go on a mission to the planet Minfar to obtain the Echo Horn , a weapon created in the Imperial Era by the scientist Glenna Kip as a way to control the Zixon , the native species of Minfar, for the Galactic Empire. Resistance members led by Poe Dameron, and including Rey and Rose Tico travel to the planet, where they ally themselves with Glenna Kip and the Zixon to drive away the First Order from Minfar. In the fight, Commander Spiftz is killed and a First Order Star Destroyed elliminated by Resistance bombers.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) :: Director Orlok from the First Order Security Bureau , serving on the planet Garel , develops and deploys a new technology allowing him to control the entire planet's communications. Likana , a slicer from Garel, contacts the Resistance alerting them and asking for help, so Leia Organa and Poe Dameron go on a mission to Garel to stop Orlok and sabotage his technology.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) :: Poe Dameron, Finn, and Gannis Ducain travel to the outpost of Horizon Base in order to recruit the Oruan resistance group who had fled there after the First Order took their homeworld, Oru . Mezlo , the leader of the Oruans, is hesitant to join the Resistance, but eventually promises to provide assistance should they ever ask. After a few brief encounters with First Order trooper|stormtroopers on the station, the Resistance crew escapes in the Millennium Falcon .

Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) :: Leia Organa deploys Poe Dameron and Finn to the planet Kamil to secure livestock for the Resistance. They get a lead on the Octani Dhar Wat who is selling spare parts, ditch the livestock and track down the train Wat is on. He reveals the First Order had taken his parts and moved them to another car. Dameron and Finn set out to locate the parts but quickly run into First Order officers. A chase ensues throughout the train before they are able to knock out the First Order forces, Finn locates the spare parts and unlocks the car from the rest of the train. They also find livestock on their car, which they return to the Resistance.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) :: Strono Tuggs, having been forced to leave Maz Kanata's castle after the Battle of Takodana, sets up shop at Batuu's Black Spire Outpost with a Sienar-Chall Utilipede Transport and publishes his cookbook The Official Black Spire Outpost Cookbook .
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) :: Four months after the Hosnian Cataclysm, Resistance spy Vi Moradi and former stormtrooper Archex journey to Batuu and establish a Resistance base at the galaxy's edge. Their presence draws the attention of the First Order.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) :: Battle of Batuu
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) > Battle of Batuu :: Six months after the Hosnian Cataclysm, the First Order's 709th Legion occupies Black Spire Outpost. Kylo Ren leads the search for Resistance fugitives.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) > Battle of Batuu :: The Resistance and the First Order compete over Batuu.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) > Battle of Batuu :: The Finalizer is crippled in battle above Batuu and is retired from service. Half a year after the Starkiller Incident, Kylo Ren transfers his command to Allegiant General Pryde's flagship, the Steadfast .
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 34 ABY (continued) :: At some point, Kylo Ren rummages through the galaxy using the Steadfast , haunted by his defeat by Luke Skywalker's phantom at the Battle of Crait. He orders the ruins of Skywalker's Jedi Temple to be bombarded.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) :: 35 ABY
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 35 ABY :: The voice of the former Galactic Emperor, Sheev Palpatine, threatens revenge via a broadcast transmitted throughout the galaxy.

Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 35 ABY :: Determined to eliminate any threat to his power, Kylo Ren travels to Mustafar for a calling Force-imbued Sith wayfinder . Ren travels to the co-ordinate pre-defined within the wayfinder —the planet Exegol—and discovers a resurgent Darth Sidious. Initially intending to bring an end to the dark power he found behind Snoke, Ren hears Sidious reveal that the voices of Snoke and Darth Vader in his head were that of his doing. Sidious then unravels the Final Order , a massive fleet of Xyston -class Star Destroyers built by the Sith Eternal , trying to persuade Ren to join forces and kill Rey, although he actually intended to make her his successor as she was his granddaughter .
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 35 ABY :: The Mission to Sinta Glacier Colony occurs; the First Order Supreme Council recognizes a hidden spy within a their ranks.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 35 ABY :: The First Order tracks down Rey, Finn, Poe Dameron, BB-8, C-3PO, and Chewbacca to Pasaana during the its once-every-forty-two-years Festival of the Ancestors . While the five managed to evade the First Order thanks to Lando Calrissian, Chewbacca gets captured by the Order and presumed dead by his friends.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 35 ABY :: Rey, Finn, and Poe Dameron travel to the planet Kijimi to hack C-3PO's memory in order to obtain the location of the Emperor's wayfinder . During the mission, they team also learn that Chewbacca is alive, and mount a rescue on the Steadfast , the Star Destroyer of Kylo Ren, when it arrives above the planet. Armitage Hux reveals himself to be the spy who has been helping the Resistance and lets them escape, with Rey discovering that Darth Sidious is her grandfather thanks to Kylo Ren. However, Allegiant General Enric Pryde sees through Hux's deception and executes him, taking control of the First Order military .

Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 35 ABY :: Rey, Chewbacca, Poe Dameron and Finn undertake a mission to the Kef Bir moon in the Endor system . Having acquired the Blade of Ochi of Bestoon at Kijimi, they discover the location of the Emperor's wayfinder , and determined to find it, Rey enters the ruins of the Second Death Star and finds the wayfinder in the Emperor's Throne Room . However, she was followed to Kef Bir by Kylo Ren, who destroys the wayfinder in the hope of pushing Rey to the dark side of the Force. A lightsaber duel ensues between them, and during the fight Ren's focus wavers as he senses the death of his mother across the galaxy, allowing Rey to pierce him with his own lightsaber. Realizing that anger had driven her actions, Rey uses the Force to heal Ren before departing from Kef Bir, seeking exile on Ahch-To. The Force dyad between them, along with the loss of Ren's mother and the memory of his father, ultimately restore Ben Solo to the light side of the Force.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 35 ABY :: Rey, in fear after learning of her true lineage and from her tendencies of falling to the dark side of the force, takes Ren's starfighter and attempts to exile herself on Ahch-To, following the footsteps of Luke Skywalker, but is persuaded by the latter to face her destiny and confront her grandfather. Bestowed the lightsaber of Leia Organa and Skywalker's submerged X-wing starfighter , Rey uses the wayfinder aboard the late Kylo Ren's ship to uncover the path to Exegol, throneworld of the Darth Sidious' Sith Eternal, his personal Sith cult.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 35 ABY :: Allegiant General Enric Pryde assumes control of the First Order and pledges himself to Darth Sidious.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 35 ABY :: Kijimi, a world affiliated with the Resistance, is destroyed by the axial superlaser of the Xyston -class Star Destroyer Derriphan , at the behest of Pryde in a demonstration of loyalty to Sidious.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 35 ABY :: The Battle of Exegol occurs.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 35 ABY > The Battle of Exegol occurs. :: The Resistance confronts the Sith Eternal army and the Sith fleet. In face of apparent defeat, Lando Calrissian leads a Citizens' Fleet of allied starships gathered from across the galaxy against the Sith Eternal forces .
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 35 ABY > The Battle of Exegol occurs. :: Ben Solo arrives at the Sith Citadel to assist Rey, battling through defending Knights of Ren into the throne room .

Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 35 ABY > The Battle of Exegol occurs. :: Darth Sidious fights against Rey and Ben Solo before the Throne of the Sith . Rey dies destroying Sidious, the last of the Sith.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 35 ABY > The Battle of Exegol occurs. :: Ben Solo sacrifices himself to revive Rey by giving her what remains of his life Force. Solo becomes one with the Force together with his mother, Leia Skywalker Organa Solo.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 35 ABY > The Battle of Exegol occurs. :: The allied forces win the battle against the remaining Sith forces.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 35 ABY :: The Resistance and their allies hold celebrations and mourn their losses on Ajan Kloss.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 35 ABY :: An uprising against the First Order takes place across the galaxy.
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 35 ABY > An uprising against the First Order takes place across the galaxy. :: Uprising on Cloud City .
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 35 ABY > An uprising against the First Order takes place across the galaxy. :: Uprising on Corellia .
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 35 ABY > An uprising against the First Order takes place across the galaxy. :: Uprising on Coruscant .
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 35 ABY > An uprising against the First Order takes place across the galaxy. :: Uprising on Endor .
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 35 ABY > An uprising against the First Order takes place across the galaxy. :: Uprising on Jakku .
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 35 ABY > An uprising against the First Order takes place across the galaxy. :: Uprising on Lothal .
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 35 ABY > An uprising against the First Order takes place across the galaxy. :: Uprising on Naboo .
Timeline of galactic history > First Order-Resistance War (34 – 35 ABY) > 35 ABY > An uprising against the First Order takes place across the galaxy. :: Uprising on Thyferra .
Timeline of galactic history > New Jedi Order (35 ABY–) :: 35 ABY (continued)
Timeline of galactic history > New Jedi Order (35 ABY–) > 35 ABY (continued) :: Rey finalizes the construction of a yellow-bladed lightsaber —her new personal weapon.
Timeline of galactic history > New Jedi Order (35 ABY–) > 35 ABY (continued) :: Rey and BB-8 arrive at Tatooine with the Millennium Falcon . Rey buries the Skywalker twin 's lightsabers by the Lars Homestead and, with the blessing of Luke Skywalker and Leia Skywalker Organa Solo, recognizes herself as a Skywalker.

Timeline of galactic history > New Jedi Order (35 ABY–) > 35 ABY (continued) :: With the destruction of the Sith, a new era is ushered in, to be shaped by the Force in ways as yet unknown.
Timeline of galactic history > New Jedi Order (35 ABY–) > 35 ABY (continued) :: Some months after the Battle of Exegol, Beaumont Kin leads an excavation team to uncover and explore the ancient hidden secrets of the Sith Citadel, the Sith Order, and Palpatine.
Timeline of galactic history > New Jedi Order (35 ABY–) :: Rey Skywalker's new blade would go on to honor the Skywalker legacy, and she works to restore peace in the galaxy as a Jedi Master.
Timeline of galactic history > New Jedi Order (35 ABY–) :: 50 ABY
Timeline of galactic history > New Jedi Order (35 ABY–) > 50 ABY :: Rey Skywalker builds a new Jedi Order.
Timeline of galactic history > Thereafter :: A long time after the Battle of Yavin (exact chronology undefined)
Timeline of galactic history > Thereafter > A long time after the Battle of Yavin (exact chronology undefined) :: Fey Zara operates a cantina in a distant corner of the galaxy which hosts a series of holotables upon which patrons may play games based on pivotal conflicts of galactic history.
Timeline of galactic history > Thereafter > A long time after the Battle of Yavin (exact chronology undefined) :: An artist named Gammit Chond creates maps based on tales of the galaxy, and his works end up in the Shadow Stacks of the Graf Archive . Later, the drawings are exhumed by a trainee archivist and published by the archive as the Galactic Atlas . An updated version of the Galactic Atlas is later published when more of Chond's notes and drawings are discovered by Tollan Magzax .
Timeline of galactic history > Thereafter > A long time after the Battle of Yavin (exact chronology undefined) :: An archival task force led by archive droid TR-33NA scours the Graf Archive in a restoration effort for artifacts of historical importance. Within the library, they find an old illustrated journal of galactic species and cultures. TR-33NA identifies the drawing style to be similar to that of Gammit Chond.
Timeline of galactic history > Thereafter > A long time after the Battle of Yavin (exact chronology undefined) :: A Whill is asked by other Whills to chronicle events that transpired in the galaxy into the Journal of the Whills. After a lifetime of preparation, the Whill begins writing an entry titled "Episode IV" for an audience far away from the galaxy.

Timeline of galactic history > Thereafter > A long time after the Battle of Yavin (exact chronology undefined) :: A dissatisfied Whill instead writes about how Chewbacca's family celebrated Life Day in another journal while the former Whill goes on to write how the Empire strikes back in the next episode. Next, that Whill goes on to write the episode about the return of the Jedi and how it marked the beginning of the Empire's fall. As the writing process begins, the two Whills find common ground in their appreciation for the Ewoks and agree to come together to write the story of their caravan of courage, with the writing Whill also permitting the previously dissatisfied Whill the chance to write the episode about the blockade of Naboo.
